languages.arabic: فصعدوا على عرض الارض واحاطوا بمعسكر القديسين وبالمدينة المحبوبة فنزلت نار من عند الله من السماء واكلتهم.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲉⲩⲉ̀ⲓ̀ ⲉ̀ⲡ̀ϣⲱⲓ ⲉ̀ϫⲉⲛ ϯⲟⲩⲏϣⲥⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡ̀ⲕⲁϩⲓ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁⲩⲕⲱϯ ⲉ̀ϯⲡⲁⲣⲉⲙⲃⲟⲗⲏ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲟⲥ ⲛⲉⲙ ϯⲃⲁⲕⲓ ⲙ̀ⲃⲉⲣⲓ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁϥⲓ̀ ⲛ̀ϫⲉ ⲟⲩⲭ̀ⲣⲱⲙ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲧ̀ⲫⲉ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉⲛ ⲪϮ ⲁϥⲟⲩⲟ̀ⲙⲟⲩ.

languages.english: The devil, who deceived them, was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone where the beast and the false prophet are. And they will be tormented day and night forever and ever.
languages.arabic: وابليس الذي كان يضلّهم طرح في بحيرة النار والكبريت حيث الوحش والنبي الكذاب وسيعذبون نهارا وليلا الى ابد الآبدين
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲓⲇⲓⲁ̀ⲃⲟⲗⲟⲥ ⲉⲧⲥⲱⲣⲉⲙ ⲙ̀ⲙⲱⲟⲩ ⲁⲩϩⲓⲧϥ ⲉ̀ϧ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ⲉ̀ϯⲗⲩⲙⲛⲏ ⲛ̀ⲭ̀ⲣⲱⲙ ⲉⲑⲙⲟϩ ⲛ̀ⲑⲏⲛ: ⲡⲓⲙⲁ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲓⲑⲏⲣⲓⲟⲛ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓⲯⲉⲩⲇⲟⲙ̀ⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁⲩⲉⲣⲃⲁⲥⲁⲛⲓⲍⲓⲛ ⲙ̀ⲙⲱⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲉ̀ϩⲟⲟⲩ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲉ̀ϫⲱⲣϩ ϣⲁ ⲉ̀ⲛⲉϩ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲉ̀ⲛⲉϩ.

languages.english: Then I saw a great white throne and Him who sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away. And there was found no place for them.
languages.arabic: ثم رأيت عرشا عظيما ابيض والجالس عليه الذي من وجهه هربت الارض والسماء ولم يوجد لهما موضع.
languages.coptic: Ⲁⲓⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓϣϯ ⲛ̀ⲑ̀ⲣⲟⲛⲟⲥ ⲉϥⲟⲩⲟⲃϣ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲫⲏⲉⲧϩⲉⲙⲥⲓ ϩⲓϫⲱϥ: ⲫⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡ̀ⲕⲁϩⲓ ⲫⲱⲧ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ϧⲁⲧ̀ϩⲏ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉϥϩⲟ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲧ̀ⲫⲉ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲙ̀ⲡⲟⲩϫⲉⲙ ⲙⲁ ⲛ̀ⲧⲱⲟⲩ.

languages.english: And I saw the dead, small and great, standing before God, and books were opened. And another book was opened, which is the Book of Life. And the dead were judged according to their works, by the things which were written in the books.
languages.arabic: ورأيت الاموات صغارا وكبارا واقفين امام الله وانفتحت اسفار وانفتح سفر آخر هو سفر الحياة ودين الاموات مما هو مكتوب في الاسفار بحسب اعمالهم.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁⲓⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ ⲛⲓⲕⲟⲩϫⲓ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲛⲓϣϯ: ⲉⲩⲟ̀ϩⲓ ⲉ̀ⲣⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉⲙ̀ⲑⲟ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲑ̀ⲣⲟⲛⲟⲥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁⲩⲟⲩⲱⲛ ⲛ̀ϩⲁⲛϫⲱⲙ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁϥⲟⲩⲱⲛ ⲛ̀ⲕⲉϫⲱⲙ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲫⲁ ⲡ̀ⲱⲛϧ ⲡⲉ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁⲩϯϩⲁⲡ ⲉ̀ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲥ̀ϧⲏⲟⲩⲧ ϩⲓ ⲡⲓϫⲱⲙ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲟⲩϩ̀ⲃⲏⲟⲩⲓ̀.

languages.english: The sea gave up the dead who were in it, and Death and Hades delivered up the dead who were in them. And they were judged, each one according to his works.
languages.arabic: وسلم البحر الاموات الذين فيه وسلم الموت والهاوية الاموات الذين فيهما ودينوا كل واحد بحسب اعماله.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁ̀ ⲫ̀ⲓⲟⲙ ϯ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛ̀ϧ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ⲛ̀ϧⲏⲧϥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲫ̀ⲛⲟⲩⲛ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲁ̀ⲙⲉⲛϯ ⲁⲩϯ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛ̀ϧⲏⲧⲟⲩ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁⲩϯϩⲁⲡ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲟⲩϩ̀ⲃⲏⲟⲩⲓ̀.

languages.english: Then Death and Hades were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death.
languages.arabic: وطرح الموت والهاوية في بحيرة النار. هذا هو الموت الثاني.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲫ̀ⲛⲟⲩⲛ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲁ̀ⲙⲉⲛϯ ⲁⲩϩⲓⲧⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ϧ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ⲉ̀ϯⲗⲩⲙⲛⲏ ⲛ̀ⲭ̀ⲣⲱⲙ ⲉⲑⲙⲉϩ ⲛ̀ⲑⲏⲛ.

languages.english: And anyone not found written in the Book of Life was cast into the lake of fire.
languages.arabic: وكل من لم يوجد مكتوبا في سفر الحياة طرح في بحيرة النار
languages.coptic: Ⲛⲉⲙ ⲫⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲙ̀ⲡⲟⲩϫⲉⲙϥ ⲉϥⲥ̀ϧⲏⲟⲩⲧ ϩⲓ ⲡ̀ϫⲱⲙ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡ̀ⲱⲛϧ: ⲁⲩϩⲓⲧⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ϯⲗⲩⲙⲛⲏ ⲛ̀ⲭ̀ⲣⲱⲙ.

languages.english: And he showed me a pure river of water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding from the throne of God and of the Lamb.
languages.arabic: واراني نهرا صافيا من ماء حياة لامعا كبلّور خارجا من عرش الله والخروف.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁⲩⲧⲁⲙⲟⲓ ⲉ̀ⲟⲩⲓⲁⲣⲟ ⲙ̀ⲙⲱⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲱⲛϧ: ⲉϥⲫⲟⲣⲓ ⲙ̀ⲫ̀ⲣⲏϯ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲁⲗⲗⲟⲛ ⲉϥⲛⲏⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲁ ⲡⲓⲑ̀ⲣⲟⲛⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲪϮ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓϩⲓⲏⲃ.

languages.english: In the middle of its street, and on either side of the river, was the tree of life, which bore twelve fruits, each tree yielding its fruit every month. The leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.
languages.arabic: في وسط سوقها وعلى النهر من هنا ومن هناك شجرة حياة تصنع اثنتي عشرة ثمرة وتعطي كل شهر ثمرها. وورق الشجرة لشفاء الامم.
languages.coptic: Ϧⲉⲛ ⲑ̀ⲙⲏϯ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉⲥϣ̀ⲑⲉϩ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲓⲓⲁⲣⲟ ⲥⲁⲙ̀ⲛⲁⲓ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲥⲁⲙ̀ⲛⲁⲓ ⲟⲩϣ̀ϣⲏⲛ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡ̀ⲱⲛϧ: ⲉϥⲓ̀ⲛⲓ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲓ̅ⲃ̅ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲧⲁϩ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ⲟⲩⲁⲓ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲁ̀ⲃⲟⲧ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛⲓϫⲱⲃⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲓϣ̀ϣⲏⲛ ⲉⲩⲉⲣⲫⲁϧⲣⲓ ⲛ̀ⲛⲉⲛⲃⲁⲗ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲉⲑⲛⲟⲥ.

languages.english: And there shall be no more curse, but the throne of God and of the Lamb shall be in it, and His servants shall serve Him.
languages.arabic: ولا تكون لعنة ما في ما بعد. وعرش الله والخروف يكون فيها وعبيده يخدمونه.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲥⲱϥ ⲛⲓⲃⲉⲛ ⲛ̀ⲛⲉϥϣⲱⲡⲓ ϫⲉ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲓⲑ̀ⲣⲟⲛⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲪϮ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓϩⲓⲏⲃ ⲉⲩⲉ̀ϣⲱⲡⲓ ⲛ̀ϧⲏⲧⲥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲉϥϣⲱⲡⲓ ⲛ̀ϫⲉ ⲡ̀ϫⲱⲛⲧ: ⲁⲗⲗⲁ ⲛⲓⲉ̀ⲃⲓⲁⲓⲕ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲪϮ ⲉⲩⲉ̀ϣⲉⲙϣⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ.

languages.english: They shall see His face, and His name shall be on their foreheads.
languages.arabic: وهم سينظرون وجهه واسمه على جباههم.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲉⲩⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀ⲡⲉϥϩⲟ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲉϥⲣⲁⲛ ϩⲓ ⲧⲟⲩⲧⲉϩⲛⲓ.

languages.english: There shall be no night there: They need no lamp nor light of the sun, for the Lord God gives them light. And they shall reign forever and ever.
languages.arabic: ولا يكون ليل هناك ولا يحتاجون الى سراج او نور شمس لان الرب الاله ينير عليهم وهم سيملكون الى ابد الآبدين
languages.coptic: Ⲛ̀ⲛⲉ ⲉ̀ϫⲱⲣϩ ϣⲱⲡⲓ ϫⲉ ⲟⲩⲇⲉ ⲛ̀ⲛⲟⲩⲉⲣⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲁ̀ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲓⲛⲓ ⲛ̀ϧⲏⲧⲥ: ⲟⲩⲇⲉ ⲟⲩⲟⲩⲱⲓⲛⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲫ̀ⲣⲏ ϫⲉ Ⲡ⳪̅ ⲪϮ ⲉϥⲉ̀ⲉⲣⲟⲩⲱⲓⲛⲓ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲉⲩⲉ̀ⲉⲣⲟⲩⲣⲟ ϣⲁ ⲉ̀ⲛⲉϩ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲓⲉ̀ⲛⲉϩ.

languages.english: Then he said to me, "These words are faithful and true." And the Lord God of the holy prophets sent His angel to show His servants the things which must shortly take place.
languages.arabic: ثم قال لي هذه الاقوال امينة وصادقة. والرب اله الانبياء القديسين ارسل ملاكه ليري عبيده ما ينبغي ان يكون سريعا.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲉϫⲁϥ ⲛⲏⲓ ϫⲉ ⲛⲁⲓⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲥⲉⲛ̀ϩⲟⲧ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲥⲉⲟⲩⲁⲃ ϩⲁⲛⲙⲉⲑⲙⲏⲓ ⲛⲉ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ Ⲡ⳪̅ ⲪϮ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲏⲥ ⲁϥⲧⲁⲟⲩⲟ̀ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉϥⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲟⲥ ⲉ̀ⲧⲁⲙⲉ ⲛⲉϥⲉ̀ⲃⲓⲁⲓⲕ: ⲉ̀ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲥⲉⲙ̀ⲡ̀ϣⲁ ⲛ̀ⲧⲟⲩϣⲱⲡⲓ ⲛ̀ⲭⲱⲗⲉⲙ.

languages.english: "Behold, I am coming quickly! Blessed is he who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book."
languages.arabic: ها انا آتي سريعا. طوبى لمن يحفظ اقوال نبوة هذا الكتاب
languages.coptic: Ϩⲏⲡⲡⲉ ϯⲛⲏⲟⲩ ϩⲏⲡⲡⲉ ϯⲛⲏⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲭⲱⲗⲉⲙ: ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧϥ ⲙ̀ⲫⲏⲉⲑⲛⲁⲁ̀ⲣⲉϩ ⲉ̀ⲛⲓⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲧⲁⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲓⲁ̀ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲁⲓϫⲱⲙ.

languages.english: Now I, John, saw and heard these things. And when I heard and saw, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel who showed me these things.
languages.arabic: وانا يوحنا الذي كان ينظر ويسمع هذا. وحين سمعت ونظرت خررت لاسجد امام رجلي الملاك الذي كان يريني هذا.
languages.coptic: Ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲉ Ⲓⲱⲁⲛⲛⲏⲥ ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲁϥⲛⲁⲩ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲥⲱⲧⲉⲙ ⲉ̀ⲛⲁⲓ: ⲧⲟⲧⲉ ⲉ̀ⲧⲁⲓⲥⲱⲧⲉⲙ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲉ̀ⲧⲁⲓⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀ⲛⲁⲓ ⲁⲓϩⲓⲧⲧ ⲉ̀ⲡⲉⲥⲏⲧ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉⲙ̀ⲑⲟ ⲛ̀ⲛⲉⲛϭⲁⲗⲁⲩϫ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲟⲥ ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲧⲁⲙⲟ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲓ ⲉ̀ⲛⲁⲓ.

languages.english: Then he said to me, "See that you do not do that. For I am your fellow servant, and of your brethren the prophets, and of those who keep the words of this book. Worship God."
languages.arabic: فقال لي انظر لا تفعل. لاني عبد معك ومع اخوتك الانبياء والذين يحفظون اقوال هذا الكتاب. اسجد للّه.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲉϫⲁϥ ⲛⲏⲓ: ϫⲉ ⲙ̀ⲫⲱⲣ ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲟⲩϣ̀ⲫⲏⲣ ⲙ̀ⲃⲱⲕ ⲛ̀ⲧⲁⲕ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲉⲕⲥ̀ⲛⲏⲟⲩ ⲛⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲏⲥ: ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲏⲉⲑⲛⲁⲁ̀ⲣⲉϩ ⲉ̀ⲛⲓⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲁⲓϫⲱⲙ: ⲟⲩⲱϣⲧ ⲙ̀ⲪϮ.

languages.english: And he said to me, "Do not seal the words of the prophecy of this book, for the time is at hand.
languages.arabic: وقال لي لا تختم على اقوال نبوة هذا الكتاب لان الوقت قريب.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲉϫⲁϥ ⲛⲏⲓ ϫⲉ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉⲣⲧⲉⲃ ⲛⲓⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲧⲁⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲓⲁ̀ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲁⲓϫⲱⲙ: ⲡⲓⲥⲏⲟⲩ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲁϥϧⲱⲛⲧ.

languages.english: He who is unjust, let him be unjust still; he who is filthy, let him be filthy still; he who is righteous, let him be righteous still; he who is holy, let him be holy still."
languages.arabic: من يظلم فليظلم بعد. ومن هو نجس فليتنجس بعد. ومن هو بار فليتبرر بعد. ومن هو مقدس فليتقدس بعد
languages.coptic: Ⲫⲏⲉⲧϭⲓⲛ̀ϫⲟⲛⲥ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥϭⲓⲛ̀ϫⲟⲛⲥ ⲟⲛ: ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲑⲱⲗⲉⲃ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥⲑⲱⲗⲉⲃ: ⲡⲓⲑ̀ⲙⲏⲓ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥⲑ̀ⲙⲁⲓⲟϥ: ⲫⲏⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥⲧⲟⲩⲃⲟϥ.

languages.english: "And behold, I am coming quickly, and My reward is with Me, to give to every one according to his work.
languages.arabic: وها انا آتي سريعا واجرتي معي لاجازي كل واحد كما يكون عمله.
languages.coptic: Ϩⲏⲡⲡⲉ ϯⲛⲏⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲭⲱⲗⲉⲙ ⲡⲁⲃⲉⲭⲉ ⲛⲉⲙⲏⲓ: ϯⲛⲁϯ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲟⲩⲁⲓ ⲡⲓⲟⲩⲁⲓ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲉϥϩ̀ⲃⲏⲟⲩⲓ̀.

languages.english: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the Beginning and the End, the First and the Last."
languages.arabic: انا الالف والياء. البداية والنهاية. الاول والآخر.
languages.coptic: Ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲉ ⲡⲓⲁⲗⲫⲁ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓⲰ̀: ϯⲁⲣⲭⲏ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓϫⲱⲕ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ.

languages.english: Blessed are those who do His commandments, that they may have the right to the tree of life, and may enter through the gates into the city.
languages.arabic: طوبى للذين يصنعون وصاياه لكي يكون سلطانهم على شجرة الحياة ويدخلوا من الابواب الى المدينة.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲟⲛ ⲛⲓⲃⲉⲛ ⲛⲏⲉⲑⲛⲁⲓ̀ⲣⲓ ⲛ̀ⲛⲉϥⲉⲛⲧⲟⲗⲏ: ϩⲓⲛⲁ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲟⲩⲉⲣϣⲓϣⲓ ϣⲱⲡⲓ ϩⲓϫⲉⲛ ⲡⲓϣ̀ϣⲏⲛ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡ̀ⲱⲛϧ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲉⲩⲉ̀ϣⲉ ⲉ̀ϧⲟⲩⲛ ⲉ̀ϯⲃⲁⲕⲓ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲓⲡⲩⲗⲱⲛ.

languages.english: But outside are dogs and sorcerers and sexually immoral and murderers and idolaters, and whoever loves and practices a lie.
languages.arabic: لان خارجا الكلاب والسحرة والزناة والقتلة وعبدة الاوثان وكل من يحب ويصنع كذبا
languages.coptic: Ⲛⲓⲟⲩϩⲱⲣ ⲇⲉ ⲥⲁⲃⲟⲗ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲫⲁⲣⲙⲁⲅⲟⲥ: ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲡⲟⲣⲛⲟⲥ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥϧⲱⲧⲉⲃ: ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓϣⲁⲙϣⲉ ⲓϧ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲟⲩⲟⲛ ⲛⲓⲃⲉⲛ ⲉⲧⲓ̀ⲣⲓ ⲛ̀ϯⲙⲉⲑⲛⲟⲩϫ.

languages.english: "I, Jesus, have sent My angel to testify to you these things in the churches. I am the Root and the Offspring of David, the Bright and Morning Star."
languages.arabic: انا يسوع ارسلت ملاكي لاشهد لكم بهذه الامور عن الكنائس. انا اصل وذرية داود. كوكب الصبح المنير.
languages.coptic: Ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲉ Ⲓⲏ̅ⲥ̅ ⲁⲓⲧⲁⲟⲩⲟ̀ ⲙ̀ⲡⲁⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲟⲥ ⲉ̀ⲉⲣⲙⲉⲑⲣⲉ ⲛⲱⲧⲉⲛ ⲛ̀ⲛⲁⲓⲥⲁϫⲓ ϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲉⲕⲕ̀ⲗⲏⲥⲓⲁ̀ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ: ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲉ ϯⲛⲟⲩⲛⲓ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓⲅⲉⲛⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲇⲁⲩⲓⲇ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓⲥⲓⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ϣⲁϥϣⲁⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲟⲟⲩⲓ̀.

languages.english: And the Spirit and the bride say, "Come!" And let him who hears say, "Come!" And let him who thirsts come. Whoever desires, let him take the water of life freely.
languages.arabic: والروح والعروس يقولان تعال. ومن يسمع فليقل تعال. ومن يعطش فليأت. ومن يرد فليأخذ ماء حياة مجانا
languages.coptic: Ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲛⲉⲙ ϯϣⲉⲗⲉⲧ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲥⲉϫⲱ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲥ: ϫⲉ ⲁ̀ⲙⲟⲩ: ⲛⲉⲙ ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲥⲱⲧⲉⲙ ⲙⲁⲣⲟⲩϫⲟⲥ: ϫⲉ ⲁ̀ⲙⲟⲩ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲟ̀ⲃⲓ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥⲓ̀ ⲫⲏⲉⲑⲟⲩⲱϣ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥϭⲓ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲙⲱⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲱⲛϧ ⲛ̀ϫⲓⲛϫⲏ.

languages.english: For I testify to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book: If anyone adds to these things, God will add to him the plagues that are written in this book;
languages.arabic: لاني اشهد لكل من يسمع اقوال نبوة هذا الكتاب ان كان احد يزيد على هذا يزيد الله عليه الضربات المكتوبة في هذا الكتاب.
languages.coptic: Ϯⲉⲣⲙⲉⲑⲣⲉ ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲟⲛ ⲛⲓⲃⲉⲛ ⲉⲧⲥⲱⲧⲉⲙ ⲉ̀ⲛⲓⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲧⲁⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲓⲁ̀ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲁⲓϫⲱⲙ: ϫⲉ ⲫⲏⲉⲑⲛⲁⲧⲟⲩϩⲟ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ: ⲉ̀ⲣⲉ ⲪϮ ⲧⲟⲩϩⲟ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲉⲣϧⲟⲧ ⲉⲧⲥ̀ϧⲏⲟⲩⲧ ϩⲓ ⲡⲁⲓϫⲱⲙ.

languages.english: and if anyone takes away from the words of the book of this prophecy, God shall take away his part from the Book of Life, from the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book.
languages.arabic: وان كان احد يحذف من اقوال كتاب هذه النبوّة يحذف الله نصيبه من سفر الحياة ومن المدينة المقدسة ومن المكتوب في هذا الكتاب
languages.coptic: Ⲫⲏ ⲇⲉ ⲉⲑⲛⲁϫⲱϫ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲁⲓϫⲱⲙ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲧⲁⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲓⲁ̀: ⲉ̀ⲣⲉ ⲪϮ ⲉϥⲉ̀ⲉⲗ ⲡⲉϥⲙⲉⲣⲟⲥ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϩⲓ ⲡ̀ϫⲱⲙ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡ̀ⲱⲛϧ: ⲛⲉⲙ ϯⲃⲁⲕⲓ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ ⲉⲧⲥ̀ϧⲏⲟⲩⲧ ϩⲓ ⲡⲁⲓϫⲱⲙ.

languages.english: He who testifies to these things says, "Surely I am coming quickly." Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus!
languages.arabic: يقول الشاهد بهذا نعم. انا آتي سريعا. آمين. تعال ايها الرب يسوع
languages.coptic: Ϥ̀ϫⲱ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ϫⲉ ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲉⲣⲙⲉⲑⲣⲉ ⲛ̀ⲛⲁⲓ ϫⲉ ⲥⲉⲛⲁϣⲱⲡⲓ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲥⲉⲛⲏⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲭⲱⲗⲉⲙ: ⲁ̀ⲙⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲛ⳪̅ Ⲓⲏ̅ⲥ̅ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅.

languages.english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
languages.arabic: نعمة ربنا يسوع المسيح مع جميعكم. آمين
languages.coptic: Ⲉ̀ϫⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲟⲥ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ ϣⲁ ⲉ̀ⲛⲉϩ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲉ̀ⲛⲉϩ ⲁ̀ⲙⲏⲛ.

service.relative_path: saturday/Vigil of the Apocalypse - Third and Sixth Hours.xml
service.file_stem: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Third and Sixth Hours

title.english: Prayers of the Third and Sixth Hours

languages.english: Listen, and give ear. Do not exalt yourselves, for the Lord has spoken.
languages.arabic: اسمعوا واصغوا. لا تتعظموا لان الرب تكلم.

languages.english: Give glory to the Lord your God before it grows dark, and causes your feet to stumble on the dark mountains. You shall wait in anticipation of the light, but the shadow of death will be there; and they shall bring you into darkness.
languages.arabic: اعطوا الرب الهكم مجدا قبل ان يجعل ظلاما وقبلما تعثر ارجلكم على جبال العتمة فتنتظرون نورا فيجعله ظل موت ويجعله ظلاما دامسا.

languages.english: Now if you will not hear, your soul will weep secretly because of your insolent countenance, and your eyes will bring forth tears, for the Lord’s flock is broken apart.
languages.arabic: وان لم تسمعوا ذلك فان نفسي تبكي في اماكن مستترة من اجل الكبرياء وتبكي عيني بكاء وتذرف الدموع لانه قد سبي قطيع الرب.

languages.english: Say to the king and to the nobles, “Humble yourself, and sit down, for your crown of glory is removed from your head.”
languages.arabic: قل للملك وللملكة اتضعا واجلسا لانه قد هبط عن راسيكما تاج مجدكما.

languages.english: The cities to the South were shut, and there was no one to open them. Judah is sent away completely as a settlement.
languages.arabic: اغلقت مدن الجنوب وليس من يفتح. سبيت يهوذا كلها سبيت بالتمام.

languages.english: Lift up your eyes, O Jerusalem, and see those who come from the north. Where is the flock given to you, the sheep of your glory?
languages.arabic: ارفعوا اعينكم وانظروا المقبلين من الشمال. اين القطيع الذي أعطي لك غنم مجدك.

languages.english: What will you say when they visit you? For you taught them lessons in the beginning against yourself. Shall not pains of agony seize you, like a woman who gives birth?
languages.arabic: ماذا تقولين حين يعاقبك وقد علّمتهم على نفسك قواد للرياسة. أما تاخذك الاوجاع كامرأة ماخض

languages.english: But if you say in your heart, “Why have these things happened to me?” Because of the multitude of your wrongdoings, your backside was uncovered, so your heels might be exposed.
languages.arabic: وان قلت في قلبك لماذا اصابتني هذه. لاجل عظمة اثمك هتك ذيلاك وانكشف عنفا عقباك.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Je n~nekcwjp n~ta'u,/ qen a~men]: oude n~nek] m~p~eyouab n~tak e~naf e~p~tako.
languages.english: Because You shall not leave my soul in Hades, neither shall You suffer Your holy One to see corruption.
languages.arabic: لأنك لا تترك نفسي في الجحيم. ولا تدع قدوسك يرى فسادا.

languages.coptic: Nimwit n~te p~wnq aktamoi e~rwou: eke~mahht n~ovnof nem pekho.
languages.english: You have made known to me the ways of life; You will fill me with joy with Your face; delight is in Your right hand forever.
languages.arabic: قد عرفتني سبل الحياة. تملأني فرحا مع وجهك. البهجة في يمينك إلى الانقضاء.

languages.english: Then Jesus said to His disciples, "If anyone desires to come after Me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow Me.
languages.arabic: حينئذ قال يسوع لتلاميذه ان اراد احد ان يأتي ورائي فلينكر نفسه ويحمل صليبه ويتبعني.
languages.coptic: Ⲧⲟⲧⲉ ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲓⲏ̅ⲥ̅ ⲛ̀ⲛⲉϥⲙⲁⲑⲏⲧⲏⲥ ϫⲉ ⲫⲏⲉⲑⲟⲩⲱϣ ⲉ̀ⲙⲟϣⲓ ⲛ̀ⲥⲱⲓ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥϫⲟⲗϥ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥⲱ̀ⲗⲓ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉϥⲥ̀ⲧⲁⲩⲣⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉϥⲙⲟϣⲓ ⲛ̀ⲥⲱⲓ.

languages.english: For whoever desires to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for My sake will find it.
languages.arabic: فان من اراد ان يخلّص نفسه يهلكها. ومن يهلك نفسه من اجلي يجدها.
languages.coptic: Ⲫⲏ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲱϣ ⲉ̀ⲛⲟϩⲉⲙ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉϥⲯⲩⲭⲏ ⲉϥⲉ̀ⲧⲁⲕⲟⲥ: ⲫⲏ ⲇⲉ ⲉⲑⲛⲁⲧⲁⲕⲟ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉϥⲯⲩⲭⲏ ⲉⲑⲃⲏⲧ ⲉϥⲉ̀ϫⲉⲙⲥ.

languages.english: For what profit is it to a man if he gains the whole world, and loses his own soul? Or what will a man give in exchange for his soul?
languages.arabic: لانه ماذا ينتفع الانسان لو ربح العالم كله وخسر نفسه. او ماذا يعطي الانسان فداء عن نفسه.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲓⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲛⲁϫⲉⲙϩⲏⲟⲩ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ⲁϥϣⲁⲛϫⲉⲙϩⲏⲟⲩ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲕⲟⲥⲙⲟⲥ ⲧⲏⲣϥ: ⲧⲉϥⲯⲩⲭⲏ ⲇⲉ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉϥϯⲟ̀ⲥⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲥ: ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲛ ⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲧⲉ ⲡⲓⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲛⲁⲧⲏⲓϥ ⲛ̀ⲧ̀ϣⲉⲃⲓⲱ̀ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉϥⲯⲩⲭⲏ.

languages.english: For the Son of Man will come in the glory of His Father with His angels, and then He will reward each according to his works.
languages.arabic: فان ابن الانسان سوف يأتي في مجد ابيه مع ملائكته وحينئذ يجازي كل واحد حسب عمله.
languages.coptic: Ⲡ̀ϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲙ̀ⲫ̀ⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲉϥⲛⲏⲟⲩ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡ̀ⲱ̀ⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲉϥⲓⲱⲧ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲉϥⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲟⲥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲧⲟⲧⲉ ϥ̀ⲛⲁϯ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲟⲩⲁⲓ ⲡⲓⲟⲩⲁⲓ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲉϥϩ̀ⲃⲏⲟⲩⲓ̀.

languages.english: Assuredly, I say to you, there are some standing here who shall not taste death till they see the Son of Man coming in His kingdom."
languages.arabic: الحق اقول لكم ان من القيام ههنا قوما لا يذوقون الموت حتى يروا ابن الانسان آتيا في ملكوته
languages.coptic: Ⲁ̀ⲙⲏⲛ ϯϫⲱ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲥ ⲛⲱⲧⲉⲛ: ϫⲉ ⲟⲩⲟⲛ ϩⲁⲛⲟⲩⲟⲛ ϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲟ̀ϩⲓ ⲉ̀ⲣⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲙ̀ⲡⲁⲓⲙⲁ: ⲛ̀ⲥⲉⲛⲁϫⲉⲙϯⲡⲓ ⲙ̀ⲫ̀ⲙⲟⲩ ⲁⲛ ϣⲁⲧⲟⲩⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀Ⲡ̀ϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲙ̀Ⲫ̀ⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲉϥⲛⲏⲟⲩ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡ̀ⲱ̀ⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲉϥⲓⲱⲧ.

languages.english: “Who among you fears the Lord? Let him listen to the voice of His Servant. You who walk in darkness and have no light, trust in the name of the Lord and rely upon God.
languages.arabic: من منكم خائف الرب سامع لصوت عبده. من الذي يسلك في الظلمات ولا نور له فليتكل على اسم الرب ويستند الى الهه.

languages.english: Behold, all of you kindle a fire and feed a flame. Walk in the light of your fire and the flame you kindled. This happened to you for My sake, and you shall lie down in sorrow.
languages.arabic: يا هؤلاء جميعكم القادحين نارا المتنطقين بشرار اسلكوا بنور ناركم وبالشرار الذي اوقدتموه. من يدي صار لكم هذا. في الوجع تضطجعون

languages.english: “Listen to Me, you who pursue righteousness and seek the Lord. Look to the solid rock which you hewed, and to the hole of the pit which you dug.
languages.arabic: اسمعوا لي ايها التابعون البر الطالبون الرب. انظروا الى الصخر الذي منه قطعتم والى نقرة الجب التي منها حفرتم.

languages.english: Look to Abraham our father and to Sarah who bore you, for he was first, and I called and blessed him, and loved and multiplied him.
languages.arabic: انظروا الى ابراهيم ابيكم والى سارة التي ولدتكم. لاني دعوته وهو واحد وباركته واكثرته.

languages.english: And now I will comfort you, O Zion, and I comforted all her desert places; and I shall make her desert places like the Garden of the Lord. In it they shall find gladness and exceeding joy, and thanksgiving and the voice of praise.
languages.arabic: فان الرب قد عزى صهيون. عزى كل خربها ويجعل بريتها كعدن وباديتها كجنة الرب. الفرح والابتهاج يوجدان فيها. الحمد وصوت الترنم

languages.english: Listen to Me, listen, O My people and kings, give ear to Me, for law shall proceed from Me, and My judgment as the light of the Gentiles.
languages.arabic: انصتوا اليّ يا شعبي ويا امتي اصغي اليّ. لان شريعة من عندي تخرج وحقي اثبته نورا للشعوب.

languages.english: My righteousness draws near quickly, and My salvation will go forth as light, and the Gentiles will hope in My arm, and the coastlands shall wait for Me and hope in My arm.
languages.arabic: قريب بري. قد برز خلاصي وذراعاي يقضيان للشعوب. اياي ترجو الجزائر وتنتظر ذراعي

languages.english: Lift up your eyes to heaven, and look to the earth below, for heaven is solid as smoke, and the earth will grow old like a garment; and the inhabitants of the earth shall die, as do these things. But My salvation shall be forever, and My righteousness will not fail.
languages.arabic: ارفعوا الى السموات عيونكم وانظروا الى الارض من تحت. فان السموات كالدخان تضمحلّ والارض كثوب تبلى وسكانها كالبعوض يموتون. اما خلاصي فالى الابد يكون وبري لا ينقض.

languages.english: Listen to Me, My people who know judgment, in whose heart is My law. Do not fear the reproach of men, nor be overcome by their contempt.
languages.arabic: اسمعوا لي يا عارفي البر الشعب الذي شريعتي في قلبه. لا تخافوا من تعيير الناس ومن شتائمهم لا ترتاعوا.

languages.english: For as a garment will be devoured by time, and as wool will be devoured by a moth, so shall they be devoured. But My righteousness shall be forever, and My salvation from generation to generation.”
languages.arabic: لانه كالثوب ياكلهم العث وكالصوف ياكلهم السوس اما بري فالى الابد يكون وخلاصي الى دور الادوار

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Ebol qen n/ets/k aiws oub/k Po#c#: Po#c# cwtem e~tac~m/.
languages.english: Out of the depths I have cried to You, O Lord. O Lord, hear my voice.
languages.arabic: من الأعماق صرخت إليك يا رب، يا رب استمع صوتي.

languages.coptic: Anioui n~tau/ e~bolqen ous~teko: e~p~jinouwnh e~bol m~pekran Po#c.
languages.english: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may give thanks to Your name, O Lord.
languages.arabic: أخرج من الحبس نفسي، لكي أشكر اسمك يا رب.

languages.english: "Blessed are the poor in spirit, For theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
languages.arabic: طوبى للمساكين بالروح. لان لهم ملكوت السموات.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓϩⲏⲕⲓ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ϫⲉ ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲧⲉ ϯⲙⲉⲧⲟⲩⲣⲟ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲫⲏⲟⲩⲓ̀.

languages.english: Blessed are those who mourn, For they shall be comforted.
languages.arabic: طوبى للحزانى. لانهم يتعزون.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲉⲣϩⲏⲃⲓ ϯⲛⲟⲩ ϫⲉ ⲛ̀ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲧⲟⲩⲛⲁϯϩⲟ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ.

languages.english: Blessed are the meek, For they shall inherit the earth.
languages.arabic: طوبى للودعاء. لانهم يرثون الارض.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲣⲉⲙⲣⲁⲩϣ ϫⲉ ⲛ̀ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲑⲛⲁⲉⲣⲕ̀ⲗⲏⲣⲟⲛⲟⲙⲓⲛ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲕⲁϩⲓ.

languages.english: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, For they shall be filled.
languages.arabic: طوبى للجياع والعطاش الى البر. لانهم يشبعون.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲏⲉⲧϩⲟⲕⲉⲣ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲟ̀ⲃⲓ ⲛ̀ϯⲙⲉⲑⲙⲏⲓ ϫⲉ ⲛ̀ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲑⲛⲁⲥⲓ.

languages.english: Blessed are the merciful, For they shall obtain mercy.
languages.arabic: طوبى للرحماء. لانهم يرحمون.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲛⲁⲏⲧ ϫⲉ ⲛ̀ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲧⲟⲩⲛⲁⲛⲁⲓ ⲛⲱⲟⲩ.

languages.english: Blessed are the pure in heart, For they shall see God.
languages.arabic: طوبى للانقياء القلب. لانهم يعاينون الله.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲏⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲟⲩϩⲏⲧ ϫⲉ ⲛ̀ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲑⲛⲁⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀ⲫϮ.

languages.english: Blessed are the peacemakers, For they shall be called sons of God.
languages.arabic: طوبى لصانعي السلام. لانهم ابناء الله يدعون.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲉⲣϩⲓⲣⲏⲛⲏ ϫⲉ ⲛ̀ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲡⲉⲧⲟⲩⲛⲁⲙⲟⲩϯ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ ϫⲉ ⲛⲓϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲫϮ.

languages.english: Blessed are those who are persecuted for righteousness' sake, For theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
languages.arabic: طوبى للمطرودين من اجل البر. لان لهم ملكوت السموات.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲓⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲁⲩϭⲟϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲥⲱⲟⲩ ⲉⲑⲃⲉ ϯⲙⲉⲑⲙⲏⲓ ϫⲉ ⲑⲱⲟⲩ ⲧⲉ ϯⲙⲉⲧⲟⲩⲣⲟ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲫⲏⲟⲩⲓ̀.

languages.english: "Blessed are you when they revile and persecute you, and say all kinds of evil against you falsely for My sake.
languages.arabic: طوبى لكم اذا عيّروكم وطردوكم وقالوا عليكم كل كلمة شريرة من اجلي كاذبين.
languages.coptic: Ⲱ̀ⲟⲩⲛ̀ⲓⲁⲧⲉⲛ ⲑⲏⲛⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ϣⲱⲡ ⲁⲩϣⲁⲛϭⲟϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲥⲁ ⲑⲏⲛⲟⲩ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛ̀ⲥⲉϣⲉϣ ⲑⲏⲛⲟⲩ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛ̀ⲥⲉϫⲉ ⲡⲉⲧϩⲱⲟⲩ ⲛⲓⲃⲉⲛ ⲛ̀ⲥⲁ ⲑⲏⲛⲟⲩ ⲉⲩϫⲉ ⲙⲉⲑⲛⲟⲩϫ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲧⲉⲛ ⲉⲑⲃⲏⲧ.

languages.english: Rejoice and be exceedingly glad, for great is your reward in heaven, for so they persecuted the prophets who were before you.
languages.arabic: افرحوا وتهللوا. لان اجركم عظيم في السموات. فانهم هكذا طردوا الانبياء الذين قبلكم
languages.coptic: Ⲣⲁϣⲓ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲑⲉⲗⲏⲗ ϫⲉ ⲡⲉⲧⲉⲛⲃⲉⲭⲉ ⲟⲩⲛⲓϣϯ ⲡⲉ ϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲫⲏⲟⲩⲓ̀: ⲡⲁⲓⲣⲏϯ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲁⲩϭⲟϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲥⲁ ⲛⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲏⲥ ⲉ̀ⲛⲁⲩϧⲁϫⲱⲧⲉⲛ.
Ebolqen Iezeki/l pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Ezekiel the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من حزقيال النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: }jij m~Po#c# aci e~qr/i e~jwi acini m~moi e~bol qen Pip~neuma n~te Po#c# ac,at qen y~m/] n~te tkoi ouoh yai nacmoh\n~kac n~nirwmi:
languages.english: The hand of the Lord came upon me and brought me out in the Spirit of the Lord, and set me down in the midst of the valley; and it was full of bones.
languages.arabic: كَانَتْ عَلَيَّ يَدُ الرَّبِّ فَأَخْرَجَني بِرُوحِ الرَّبِّ وَأَنْزَلَنِي فِي وَسَطِ الْبُقْعَةِ, وَهِيَ مَلآنَةٌ عِظَاماً.

languages.coptic: acyrikw] e~rwou t/rou ouoh h/ppe nauws e~masw hihrac n~te tkoi eusouwou e~masw:
languages.english: Then He caused me to pass by them all around, and behold, there were very many in the open valley; and indeed they were very dry.
languages.arabic: وَأَمَرَّنِي عَلَيْهَا مِنْ حَوْلِهَا وَإِذَا هِيَ كَثِيرَةٌ جِدّاً عَلَى وَجْهِ الْبُقْعَةِ, وَإِذَا هِيَ يَابِسَةٌ جِدّاً.

languages.coptic: Ouoh Po#c# afjoc n/i: je p~s/ri m~vrwmi: haranaikac nawnq: anok de aijoc: je Adwnai Po#c# V] Cabawy n~yok v/ etcwoun:
languages.english: And He said to me, “Son of man, can these bones live?” So I answered, “O Lord God, You know.”
languages.arabic: فَقَالَ لِي: [يَا ابْنَ آدَمَ, أَتَحْيَا هَذِهِ الْعِظَامُ؟» فَقُلْتُ: [يَا سَيِّدُ الرَّبُّ أَنْتَ تَعْلَمُ».

languages.coptic: ouoh afjoc n/i je ariprov/teuin eqoun qen naikac: ouoh ajo eqoun qen naikac etsouwou: je cwtem m~pcaji m~Po#c#.
languages.english: Again He said to me, “Prophesy to these bones, and say to them, ‘O dry bones, hear the word of the Lord!
languages.arabic: فَقَالَ لِي: [تَنَبَّأْ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْعِظَامِ وَقُلْ لَهَا: أَيَّتُهَا الْعِظَامُ الْيَابِسَةُ, اسْمَعِي كَلِمَةَ الرَّبِّ.

languages.coptic: pair/] e~ta Adwnai Po#c# joc e~qoun e~naikac: je h/ppe ]naini eqoun erwten n~oup#n#a# eretenewnq.
languages.english: Thus says the Lord God to these bones: “Surely I will cause breath to enter into you, and you shall live.
languages.arabic: هَكذَا قَالَ السَّيِّدُ الرَّبُّ لِهَذِهِ الْعِظَامِ: هَئَنَذَا أُدْخِلُ فِيكُمْ رُوحاً فَتَحْيُونَ.

languages.coptic: ouoh ]na] e~jen y/nou n~anmout ntaini e~jen y/nou carx tavwrs e~bol e~jen y/nou nousar: n~ta] n~oup#n#a# e~qoun e~rwten ereten e~wnq ereten emi je a~nok pe Po#c#.
languages.english: I will put sinews on you and bring flesh upon you, cover you with skin and put breath in you; and you shall live. Then you shall know that I am the Lord.”’”
languages.arabic: وَأَضَعُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَصَباً وأَكْسِيكُمْ لَحْماً وَأَبْسُطُ عَلَيْكُمْ جِلْداً وَأَجْعَلُ فِيكُمْ رُوحاً فَتَحْيُونَ وَتَعْلَمُونَ أَنِّي أَنَا الرَّبُّ].

languages.coptic: Ouoh aierprov/teuin kata vr/] etafhonhen n/i: ouoh aoucm/ sswpi epjin yrierprov/teuin: ouoh h/ppe ic oumonmen afswpi: anikac ] m~pououoi e~qoun e~nou er/ou:
languages.english: So I prophesied as I was commanded; and as I prophesied, there was a noise, and suddenly a rattling; and the bones came together, bone to bone.
languages.arabic: فَتَنَبَّأْتُ كمَا أُمِرتُ. وَبَيْنَمَا أَنَا أَتنَبَّأُ كَانَ صَوْتٌ وَإِذَا رَعْشٌ فَتَقَارَبَتِ الْعِظَامُ كُلُّ عَظْمٍ إِلَى عَظْمِهِ.

languages.coptic: ainau ouoh ic hanmout aui e~q~r/i e~jwou: ouoh ousar afvwrs e~bol ejwou nem m~mon pn#a# de nq/tou.
languages.english: Indeed, as I looked, the sinews and the flesh came upon them, and the skin covered them over; but there was no breath in them.
languages.arabic: ونَظَرْتُ وَإِذَا بِالْعَصَبِ وَاللَّحْمِ كَسَاهَا, وبُسِطَ الْجِلْدُ علَيْهَا مِنْ فَوْقُ, وَلَيْسَ فِيهَا رُوحٌ.

languages.coptic: ouoh afjoc n/i je ariprov/teuin e~jen pipn#a# ariprov/teuin w p~s/ri m~vrwmi: ouoh ajoc e~qoun qen pipn#a#: je pair/] etafjoc n~je Adwnai Po#c#: je pipn#a# amou e~bol qen pekftou y/ou: ouoh nifi eqoun qen nirefmwout e~pjintouwnq:
languages.english: Also He said to me, “Prophesy to the breath, prophesy, son of man, and say to the breath, ‘Thus says the Lord God: “Come from the four winds, O breath, and breathe on these slain, that they may live.”’”
languages.arabic: فَقَالَ لِي: [تَنَبَّأْ لِلرُّوحِ, تَنَبَّأْ يَا ابْنَ آدَمَ, وَقُلْ لِلرُّوحِ: هَكذَا قَالَ السَّيِّدُ الرَّبُّ: هَلُمَّ يَا رُوحُ مِنَ الرِّيَاحِ الأَرْبَعِ وَهُبَّ عَلَى هَؤُلاَءِ الْقَتْلَى لِيَحْيُوا».

languages.coptic: ouoh aierprov/teuin kata v~r/] etafhonhen n/i ouoh\ a pipn#a# i~ e~qoun: erwou qen pjin yrierprov/teuin: ouoh h/ppe ic oumonmen afswpi: ouoh aftwounou auohi e~ratou naunaer ounis] m~m/s e~masw:
languages.english: So I prophesied as He commanded me, and breath came into them, and they lived, and stood upon their feet, an exceedingly great army.
languages.arabic: فَتَنَبَّأْتُ كَمَا أَمَرَني, فَدَخَلَ فِيهِمِ الرُّوحُ, فَحَيُوا وَقَامُوا عَلَى أَقدَامِهِمْ جَيْشٌ عَظيمٌ جِدّاً جِدّاً.

languages.coptic: ouoh afjoc n/i je p~s/ri m~vrwmi naikac t/rou p/i m~Pic#l# pe ouoh\ n~ywou ejw m~moc je nenkac auqomqem v/ereten jost e~bol qajwf aftako afvwrj e~bol m~mon:
languages.english: Then He said to me, “Son of man, these bones are the whole house of Israel. They indeed say, ‘Our bones are dry, our hope is lost, and we ourselves are cut off!’
languages.arabic: ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي: [يَا ابْنَ آدَمَ, هَذِهِ العِظَامُ هِيَ كُلُّ بَيتِ إِسْرَائِيلَ. هَا هُمْ يَقُولُونَ: يَبِسَتْ عِظَامُنَا وَهَلَكَ رَجَاؤُنَا. قَدِ انْقَطَعْنَا.

languages.coptic: Eybe vai ariprov/teuin ouoh ajoc e~qoun nahrau: je pair/] etafjoc n~je Adwnai P~o#c# : je h/ppe a~nok ]naouwn n~netenmhau ntaen y/nou e~bol palaoc n~ta] noup#n#a# e~qoun e~rwten n~te piwnq nta[i y/nou e~qoun e~pkahi m~Pic#l#:
languages.english: Therefore prophesy and say to them, ‘Thus says the Lord God: “Behold, O My people, I will open your graves and cause you to come up from your graves, and bring you into the land of Israel.
languages.arabic: لِذَلِكَ تَنَبَّأْ وَقُلْ لَهُمْ: هَكذَا قَالَ السَّيِّدُ الرَّبُّ: هَئَنَذَا أَفتَحُ قُبُورَكُمْ وأُصْعِدُكُمْ مِنْ قُبُورِكُمْ يَا شَعْبِي وَآتِي بِكُمْ إِلَى أَرْضِ إِسْرَائِيلَ.

languages.coptic: Ereten emi je a~nok pe Po#c# qen pjinyriouwn n~nimhau: ntaen y/nou e~bol n~q/tou palaoc:
languages.english: Then you shall know that I am the Lord, when I have opened your graves, O My people, and brought you up from your graves.
languages.arabic: فَتَعْلَمُونَ أَنِّي أَنَا الرَّبُّ عِنْدَ فَتْحِي قُبُورَكُمْ وَإِصْعَادِي إِيَّاكُمْ مِنْ قُبُورِكُمْ يَا شَعْبِي.

languages.coptic: ouoh ]naeny/nou hijen petenkahi eretenemi: je a~nok pe Po#c# aicaji ouoh aiiri peje Adwnai Po#c#.
languages.english: I will put My Spirit in you, and you shall live, and I will place you in your own land. Then you shall know that I, the Lord, have spoken it and performed it,” says the Lord.’”
languages.arabic: وأَجْعَلُ رُوحِي فِيكُمْ فتَحْيُونَ, وَأَجْعَلُكُمْ فِي أَرْضِكُمْ, فَتَعْلَمُونَ أَنِّي أنَا الرَّبُّ تَكَلَّمْتُ وَأَفْعَلُ, يَقُولُ الرَّبُّ».

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

title.english: Introduction to the Coptic Pauline Epistle

readings.reference: Introduction to the Coptic Pauline Epistle

languages.coptic: Eybe ]a~nactacic n~te nirefmwout n/etauenkot auemton m~mwou qen v~nah] m~Pi,~rictoc: P[oic mam~ton n~nou'u,/ t/rou.
languages.english: For the resurrection of the dead, those who slept and reposed in the faith of Christ, Lord repose all their souls!
languages.arabic: من أجل قيامة الأموات الذين رقدوا وتنيحوا في الإيمان بالمسيح يارب نيح نفوسهم أجمعين.

languages.coptic: Pauloc v~bwk m~Pen[oic I/couc Pi,~rictoc pia~poctoloc etyahem v/e~tauyasf e~pihisennoufi n~te V].
languages.english: Paul, the servant of our Lord Jesus Christ, called to be an apostle, appointed to the Gospel of God.
languages.arabic: بولس عبد يسوع المسيح الرسول المدعو المفرز لبشرى الله.

languages.coptic: }tamou de m~mwten nac~n/ou e~pieuaggelion...
languages.english: Moreover, brethren, I declare to you the Gospel...
languages.arabic: وأنا اعلمكم يا اخوتى ان الأنجيل...

languages.english: After the reading, the following conclusion is chanted.
languages.arabic: وفي ختامه يقول:

languages.coptic: Pih~mot gar nemwten nem t~hirin/ eucop je a~m/n ece~swpi.
languages.english: Grace and peace be with you all. Amen. So be it.
languages.arabic: النعمة لكم والسلام معاً. أمين يكون.

languages.english: Moreover, brethren, I declare to you the gospel which I preached to you, which also you received and in which you stand,
languages.arabic: واعرّفكم ايها الاخوة بالانجيل الذي بشرتكم به وقبلتموه وتقومون فيه
languages.coptic: Ϯⲧⲁⲙⲟ ⲇⲉ ⲙ̀ⲙⲱⲧⲉⲛ ⲛⲁⲥ̀ⲛⲏⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ⲡⲓⲉⲩⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲓⲟⲛ ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲁⲓϩⲓϣⲉⲛⲛⲟⲩϥⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ⲛⲱⲧⲉⲛ: ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲫⲏ ⲡⲉ ⲉⲧⲁⲣⲉⲧⲉⲛϭⲓⲧϥ ⲫⲁⲓ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉⲧⲉⲛⲟ̀ϩⲓ ⲉ̀ⲣⲁⲧⲉⲛ ⲑⲏⲛⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ϧⲏⲧϥ.

languages.english: by which also you are saved, if you hold fast that word which I preached to you--unless you believed in vain.
languages.arabic: وبه ايضا تخلصون ان كنتم تذكرون اي كلام بشرتكم به الا اذا كنتم قد آمنتم عبثا.
languages.coptic: Ⲫⲁⲓ ⲟⲛ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁⲛⲟϩⲉⲙ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϩⲓⲧⲟⲧϥ: ϫⲉ ϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲁⲓϩⲓϣⲉⲛⲛⲟⲩϥⲓ ⲛⲱⲧⲉⲛ ⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲧⲉⲧⲉⲛⲁ̀ⲙⲟⲛⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ⲥⲁⲃⲟⲗ ⲓ̀ⲙⲏϯ ϩⲓⲕⲏ ⲁ̀ⲣⲉⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁϩϯ.

languages.english: For I delivered to you first of all that which I also received: that Christ died for our sins according to the Scriptures,
languages.arabic: فانني سلمت اليكم في الاول ما قبلته انا ايضا ان المسيح مات من اجل خطايانا حسب الكتب.
languages.coptic: Ⲁⲓϯ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉⲛⲑⲏⲛⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ϣⲟⲣⲡ ⲙ̀ⲫⲏⲉⲧⲁⲓϭⲓⲧϥ: ϫⲉ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲁϥⲙⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ϩ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ⲉ̀ϫⲉⲛ ⲛⲉⲛⲛⲟⲃⲓ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲓⲅ̀ⲣⲁⲫⲏ.

languages.english: and that He was buried, and that He rose again the third day according to the Scriptures,
languages.arabic: وانه دفن وانه قام في اليوم الثالث حسب الكتب.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ϫⲉ ⲁⲩⲕⲟⲥϥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ϫⲉ ⲁϥⲧⲱⲛϥ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲓⲉ̀ϩⲟⲟⲩ ⲙ̀ⲙⲁϩ ⲅ̅ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲓⲅ̀ⲣⲁⲫⲏ.

languages.english: and that He was seen by Cephas, then by the twelve.
languages.arabic: وانه ظهر لصفا ثم للاثني عشر.
languages.coptic: Ⲟⲩⲟϩ ϫⲉ ⲁϥⲟⲩⲟⲛϩϥ ⲉ̀Ⲕⲏⲫⲁ ⲓ̀ⲧⲁ ⲁϥⲟⲩⲟⲛϩϥ ⲉ̀ⲡⲓ ⲓ̅ⲃ̅.

languages.english: After that He was seen by over five hundred brethren at once, of whom the greater part remain to the present, but some have fallen asleep.
languages.arabic: وبعد ذلك ظهر دفعة واحدة لاكثر من خمس مئة اخ اكثرهم باق الى الآن ولكن بعضهم قد رقدوا.
languages.coptic: Ⲙⲉⲛⲉⲛⲥⲱⲥ ⲁϥⲟⲩⲟⲛϩϥ ⲥⲁⲡ̀ϣⲱⲓ ⲛ̀ⲫ̅ ⲛ̀ⲥⲟⲛ ⲉⲩⲥⲟⲡ: ⲛⲁⲓ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲟⲩϩⲟⲩⲟ̀ ϣⲟⲡ ϣⲁ ⲉ̀ϧⲟⲩⲛ ⲉ̀ϯⲛⲟⲩ ϩⲁⲛⲕⲉⲭⲱⲟⲩⲛⲓ ⲇⲉ ⲁⲩⲉⲛⲕⲟⲧ.

languages.english: After that He was seen by James, then by all the apostles.
languages.arabic: وبعد ذلك ظهر ليعقوب ثم للرسل اجمعين.
languages.coptic: Ⲓ̀ⲧⲁ ⲁϥⲟⲩⲟⲛϩϥ ⲉ̀Ⲓⲁⲕⲱⲃⲟⲥ ⲓ̀ⲧⲁ ⲁϥⲟⲩⲟⲛϩϥ ⲉ̀ⲛⲓⲁ̀ⲡⲟⲥⲧⲟⲗⲟⲥ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ.

languages.english: Then last of all He was seen by me also, as by one born out of due time.
languages.arabic: وآخر الكل كانه للسقط ظهر لي انا.
languages.coptic: Ⲉ̀ⲡ̀ϧⲁⲉ̀ ⲇⲉ ⲙ̀ⲙⲱⲟⲩ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ ⲙ̀ⲫ̀ⲣⲏϯ ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲟⲩϧⲉ: ⲁϥⲟⲩⲟⲛϩϥ ⲉ̀ⲣⲟⲓ ϩⲱ.

languages.english: For I am the least of the apostles, who am not worthy to be called an apostle, because I persecuted the church of God.
languages.arabic: لاني اصغر الرسل انا الذي لست اهلا لان أدعى رسولا لاني اضطهدت كنيسة الله.
languages.coptic: Ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲡⲉ ⲡⲓⲕⲟⲩϫⲓ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ⲟⲩⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲁⲡⲟⲥⲧⲟⲗⲟⲥ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ: ⲛ̀ϯⲉⲙⲡ̀ϣⲁ ⲁⲛ ⲉⲑⲣⲟⲩⲙⲟⲩϯ ⲉ̀ⲣⲟⲓ ϫⲉ ⲁ̀ⲡⲟⲥⲧⲟⲗⲟⲥ: ⲉⲑⲃⲉ ϫⲉ ⲁⲓϭⲟϫⲓ ⲛ̀ⲥⲁ ϯⲉⲕⲕ̀ⲗⲏⲥⲓⲁ̀ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲪϮ.

languages.english: But by the grace of God I am what I am, and His grace toward me was not in vain; but I labored more abundantly than they all, yet not I, but the grace of God which was with me.
languages.arabic: ولكن بنعمة الله انا ما انا ونعمته المعطاة لي لم تكن باطلة بل انا تعبت اكثر منهم جميعهم. ولكن لا انا بل نعمة الله التي معي.
languages.coptic: Ϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩϩ̀ⲙⲟⲧ ⲇⲉ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲪϮ ϯⲟⲓ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉϯⲟⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲉϥϩ̀ⲙⲟⲧ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛ̀ϧⲏⲧ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉϥϣⲱⲡⲓ ⲉϥϣⲟⲩⲓⲧ: ⲁⲗⲗⲁ ⲁⲓϭⲓϧⲓⲥⲓ ⲉ̀ϩⲟⲧⲉⲣⲱⲟⲩ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ: ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲇⲉ ⲁⲛ ⲁⲗⲗⲁ ⲡⲓϩ̀ⲙⲟⲧ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲪϮ ⲉⲑⲛⲉⲙⲏⲓ.

languages.english: Therefore, whether it was I or they, so we preach and so you believed.
languages.arabic: فسواء انا ام اولئك هكذا نكرز وهكذا آمنتم
languages.coptic: Ⲓ̀ⲧⲉ ⲟⲩⲛ ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲕ ⲓ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲏ ⲧⲉⲛϩⲓⲱⲓϣ ⲙ̀ⲡⲁⲓⲣⲏϯ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲡⲁⲓⲣⲏϯ ⲁ̀ⲧⲉⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁϩϯ.

languages.english: Now if Christ is preached that He has been raised from the dead, how do some among you say that there is no resurrection of the dead?
languages.arabic: ولكن ان كان المسيح يكرز به انه قام من الاموات فكيف يقول قوم بينكم ان ليس قيامة اموات.
languages.coptic: Ⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲇⲉ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲥⲉϩⲓⲱⲓϣ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ϫⲉ ⲁϥⲧⲱⲛϥ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲏⲉⲑⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ: ⲡⲱⲥ ⲟⲩⲟⲛ ϩⲁⲛⲟⲩⲟⲛ ϫⲱ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲥ ϧⲉⲛ ⲑⲏⲛⲟⲩ: ϫⲉ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲛ ⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲥⲧⲁⲥⲓⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲛⲁϣⲱⲡⲓ.

languages.english: But if there is no resurrection of the dead, then Christ is not risen.
languages.arabic: فان لم تكن قيامة اموات فلا يكون المسيح قد قام.
languages.coptic: Ⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲇⲉ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲛ ⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲥⲧⲁⲥⲓⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲛⲁϣⲱⲡⲓ: ⲓⲉ ⲟⲩⲇⲉ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲧⲱⲛϥ.

languages.english: And if Christ is not risen, then our preaching is empty and your faith is also empty.
languages.arabic: وان لم يكن المسيح قد قام فباطلة كرازتنا وباطل ايضا ايمانكم.
languages.coptic: Ⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲇⲉ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲧⲱⲛϥ ϩⲁⲣⲁ ϥ̀ϣⲟⲩⲓⲧ ⲛ̀ϫⲉ ⲡⲉⲛϩⲓⲱⲓϣ: ϥ̀ϣⲟⲩⲓⲧ ⲟⲛ ⲛ̀ϫⲉ ⲡⲉⲧⲉⲛⲕⲉⲛⲁϩϯ.

languages.english: Yes, and we are found false witnesses of God, because we have testified of God that He raised up Christ, whom He did not raise up--if in fact the dead do not rise.
languages.arabic: ونوجد نحن ايضا شهود زور للّه لاننا شهدنا من جهة الله انه اقام المسيح وهو لم يقمه ان كان الموتى لا يقومون.
languages.coptic: Ⲥⲉⲛⲁϫⲉⲙⲉⲛ ⲇⲉ ⲟⲛ ⲉⲛⲟⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲉⲑⲣⲉ ⲛ̀ⲛⲟⲩϫ ϧⲁ ⲪϮ: ϫⲉ ⲁⲛⲉⲣⲙⲉⲑⲣⲉ ϧⲁ ⲪϮ ϫⲉ ⲁϥⲧⲟⲩⲛⲟⲥ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅: ⲫⲁⲓ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉϥⲧⲟⲩⲛⲟⲥϥ ⲓⲥϫⲉ ϩⲁⲣⲁ ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲛⲁⲧⲱⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩ ⲁⲛ.

languages.english: For if the dead do not rise, then Christ is not risen.
languages.arabic: لانه ان كان الموتى لا يقومون فلا يكون المسيح قد قام.
languages.coptic: Ⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲛⲁⲧⲱⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩ ⲁⲛ: ⲓⲉ ⲟⲩⲇⲉ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲧⲱⲛϥ.

languages.english: And if Christ is not risen, your faith is futile; you are still in your sins!
languages.arabic: وان لم يكن المسيح قد قام فباطل ايمانكم. انتم بعد في خطاياكم.
languages.coptic: Ⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲇⲉ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲧⲱⲛϥ ⲟⲩⲉ̀ⲫ̀ⲗⲏⲟⲩ ⲡⲉ ⲡⲉⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁϩϯ: ⲉ̀ⲧⲓ ⲟⲛ ⲧⲉⲧⲉⲛⲭⲏ ⲛ̀ϧ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲉⲧⲉⲛⲛⲟⲃⲓ.

languages.english: Then also those who have fallen asleep in Christ have perished.
languages.arabic: اذا الذين رقدوا في المسيح ايضا هلكوا.
languages.coptic: Ⲓⲉ ϩⲁⲣⲁ ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲁⲩⲉⲛⲕⲟⲧ ϧⲉⲛ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲁⲩⲧⲁⲕⲟ.

languages.english: If in this life only we have hope in Christ, we are of all men the most pitiable.
languages.arabic: ان كان لنا في هذه الحياة فقط رجاء في المسيح فاننا اشقى جميع الناس.
languages.coptic: Ⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲇⲉ ⲛ̀ϧ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲁⲓⲱⲛϧ ⲙ̀ⲙⲁⲩⲁⲧϥ ⲁⲛⲉⲣϩⲉⲗⲡⲓⲥ ⲉ̀Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅: ⲓⲉ ⲧⲉⲛϭⲓ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲁⲓ ⲉ̀ⲣⲟⲛ ⲉ̀ϩⲟⲧⲉ ⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲛⲓⲃⲉⲛ.

languages.english: But now Christ is risen from the dead, and has become the firstfruits of those who have fallen asleep.
languages.arabic: ولكن الآن قد قام المسيح من الاموات وصار باكورة الراقدين.
languages.coptic: Ϯⲛⲟⲩ ⲇⲉ ⲁ̀ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲧⲱⲛϥ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲏⲉⲑⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲧ̀ⲁ̀ⲡⲁⲣⲭⲏ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲏⲉⲧⲁⲩⲉⲛⲕⲟⲧ.

languages.english: For since by man came death, by Man also came the resurrection of the dead.
languages.arabic: فانه اذ الموت بانسان بانسان ايضا قيامة الاموات.
languages.coptic: Ⲉ̀ⲡⲓⲇⲏ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϩⲓⲧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲁ̀ ⲫ̀ⲙⲟⲩ ϣⲱⲡⲓ: ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϩⲓⲧⲉⲛ ⲕⲉⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲧ̀ⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲥⲧⲁⲥⲓⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ.

languages.english: For as in Adam all die, even so in Christ all shall be made alive.
languages.arabic: لانه كما في آدم يموت الجميع هكذا في المسيح سيحيا الجميع.
languages.coptic: Ⲙ̀ⲫ̀ⲣⲏϯ ⲅⲁⲣ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ϧⲉⲛ Ⲁ̀ⲇⲁⲙ ⲥⲉⲛⲁⲙⲟⲩ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ: ⲡⲁⲓⲣⲏϯ ⲟⲛ ϧⲉⲛ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲥⲉⲛⲁⲱⲛϧ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ.

languages.english: But each one in his own order: Christ the firstfruits, afterward those who are Christ's at His coming.
languages.arabic: ولكن كل واحد في رتبته. المسيح باكورة ثم الذين للمسيح في مجيئه.
languages.coptic: Ⲡⲓⲟⲩⲁⲓ ⲇⲉ ⲡⲓⲟⲩⲁⲓ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲉϥⲧⲁⲅⲙⲁ: ⲁ̀ⲡⲁⲣⲭⲏ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ⲓ̀ⲧⲁ ⲛⲁ Ⲡⲭ̅ⲥ̅ ϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲉϥϫⲓⲛⲓ̀.
"almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Wouniatf m~v/e~takcotpf ouoh aksopf e~rok
languages.english: Blessed is he whom You choose and help
languages.arabic: طوبى لمن أخترته وقبلته

languages.coptic: Efe~swpi qen nekaul/ou sae~neh.
languages.english: He shall dwell in Your courts.
languages.arabic: ليسكن في ديارك إلي الأبد,

languages.coptic: Ene~ci e~bol qen nia~gayon n~te pek/i.
languages.english: We shall be satisfied with the goodness of Your house.
languages.arabic: سَنَشْبَعُ من خَيْرَاتِ بَيْتِكَ.

languages.coptic: F~ouab n~je pekervei: ouoh foi n~s~v/ri qen oumeym/i: all/louia.
languages.english: Holy is Your temple, wondrous in righteousness. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: قدوس هو هيكلك وعجيب بالبر. الليلويا.

languages.english: Then they say the following hymn with its known (Adribi) tune or the fast one.
languages.arabic: ثم يقولون مقدمة الانجيل بالطريقه الادريبي أو دمجاً.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen ?ca/~ac pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Isaiah the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من إشعياء النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Cwtem e~roi Iakwb ouoh p~iIcra/l e~]mou] e~rof a~nok pe pisorp ouoh a~nok on pe pisae~neh.
languages.english: “Listen to Me, O Jacob and Israel, whom I call: I am the first, and I am forever.
languages.arabic: أسمع لي يا يعقوب واسرائيل الذي دعوته. أنا هو. أنا الأزلي وأنا الأبدى.

languages.coptic: Ouoh tajij y/e~tachicen] m~pikahi ouoh taouinam y/e~tactajre t~ve. ]namou] e~rwou t/rou n~ceoh~i e~ratou eucop.
languages.english: My hand also laid the foundation of the earth, and My right hand established heaven. I shall call them, and they will stand together.
languages.arabic: ويدى التى أسست الأرض. ويمينى التى ثبتت السماء. أنا أدعوهن جميعاً فيقفن معاً.

languages.coptic: Ouoh eue~ywou] e~qoun t/rou n~cecwtem e~n/eynajw nwou m~pair/] a~rie~mim~mok aii~ri m~pekouws e~jen Ybabulwn e~w~li m~p~jroj n~ni,aldeoc.
languages.english: All shall be gathered and hear: Who declared these things to them? Because I love you, I did your will against Babylon, to slay the seed of the Chaldeans.
languages.arabic: أجتمعوا كلكم وأسمعوا ما أقوله لهن هكذا أعرف ذاتك لأنى صنعت هواك ببابل. وأبدت نسل الكلدانيين.

languages.coptic: Anok aicaji a~nok aimou] aienf ouoh aicwouten m~pefmwit qwnt e~roi e~reten e~cwtem e~nai netaijotou an icjen sorp qen oupeth/p oude qen ouma n~te p~kahi
languages.english: I have spoken, I have called him, I have brought him, and made his way prosper. Come near to Me, hear this: I have not spoken in secret from the beginning, nor did I speak in a dark place of the earth.
languages.arabic: أنا تكلمت أنا دعوت وأتيت به. وقومت طريقه أقتربوا إلى وأسمعوا هذه لأنى منذ البدء لم أتكلم فى الخفاء ولا فى الأرض المظلمة.

languages.coptic: Efoi n~,aki nai m~mau pee~aunaswpi: ]nou P[oic petaf ouorpt nem pefp~neuma.
languages.english: When it took place, I was there, and now the Lord and His Spirit have sent Me.”
languages.arabic: لأنى عند كونها أنا حاضر. والآن فالرب أرسلنى مع روحه.

languages.coptic: Vai pe m~v~r/] e~tefjw m~moc n~je v/eynohem m~mok P[oic peyouab m~p~Icra/l.
languages.english: Thus says the Lord who delivers you, the Holy One of Israel:
languages.arabic: هكذا يقول الرب مخلصك قدوس اسرائيل.

languages.coptic: Anok pe Vnou] ait~cabok eyrekjimi m~pimwit e~teknamosi hiwtf.
languages.english: “I am your God, who showed you how to find the way wherein you should walk.
languages.arabic: أنا هو الله معلمك لتجد الطريق الذي تسير فيه.

languages.coptic: Ouoh e~ne akcwtem e~naentol/ nare tekhir/n/ naer m~vr/] m~v~iaro ouoh tek meym/i m~v~r/] n~nihiwmi n~tev~iom.
languages.english: If only you had heeded My commandments, then your peace would be like a river, and your righteousness as a wave of the sea.
languages.arabic: ليتك أصغيت لوصاياى فكانت سلامتك كالنهر. وعدلك كامواج البحر.

languages.coptic: Ouoh pekjroj naer m~vr/] m~pisw ouoh nis/ri n~te tekneji m~v~r/] m~pir/ici n~te p~kahi.
languages.english: Your seed would also be like the sand, and the offspring of your womb like the dust of the ground.
languages.arabic: ونسلك يصير كالرمل. وذرية بطنك كحصى الأرض.

languages.coptic: }nou oun n~nafotk e~bol: oude n~neftako n~je pekran m~pam~yo e~bol.
languages.english: Neither would you be utterly destroyed now, nor would your name perish before Me."
languages.arabic: والآن لا امحوك ولا يباد أسمك من قدامى.

languages.coptic: Amou e~bol qen Babulwn ekv/t e~bol qen ni,aldeoc.
languages.english: Go forth from Babylon, you who are fleeing from the Chaldeans.
languages.arabic: فأخرج من بابل وأهرب من الكلدانيين

languages.coptic: Jw m~p~q~rwou m~p~ounof ouoh vai maroucoymef a~jof saaur/jf mp~kahi ajoc je a~P[oic nohem m~pefbwk Iakwb.
languages.english: Proclaim a voice of gladness and let it become well known. Proclaim it to the end of the earth, and say, ‘The Lord delivered His servant Jacob.’
languages.arabic: وبصوت الشدو وأخبر ليسمعوا. ناد بهذا، شيعه إلى أقطار الأرض. قل أن الرب فدى يعقوب عبده.

languages.coptic: Ouoh on ausani~bi hip~safe efe~i~ni m~pimwou nwou efe~i~ni e~bol qen ]petra ouon oupetra navwji n~tefsouo e~bol n~je oumwou n~tefcw n~je pilaoc m~mon rasi sop n~niaceb/c peje P[oic.
languages.english: If they shall thirst, He will lead them through the desert, and water shall flow from the rock for them. He will split the rock, the water shall flow, and My people will drink. "There is no rejoicing," says the Lord, "for the ungodly."
languages.arabic: وإذ عطشوا فى البرية أخرج لهم من الصخرة ماء. وشق الصخرة ففاضت المياه فشرب الشعب. ليس سلام للمنافقين يقول الرب.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Naoum pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Nahum the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من ناحوم النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Ounou] n~ref,oh ouoh n~ref[i m~psis pe P[oic: qen oumbon f~na[i mp~sis n~je P[oic qen n/et]oub/f ouoh n~yof efe~fw] nnefjaji e~bol.
languages.english: God is jealous, and the Lord is an avenger; the Lord is avenging with fury; the Lord takes vengeance on His adversaries and drives out His enemies.
languages.arabic: الرب إله غيور ومنتقم. ينتقم الرب بغضب من المقاومين له وهو يبيد أعداءه.

languages.coptic: P[oic ourefw~ou n~h/t pe ouoh ounis] te tefjom pirefernobi n~neftoubof: P[oic efqen ouqae~ ouoh efqen oumonmen n~je pefmwit ouoh han[/pi nev~mwit n~te nef[alauj.
languages.english: The Lord is patient and His power is great, but the Lord will not acquit the guilty. His way is in destruction and in a whirlwind; the clouds are the dust of His feet.
languages.arabic: الرب هو طويل الروح و عظيمة هي قوته. ولكنه لا يبرر الخاطئ. الرب فى الزوبعة وفى العاصف طريقة. والسحاب طريق أقدامه.

languages.coptic: Efe~mbon ev~iom ouoh ft~swoui mmof ouoh niiarwou t/rou efe~swf mmwou acerkouji n~je y~bacan nem pikarmeloc ouoh n/etvori e~bol n~te pilibanoc aumounk.
languages.english: He threatens the sea and makes it dry, and he dries up all the rivers. Bashan and Carmel have diminished, and the flowers of Lebanon have died out.
languages.arabic: يغضب على البحر فييبسه وجميع الأنهار يجففها. قد ذوى بيسان والكرمل. وذبل زهر لبنان.

languages.coptic: Aumonmen n~je nitwou ebolm~mof ouoh aukimi n~je nikalamvwou ouoh afkwl n~je p~kahi ebolha pefho mai niben nem n/t/rou etsop n~q/tou:
languages.english: By Him the mountains are shaken and the hills quake, and the earth heaves at His presence—the whole earth and all who dwell in it.
languages.arabic: تزلزلت منه الجبال وتحركت الآكام وأنطوت الأرض من أمام وجهه. الدنيا وكل الساكنين فيها.

languages.coptic: Nim eynas~oh~i eratf ebolha p~ho m~pefjwnt ouoh nim eynas] oub/f qen pim~bon n~te pefjwnt: pefm~bon fnabwl n~hanar,wn e~bol ouoh nipetra aumonmen e~bol m~mof.
languages.english: Who can stand before His wrath? Who can withstand the fierceness of His anger? His fury melts away ruling powers, and He shatters the rocks into pieces.
languages.arabic: من يقدر أن يقف أمام سخط وجهه. ومن هو الذي يقاومه عند حنق رجزه. لأن غضبه يبيد الأراخنة ومنه تزلزلت الصخور.

languages.coptic: Ou,rc pe P[oic n~n/etjoust e~bol qajwf qen p~ehoou nouhojhej: ouoh efcwoun n~n/eterho] qatefh/:
languages.english: The Lord is merciful to those who wait on Him in the day of affliction, and He knows those who reverence Him:
languages.arabic: صالح هو الرب لمنتظريه فى يوم ضيقهم. وهو عارف لخائفيه.

languages.coptic: Ouoh qen oukataklucmoc n~te oujinmosi efi~ri n~oujwk n~n/ettwoun m~mwou ejwf: nem nefjaji efe[oji n~cwou n~je ou,aki.
languages.english: For with an overwhelming flood He shall make an end to those rising up, and darkness will pursue His enemies.
languages.arabic: وبطوفان عابر يصنع هلاكاً تاماً بالقائمين عليه. وأعداؤه يطاردهم ظلام.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Eie~caji m~pekran qatotou n~nacn/ou. eie~cmou e~rok ym/] n~]ekk~l/cia~:
languages.english: I will declare Your name to My brethren; In the midst of the assembly, I will praise You.
languages.arabic: .أُذِيعُ اسْمَكَ بَيْنَ إخْوَتِي. وَفِي وَسَطِ الْجَمَاعَةِ أُسَبِّحُكَ

languages.coptic: N/ eterho] qath/ m~pen[oic cmou e~rof: mawou naf pjroj t/rf n~iakwb: mareferho] qatefh/ n~je pijroj t/rf m~pic#l#. a#l#.
languages.english: You who fear the Lord, praise Him! All you descendants of Jacob, glorify Him, And fear Him, all you offspring of Israel! Alleluia.
languages.arabic: .يَا أيُّهَا الْخَائِفُونَ الرَّبَّ سَبِّحُوهُ، وَيَا مَعْشَرَ ذُرِّيَّةِ يَعْقُوبَ مَجِّدُوهُ. وليَخْشَهُ كُلُّ زَرْعِ إسرائيلَ. الّليلويا

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Matyeon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Matthew. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار متى البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Tote aci~ harof n~je y~mau n~nens/ri n~zebedeoc nem necs/ri ecouwst m~mof ouoh eceretin m~mof n~ouhwb.
languages.english: Then the mother of Zebedee’s sons came to Him with her sons, kneeling down and asking something from Him.
languages.arabic: حينئذ جاءت إليه أم إبني زبدى مع إبنيها وسجدت له وسألته شيئاً.

languages.coptic: N~yof de pejaf nac je ou pe eteouasf pejac naf je a~joc hina n~te nas/ri c~nau n~te ouai m~mwou hemci catekoui~nam nem ouai catekja[/ n~h~r/i qen tekmetouro:
languages.english: And He said to her, “What do you wish?” She said to Him, “Grant that these two sons of mine may sit, one on Your right hand and the other on the left, in Your kingdom.”
languages.arabic: أما هو فقال لها ماذا تريدين. قالت له أن تقول قولا أن يجلسا إبناي الأثنان أحدهما عن يمينك والآخر عن شمالك فى ملكوتك.

languages.coptic: Aferouw~ n~je I/couc pejaf je n~tetene~mi an je a~reteneretin eybeou ouon sjom m~mwten e~oe pia~vot e]nacof ouoh piwmc e]nawmc m~mof eretenemc y/nou pejwou: naf je ouon sjom m~mon.
languages.english: But Jesus answered and said, “You do not know what you ask. Are you able to drink the cup that I am about to drink, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with?” They said to Him, “We are able.”
languages.arabic: فأجاب يسوع وقال أنكما لستما تعلمان ما تطلبان. أتقدران أن تشربا الكاس التى أنا مزمع أن أشربها وبالصبغة التى أصطبغها تصطبغانها. فقالا له أنا لقادران.

languages.coptic: Ouoh pejaf nwou n~je I/couc je pia~vot men eretenecof ouoh piwmc tetennawmc mmof e~hemci de cataoui~nam nem taja[/ vwi an pe et/if alla van/ pe eta Paiwt et qen niv/oui cebtwtf nwou:
languages.english: So He said to them, “You will indeed drink My cup, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with; but to sit on My right hand and on My left is not Mine to give, but it is for those for whom it is prepared by My Father [who is in heaven]”
languages.arabic: فقال لهما يسوع أما الكأس فتشربانها وبالصبغة التى أصطبغ بها أنا تصطبغان. وأما جلوسكما عن يمينى وعن يسارى فليس لى أن أعطيه الا للذين أعد لهم من قبل أبي الذي فى السموات.

languages.coptic: Etaucwtem de n~je pikem/t m~may/t/c au,~remrem eybe picon c~nau:
languages.english: And when the ten heard it, they were greatly displeased with the two brothers.
languages.arabic: فلما سمع العشرة التلاميذ تقمقموا من أجل الأخوين.

languages.coptic: I/couc de afmou] e~rwou pejaf nwou je tetenemi je niar,wn n~te nieynoc petoi n~[oic e~rwou ouoh noukenis] etoi n~ersisi e~jwou.
languages.english: But Jesus called them to Himself and said, “You know that the rulers of the Gentiles lord it over them, and those who are great exercise authority over them.
languages.arabic: فدعاهم يسوع وقال لهم أما علمتم أن رؤساء الأمم يسودنهم وعظماءهم يتسلطون عليهم.

languages.coptic: Pair/] de an peynaswp qen y/nou alla v/eyouws eernis] qei y/nou efeerdia~kwn nwten:
languages.english: Yet it shall not be so among you; but whoever desires to become great among you, let him be your servant.
languages.arabic: وأما أنتم فلا يكون فيكم هكذا ولكن من أراد أن يكون فيكم كبيراً فليكن لكم خادماً.

languages.coptic: Ouoh v/ey ouws e~erhouit qen y/nou efe~erbwk nwten:
languages.english: And whoever desires to be first among you, let him be your slave—
languages.arabic: ومن يريد أن يكون فيكم أولاً فليكن لكم عبداً.

languages.coptic: Mv~r/] hwf m~p~s/ri m~v~rwmi netaf an eyrousems/tf alla e~semsi ouoh e~] n~tef'u,/ n~cw] ejen oum/s.
languages.english: just as the Son of Man did not come to be served, but to serve, and to give His life a ransom for many.”
languages.arabic: كما أن إبن البشر لم يآتٍ ليُخدم بل ليخدم ويبذل نفسه فداء عن كثيرين.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Eleventh Hour of Hosanna Sunday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الحادية عشر، من يوم احد الشعانين من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: In the minds of the antagonizing Jews, our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ was surrounded by people, troops, soldiers and warriors, similar to the kings of this world. These were the thoughts of the mother of John and James, sons of Zebedee. She came to our Savior while He was surrounded by the people and His disciples.
languages.arabic: الأفكار التى كانت لليهود المخالفين بسبب مخلصنا وملكنا المسيح. أنه مثل ملوك الأرض والجموع الكثيرة محيطة به. والجند والعساكر والمحاربون مثل الملوك. هكذا ظنت أم يوحنا ويعقوب إبنى زبدى. فكرت هكذا وأتت إلى مخلصنا أمام الجمع مع تلاميذه.

languages.english: She worshipped Him with her sons and said, “Grant that my two sons may sit one on Your right hand, and the other on Your left, in Your kingdom.”
languages.arabic: وسجدت له مع إبنيها وسألته وطلبت منه هكذا قائلة: قل قولا أن يجلس إبناى الإثنان معك فى ملكوتك واحد عن يمينك والآخر عن يسارك فى عز مملكتك.

languages.english: Hear then what the merciful and most compassionate Lord, who desires salvation for the whole world, said, “Are you able to drink of the cup that I shall drink of and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with?”
languages.arabic: أسمعوا الرؤوف الكثير الرحمة الذي يريد حياة جميع العالم. قال: أتقدران أن تشربا الكأس التى أتيت بسببها لكى أشربها. والصبغة التى أصطبغها.

languages.english: They said to Him, “We are able.” He answered them, “You will indeed be able to, but to sit at My right hand and at My left is not Mine to give.
languages.arabic: فقالا نقدر أن نصنع هذا. فلعلكما حقاً تقدران. فأما الجلوس فليس لى أن أعطيه لكما.

languages.english: It shall be given to those chosen by My omnipresent Father.”
languages.arabic: لكنه لأبي المالئ كل موضع وهو الذي يعطيه لاصفيائه.

languages.english: The two brothers were quiet when they heard these words and departed because of the magnitude of His glory.
languages.arabic: فلما سمع الأخوان هذا سكتا ومضيا من أجل عظم مجده.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Yrinio Ieremiou pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Lamentations of Jeremiah the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من مراثى أرميا النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Acswpi de menenca y~rouer ,~malwteuin m~Pic~ra/l ouoh Ieroucal/m n~tousorc afhemci n~je Ieremiac afrimi ouoh aferh/b m~pai h/bi e~jen Ieroucal/m ouoh pejef.
languages.english: Now it came to pass that after Israel was taken captive and Jerusalem became desolate, Jeremiah sat weeping; and he lamented this song of grief over Jerusalem and said:
languages.arabic: وكان بعد سبى اسرائيل وخراب أورشليم. أن أرميا جلس باكياً وناح على أورشليم بهذا النوح وقال.

languages.coptic: Je Pwcac hemci m~mauatc n~je ]baki y/etos m~m/s e~acer m~v~r/] n~ou,/ra y/etos
languages.english: "How does the city now sit alone, she who was full of people? She has become like a widow, she who was multiplied among the nations,
languages.arabic: كيف جلست وحدها المدينة الكثيرة الشعوب كيف صارت كأرملة العظيمة فى الأمم.

languages.coptic: qen nieynoc y/etoi n~ar,wn e~ni,wra acswpi euhw].
languages.english: she who was ruling among the countries. She has become subject to tribute.
languages.arabic: رئيسة البلدان صارت تحت الجزية.

languages.coptic: Qen ouirmi acrimi qen pie~jwrh: ouoh necermwoui~ ausouo e~jen necouoji. f~sop an n~je v/eyna]nom] nac e~bol qen n/eymei m~moc t/rou:
languages.english: "She weeps bitterly in the night; she sheds tears on her cheeks. Yet among all her lovers there is no one who comforts her.
languages.arabic: تبكى فى الليل بكاء. ودموعها على خديها. ليس لها من معز من جميع محبيها.

languages.coptic: ouon gar niben eymei m~moc ausosc: auswpi nac n~hanjaji.
languages.english: All who love her have dealt treacherously with her. They have become her enemies.
languages.arabic: وكل أصدقائها أهانوها. وصاروا لها أعداء.

languages.coptic: Auouw~teb n~]Ioudea~ e~bol eybe Pecyebio nem ebe p~a~sai n~te tecmetbwk:
languages.english: "Judea has gone into captivity because of her humiliation and harsh servitude.
languages.arabic: قد سبيت اليهودية من المذلة وشدة العبودية.

languages.coptic: achemci qen nieynoc ouoh m~pecjemm~ton: ouon niben e~t[oji n~cwc autahoc qen y~m/] n~n/ethojhej m~moc.
languages.english: She dwells among the Gentiles; she finds no rest. All who pursue her overtake her in the midst of her distress.
languages.arabic: سكنت بين الأمم ولم تجد راحة. قد أدركها جميع مضطهديها بين المضايق.

languages.coptic: Nimwit n~te Ciwn erh/bi je m~mon peyn/ou e~h~r/i e~pisai: necpul/ t/rou cetak/out. Necou/b cefi~ahom: necparyenoc ce[wrem n~cwou ouoh n~yoc ecm~bon n~q~r/i n~q/tc.
languages.english: "The roads of Zion mourn, because no one comes to the feast. All her gates are destroyed, her priests groan, her virgins are led away, and she is embittered in herself.
languages.arabic: كل طرق صهيون نائحة لعدم الآتين إلى العيد. جميع أبوابها متهدمة. كهنتها متنهدون وعذاراها مسبية وهى مغشية بالمرارة.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Covoniac pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Zephaniah the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من صفونيا النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Nai n/e~te P[oic jw m~moc: je qen pic/ou e~tem~mau ]naw~li e~bolharo n~nimetref]sws n~te pesws:
languages.english: [Thus says the Lord:] In that day, For at that time I will take away from you the contempt of your arrogance,
languages.arabic: يقول الرب. فى ذلك اليوم أنزع من بيتك المرحين معك بتكبر.

languages.coptic: Ouoh n~neouah to] je e~je metqerouw e~jen patwou eyouab.
languages.english: And you shall no longer be haughty upon My holy mountain.
languages.arabic: فلا تعودين تستعلى بكبرياء قلبك فى جبل قدسى.

languages.coptic: Ouoh ]nacwjp nqr/i n~q/t n~oulaoc n~remraus ouoh efyebi/out: ouoh eerhw] qat~h/ m~P[oic:
languages.english: And I will leave among you a gentle and humble people, who will show reverence to the name of the Lord.
languages.arabic: وأبقى فى وسطك شعباً وديعاً ومتواضعاً فيتوكلون على أسم الرب.

languages.coptic: N~je nicwjp n~te p~iIcra/l ouoh n~noui~ri n~ou[i n~jonc oude n~noucaji n~hanmete~v~l/ou ouoh n~noujimi n~oulac n,rof qen rwou:
languages.english: The remnant of Israel will not commit unrighteousness nor speak vanities; neither will a deceitful tongue be found in their mouth;
languages.arabic: بقية اسرائيل لا يفعلون أثماً. ولا ينطقون بالكذب. ولا يوجد فى أفواههم لسان غش.

languages.coptic: Je ou/i n~ywou eue~moni ouoh euenkot ouoh n~nefswpi n~je v/eyna]hot nwou.
languages.english: For they will feed and lie down, and there will be no one terrifying them.
languages.arabic: لأنهم يرعون ويضطجعون وليس من يذعرهم.

languages.coptic: Rasi tseri n~Ciwn: yel/l p~Icra/l ounof ouoh erouot e~bol qen peh/t t/rc t~seri n~Ieroucal/m:
languages.english: Rejoice greatly, O daughter of Zion! Cry aloud, O daughter of Jerusalem! Be glad and rejoice with your whole heart, O daughter of Jerusalem!
languages.arabic: أفرحى يا إبنة صهيون تهلل يا اسرائيل. أفرحى وأبتهجى من كل قلبك يا إبنة أورشليم.

languages.coptic: Afw~li gar n~je P[oic n~ne[in~jonc afcot] e~bol qen nenjij n~nejaji:
languages.english: The Lord has taken away your iniquities and ransomed you from your enemies.
languages.arabic: لأن الرب قد رفع عنك الظلم. وخلصك من يد أعدائك.

languages.coptic: Fnaerouro n~je P[oic qen tekm/] pIcra/l: n~neknau e~hanpethwou je.
languages.english: The Lord, the King of Israel, is in your midst; you will no longer see any evil.
languages.arabic: الرب يملك اسرائيل فى وسطك فلا ترين بعد شراً.

languages.coptic: Qen pic/ou de e~tem~mau efe~joc n~je P[oic n~Ieroucal/m je jemnom] Ciwn m~peny~rou bwl e~bol n~je nejij:
languages.english: At that time the Lord shall say to Jerusalem, "O Zion, be of good courage; do not let your hands grow slack.
languages.arabic: فى ذلك اليوم يقول الرب لاورشليم. لا تخافى يا صهيون ولا تسترخ يداك.

languages.coptic: P[oic Pennou] oujwr pe nqr/i n~q/]: f~natoujo efe~i~ni n~ounof e~h~r/i e~jw ouoh efeai] m~beri: qen tefa~gap/ ouoh efe~ounof m~mof e~h~r/i e~jw
languages.english: The Lord your God is with you. The Mighty One shall save you. He shall bring gladness upon you and will renew you with His love.
languages.arabic: الرب إلهك فى وسطك جبار فهو يخلصك. ويسكب عليك الفرح.

languages.coptic: Qen ourwoutf m~v~r/] qen oue~hoou n~sai.
languages.english: He will delight over you with Joy as in a day of feasting.
languages.arabic: ويجددك فى محبته. ويبتهج بك متهللاً كما فى يوم عيد.

languages.coptic: Ouoh eieywou] n/etqomqem n~teouoh nim petaf[i n~ousws e~h~r/i e~jwc.
languages.english: I shall gather together your broken ones. Alas! who has taken up a reproach against her?
languages.arabic: وأبناءك المتفرقين أجمعهم لئلا يكون لك عار عليهم.

languages.coptic: H/ppe a~nok ]nai~ri n~q/] eyb/] qen pic/ou e~tem~mau peje P[oci ouoh ]natoujo n~y/e~taut~hemkocj:
languages.english: "Behold, at that time I will act among you for your sake," says the Lord. "I will save the oppressed and welcome those being rejected.
languages.arabic: هأنذا فى ذلك اليوم أقتل جميع الذين أحزنوك يقول الرب. فى ذلك الوقت أنجى التى ضايقوها. وأقبل إلى التى طردوها,

languages.coptic: Ouoh y/etauhitc e~bol ]nasopc e~roi ouoh ]nakau eusousou euoi n~onomatoc qen p~kahi t/rf.
languages.english: I will make them a praise and renowned throughout the whole earth.
languages.arabic: وأجعل بنيها فى مجد. فيكون لهم أسم فى كل الأرض.

languages.coptic: Ouoh eue~[isipi qen pic/ou e~tem~mau e~swp aisanerpeynanef nwten nem qen pic/ou hotan aisansepy/nou e~roi ou/i ]na]y/nou e~retenoi n~onomatoc:
languages.english: And they shall be put to shame in that day when I do well with you, at the time when I shall receive you,
languages.arabic: ويخزى فى ذلك الحين أعداؤك. لما أحسن عليكم وأقبلكم إلى.

languages.coptic: Ouoh n~sousou qen nilaoc t/rou n~te pkahi qen p~jinyritacyo n~tetene,malwcia~ m~petenm~yo peje P[oic.
languages.english: for I will make you praised and renowned among all the peoples of the earth when I return your captivity," says the Lord.
languages.arabic: فأنى أعطيكم أسماً ومجداً فى كل شعوب الأرض. عند ما أرد سبيكم أمام عيونكم يقول الرب.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen rwou n~hankouji n~a~lwoui~: nem n/eyouem[i akcebte pic~mou: eybe nekjaji e~p~jin]ouw~ n~oujaji nem ouref[i m~p~sis.
languages.english: From the mouths of babes and nursing infants You prepared praise because of Your enemies, that You may destroy the enemy and avenger.
languages.arabic: من أفواه الأطفال والرضعان هيأت سبحاً. من أجل أعدائك لتهدِ عدواً ومنتقماً.

languages.coptic: Je ]nanau e~niv/oui nih~b/oui~ n~tenekt/b: piioh nem niciou n~yok akhicen] m~mwou: all/louia.
languages.english: For I shall look at the heavens, the works of Your fingers, the moon and stars You established. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: لأنى أرى السموات أعمال أصابعك القمر والنجوم أنت أسستها. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Matyeon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Matthew. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار متى البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Ouoh e~tafi~ e~qoun e~ Ieroucal/m acmonmen n~je ]baki t/rc eujw m~moc je nim pe vai.
languages.english: And when He had come into Jerusalem, all the city was moved, saying, "Who is this?"
languages.arabic: ولما دخل أورشليم إرتجت المدينة كلها قائلة من هذا.

languages.coptic: Nim/s de naujw m~moc je vai pe pip~rov/t/c I/couc piremnazarey n~te ]galilia~:
languages.english: So the multitudes said, "This is Jesus, the prophet from Nazareth of Galilee."
languages.arabic: فقالت الجموع هذا هو يسوع النبي الذي من ناصرة الجليل.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afsenaf n~je I/c e~qoun e~piervei ouoh afhioui~ e~bol n~ouonniben et] e~bolqen piervei nem n/etswp ouoh n~trapeza n~te nireferkerma afvonjou nem nikayedra n~te n~/et][rompi e~bol.
languages.english: Then Jesus went into the temple of God and drove out all those who bought and sold in the temple, and overturned the tables of the money changers and the seats of those who sold doves.
languages.arabic: فدخل يسوع إلى الهيكل. وأخرج جميع الذين كانوا يبيعون ويشترون فى الهيكل وقلب موائد الصيارفة وكراسي باعة الحمام.

languages.coptic: Ouoh pejaf nwou je c~c~q/out je Pa/i eue~mou] e~rof je ou/i m~p~roceu,/ n~ywten de teteni~ri m~mof m~man,wp nconi.
languages.english: And He said to them, "It is written, 'My house shall be called a house of prayer, but you have made it a den of thieves.'"
languages.arabic: وقال لهم مكتوب أن بيتي بيت الصلاة يدعى وأنتم جعلتموه مغارة لصوص.

languages.coptic: Ouoh e~taui~ harof n~je hanbelleu nem han[a~leu qen piervei ouoh afervaqri e~rwou.
languages.english: Then the blind and the lame came to Him in the temple, and He healed them.
languages.arabic: وتقدم إليه عمي وعرج فى الهيكل فشفاهم.

languages.coptic: E~taunau de n~je niar,/e~reuc nem nicaq n~nis~v/ri e~tafaitou nem nia~lwoui~ etws e~bol qen piervei eujw m~moc je w~canna p~s/ri n~Dauid au,~remrem.
languages.english: But when the chief priests and scribes saw the wonderful things that He did, and the children crying out in the temple and saying, "Hosanna to the Son of David!" they were indignant.
languages.arabic: فلما رأى رؤساء الكهنة والكتبة العجائب التي صنعها. والصبيان يصيحون فى الهيكل ويقولون أوصنا لإبن داود تقمقموا.

languages.coptic: Ouoh pejwou naf je k~cwtem an je oupete nai jw m~mof: I/couc de pejaf nwou je ce m~petenws e~neh qen nigrav/ je e~bolqen rwou n~hankouji n~a~lwoui~ nem n/eyouem[i akcebte pic~mou.
languages.english: And said to Him, "Do You hear what these are saying?" And Jesus said to them, "Yes. Have you never read, 'Out of the mouth of babes and nursing infants You have perfected praise'?"
languages.arabic: وقالوا له أما تسمع ما يقول هؤلاء. فقال لهم يسوع نعم. أما قرأتم قط فى الكتب أن من أفواه الأطفال والرضعان هيأت سبحاً.

languages.coptic: Ouoh e~taf,au afi~ cabol n~]baki e~B/ya~nia~ ouoh afenkot m~mau.
languages.english: Then He left them and went out of the city to Bethany, and He lodged there.
languages.arabic: ثم تركهم وخرج خارج المدينة إلى بيت عنيا وبات هناك.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Ninth Hour of Hosanna Sunday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة التاسعة، من يوم أحد الشعانين من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: O come all of you today, O blessed, pious, Christian, church-loving people;
languages.arabic: هلموا كلكم اليوم أيها الشعب المبارك، الدينين، النصارى ، المحبين للكنيسة.

languages.english: Let us glorify the One God, who, in this week received the sufferings on our behalf for the salvation of our father Adam and our mother Eve, the mother of all the living.
languages.arabic: لنمجد الله الواحد الذي قبل الآلام عنا فى هذه الجمعه، لأجل خلاص آدم أبونا وأمنا حواء أم جميع الأحياء.

languages.english: On this day, the Lord entered Jerusalem, together with His disciples. And when He entered, all the city was moved and shaken, saying, "Who is this?"
languages.arabic: فى هذا اليوم دخل الرب إلى أورشليم وتلاميذه، فلما دخل أرتجت وتزعزعت المدينة كلها قائلين: من هذا؟

languages.english: And the great multitudes said, this is the great prophet from Nazareth.
languages.arabic: فكان الجمع الكبير يقولون: هذا هو النبى العظيم الذي من الناصرة.

languages.english: Then the blind and the lame came to Him, and He healed them all, and all the children cried out saying, "Hosanna to the Son of David!"
languages.arabic: وتقدم إليه العميان والعرج فشفاهم جميعاً، والأطفال كلهم صرخوا قائلين: أوصنا لأبن داود.

languages.english: But when the chief priests saw it, they murmured saying, what shall we do?
languages.arabic: فلما رأى رؤساء الكهنة هذا ندموا وقالوا: ماذا نصنع؟

languages.english: And Jesus said to them, "Yes. Have you never read in the scripture, 'Out of the mouth of babes and nursing infants You have perfected praise'?"
languages.arabic: فقال لهم المخلص: نعم ما قرأتم الآن فى الكتب، أن من أفواه الأطفال والرضعان هيأت سبحاً؟!

languages.english: When the infidel and treacherous Jews heard this, they all took counsel to kill Him.
languages.arabic: فلما سمعوا اليهود المرد هذا, تشاوروا جميعاً لكى يقتلوه.

title.english: The Liturgy of Blessing of the Water of Great Thursday

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pjom n~}genecic n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Genesis of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر التکوين لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.english: Then God appeared to him at the oak of Mamre, as he was sitting in the tent door during the noon hour.
languages.arabic: وظهر الرب لإبراهيم عند شجرة ممرا وهو جالس على باب خيمته وقت الظهيرة،

languages.english: So he lifted his eyes and looked, and behold, three men stood before him; and when he saw them, he ran from the tent door to meet them, and bowed himself to the ground, and said, “Lord, if I have now found grace in Your sight, do not pass by Your servant. Let water be brought, and let them wash Your feet, while You cool Yourselves under the tree.
languages.arabic: فرفع عينيه ونظر، وإذا ثلاثة رجال واقفون لديه. فلما نظرهم ركض لإستقبالهم من باب الخيمة وسجد على الأرض وقال: يا سيدي إن كنت قد وجدت نعمة لديك فلا تتجاوز عبدك، فليؤخذ قليل ماء واغسلوا أرجلكم ثم استريحوا تحت الشجرة.

languages.english: And I will bring bread for You to eat. After that You may pass by, inasmuch as You have come to Your servant.” They said, “Do as you have said: So Abraham hurried into the tent to Sarah and said, “Quickly, make ready three measures of fine meal; knead it and make cakes."
languages.arabic: فنأخذ خبزاً وتأكلون، وبعد هذا تمضوا لأنكم قد مررتم على عبدكم. فقالوا: افعل هكذا كما قلت. فأسرع إبراهيم إلى الخيمة، إلى سارة وقال لها: اسرعى واعجنى ثلاث مكاييل واصنعيها خبز ملة.

languages.english: Then Abraham ran to the herd, took a young calf, tender and good, gave it to his servant, and he hastened to prepare it. He also took butter and milk and the calf he prepared, and set it before them; and he stood by, them under the tree as they ate.
languages.arabic: ثم ركض إبراهيم إلى ابقاره وأخذ عجلاً رخصاً حسناً وأعطاه لغلمانه ليعملوه طعاماً، ثم أخذ زبداً ولبناً، والعجل الذي عمله ووضعه قدامهم وأكلوا بينما كان هو واقفاً تحت الشجرة.

languages.english: Then He said to him, “Where is Sarah your wife?” He replied, “Here, in the tent.” Again He said, “I will certainly return to you according to the time of life, and behold, Sarah your wife shall have a son.” (Sarah was listening in the tent door behind him.)
languages.arabic: وقالوا له: أين سارة إمرأتك؟ أما هو فأجاب قائلاً: ها هى داخل الخباء. فقال: إنى أرجع إليك فى هذا الزمن من العام المقبل ويكون لسارة إمرأتك إبن. فسمعت سارة وهى عند باب الخيمة من خلفه،

languages.english: Now Abraham and Sarah were old, well advanced in age; and Sarah had passed the age of childbearing. Therefore Sarah laughed within herself, saying, “I have not yet had a child until now, and my lord is old also?”
languages.arabic: وكان إبراهيم وسارة شيخين متقدمين فى أيامهما وقد انقطع ان يكون لسارة كما للنساء، فضحكت سارة فى نفسها قائلة: أيكون لى هذا الآن وقد شاخ سيدى؟

languages.english: Then the Lord said to Abraham, “Why did, Sarah laugh within herself, saying, `Shall I surely bear a child, since I am old?’ Is anything impossible with God? At the appointed time I will return to you, according to the time of life, and Sarah shall have a son.”
languages.arabic: فقال الرب لإبراهيم: لماذا ضحكت سارة فى نفسها قائلة اترى بالحقيقة ألد وأنا قد شخت؟. هل يستحيل على الله شئ؟ فى مثل هذا الزمان ارجع إليك فى العام المقبل ويكون لسارة إبن،

languages.english: But Sarah denied she had laughed, for she was afraid, saying; “I did not laugh”; but He said, “No, but you did laugh.”
languages.arabic: فانكرت سارة قائلة: لم أضحك، لأنها خافت. فقال: لا بل ضحكت.

languages.english: Then the men rose from there and looked toward Sodom and Gomorrah, and Abraham went along and escorted them on their journey.
languages.arabic: ثم قام الرجال من هناك وتطلعوا نحو سدوم وعامورة، وكان إبراهيم ماشياً معهم ليشيعهم.

languages.english: Then the Lord said, “Shall I hide from Abraham, My servant, what I am about to do? But Abraham shall surely become a great and populous nation, and in him all the nations of the earth shall be blessed.
languages.arabic: فقال الرب: هل أخفى ما أنا فاعله عن عبدى إبراهيم، وإبراهيم يكون أمة عظيمة وكثيرة وتتبارك به جميع أمم الأرض.

languages.english: For I know he will order his sons and his house after him. They will keep the way of the Lord, to do righteousness and judgment, that the Lord may bring upon Abraham what He has spoken to him.”
languages.arabic: لأنى علمت أنه يوصى بنيه وبيته من بعده فيحفظوا طرق الرب، ليعملوا براً وعدلاً لكى يعمل الرب لإبراهيم بما تكلم به معه.

languages.english: Then the Lord said, “The outcry against Sodom and Gomorrah has been completed, and their sins are exceedingly great. Therefore, I will go down now and see whether or not they are carrying out the outcry coming to Me concerning them.”
languages.arabic: فقال الرب: إن صراخ سدوم وعاموره قد كثر وخطاياهم عظيمة جداً. إنى أنزل لأعرف هل صراخها الأتى إلىّ قد كمل أم لا.

languages.english: Then the men turned away from there and went toward Sodom, but Abraham remained before the Lord. So Abraham drew near and said, “Would You also destroy the righteous with the ungodly?
languages.arabic: وأنصرف الرجال من هناك وذهبوا نحو سدوم، وأما إبراهيم فكان لم يزل واقفاً أمام الرب. فاقترب إبراهيم وقال للرب: لا تهلك البار مع الأثيم، فيكون الصديق مثل المنافق.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pidoxodoc n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Exodus of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر الخروج لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.english: When Israel crossed the Red Sea, they walked through dry ground in the midst of the sea, and their enemies went into the sea; and the Lord brought upon them the water of the sea.
languages.arabic: حينما عبر اسرائيل البحر الأحمر، وداست أرجلهم البحر، انطمس اعداءهم فى العمق، وانغمست أرجل العساكر فى الماء قسراً،

languages.english: Israel and all the house of Jacob were saved. They danced and sang this song: Let us sing to the Lord, for He is greatly glorified.
languages.arabic: وأما أرجل اسرائيل وجميع بيت يعقوب رفعت ونجوا من الهلاك. وقالوا هذه التسبحة: فلنسبح الرب لأنه بالمجد قد تمجد.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.english: A reading from Joshua, son of Nun, the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من يشوع بن نون النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.english: Joshua and all the people went over Jordan, they treaded on stones that were immersed in the water. Their feet strengthened and they defeated their enemies.
languages.arabic: يشوع وكافة الشعب عبروا الأردن ووطئت أرجلهم الحجارة التى فى المياه فتوثقت أمامهم وأهلكوا أعدائهم.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen ?ca/~ac pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Isaiah the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
