languages.english: So His disciples went out, and came into the city and found it just as He had said to them; and they prepared the Passover.
languages.arabic: فخرج التلميذان وأتيا إلى المدينة فوجدا كما قال لهما. وأعدا الفصح.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Sixth Hour of Thursday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة السادسة من يوم الخميس من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: Listen O Israel to the voice of Adonai the Lord Almighty; let everyone purge himself of his sins and iniquities for you have maculated my holy name with your idol and your perfid deeds.
languages.arabic: اسمعوا قول الرب يا آل اسرائيل، قال أدوناى الرب ضابط الكل: ليبتعد كل واحد منكم عن شروره وآثامه، فإنكم نجستم اسمى القدوس بأوثانكم وأعمالكم الخبيثة.

languages.english: Then I will accept you on my holy mountain and you shall worship me in that place.
languages.arabic: وأنا أقبلكم على جبل قدسى وتعبدوننى فى ذلك الموضع.

languages.english: I will be sanctified in you and will raise you above all nations.
languages.arabic: وأتقدس فيكم وأرفعكم عند جميع الأمم.

languages.english: And you will know that I am the Lord God and that there is no other gods in heaven and earth.
languages.arabic: وتعلمون إننى أنا هو الرب وليس إله آخر غيرى.

languages.english: The seas and everything that lives therein worship me. All are under my dominion and seek mercy from me.
languages.arabic: والسمائيون والأرضيون والبحار وسائر ما فيها تتعبد لى وهى كلها تحت سلطانى تتوقع الرحمة التى من قبلى.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pjom n~}genecic n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Genesis of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر التکوين لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Acswpi de menenca naicaji nare Vnou] [wnt n~Abraam pe ouoh pejaf naf: jeAbraam Abraam: n~yof de pejaf je h/ppe a~nok:
languages.english: Now it came to pass after these things that God tested Abraham, and said to him, "Abraham! Abraham!" And he said, "Here I am."
languages.arabic: وحدث بعد هذه الأمور أن الله امتحن إبراهيم وقال له: يا إبراهيم يا إبراهيم. فقال: هانذا.

languages.coptic: Pejaf naf je [i m~peks/rim~menrit v/e~takmenritf I~caak: a~mou e~jen pikahi et[oci ouoh a~nitf n/i m~maun~ou[lil: hijen ouai nnitwou e~]natamok e~rof:
languages.english: Then He said, "Take now your beloved son, Isaac, whom you love, and go to the land of Moriah, and offer him there as a whole burnt offering on one of the mountains I tell you."
languages.arabic: قال له: خذ إبنك الحبيب الذي تحبه اسحق وامض إلى الأرض المرتفعة واصعده لى هناك محرقة على أحد الجبال التى أريك.

languages.coptic: Aftwnf n~je Abraam n~hana~tooui~: ouoh afqwk n~tefe~w: af[i de n~a~lou c~nau nemaf: nem I~caak pefs/ri: afveqnirwkh m~p[lil aftwnf afsenaf afi~e~pima e~ta Vnou] joc naf.
languages.english: So Abraham rose early in the morning and saddled his donkey; and took two of his young men with him, and Isaac his son; and he split firewood for the whole burnt offering, and arose and went to the place God told him.
languages.arabic: فقام إبراهيم مبكراً واسرج اتانه. وأخذ إثنين من غلمانه معه، واسحق إبنه وشقق حطب المحرقة. وقام ومضى إلى الموضع الذي قال له الله.

languages.coptic: Ouoh qen pie~hoou m~mah somt afjoust e~p~swi n~nefbal n~je Abraam: afnau e~pima hiv~ouei:
languages.english: Then on the third day Abraham lifted his eyes and saw the place afar off.
languages.arabic: وفى اليوم الثالث رفع إبراهيم عينيه فأبصر المكان من بعيد.

languages.coptic: Peje Abraam n~nefa~lwoui~: je hemci m~paima nem ]e~w a~nok de nem pia~lou tennasenansa m~nai: ouoh ansan ouwst tennatacyon harwten:
languages.english: Thus Abraham said to his young men, "Stay here with the donkey; the lad and I will go yonder and worship, and we will come back to you."
languages.arabic: فقال إبراهيم لغلاميه: إجلسا أنتما ههنا مع الآتٍان وأنا والغلام نمضى إلى هناك فنسجد ونرجع إليكما.

languages.coptic: Af[i de n~je Abraam n~nirwkh n~te pi[lil: aftalwou e~jen I~caak pefs/ri: af[i de m~pi,~rwm qen tefjijnem ]ma,era: ausenwou m~p~c~nau eucop.
languages.english: So Abraham took the firewood of the whole burnt offering and laid it on Isaac his son. Then he took the fire in his hand, and a knife, and the two of them went together.
languages.arabic: فأخذ إبراهيم حطب المحرقة وحمله اسحق إبنه. وأخذ بيده النار والسكين وذهبا كلاهما معاً

languages.coptic: Peje I~caak n~Abraam pefiwt: je paiwt:n~yof de pejaf je ou pe pas/ri:
languages.english: Then Isaac spoke to Abraham his father and said, "My father." And he said, "Here I am, my son."
languages.arabic: وقال اسحق لإبراهيم أبيه: يا أبى. فقال: ماذا تقول يا إبنى.

languages.coptic: Pejaf je h/ppe ic pi,r~wm nem nirwkh: afyw npie~cwou e~tou naenf e~p~[~lil.
languages.english: Then he said, "Look, the fire and the firewood, but where is the sheep for a whole burnt offering?"
languages.arabic: قال: هوذا النار والحطب فأين الحمل الذي يقدم للمحرقة؟

languages.coptic: Peje Abraam de: je e~re Vnou] n/ou naf n~oue~cwou e~p~[~lil pas/ri: naumosi de m~p~c~nau eucop.
languages.english: And Abraham said, "My son, God will provide for Himself the sheep for a whole burnt offering." So the two of them went together.
languages.arabic: فقال إبراهيم: ان الله يأتى له بحمل للمحرقة يا إبنى. ومضيا كلاهما معاً.

languages.coptic: Aui~ e~pima eta Vnou] joc naf: ouoh afkwt m~mau n~je Abraam n~ouman~erswousi: aftalo n~nirwkh e~h~r/i e~jof:
languages.english: They came to the place where God had told him. And Abraham built an altar there and placed the firewood in order;
languages.arabic: فلما وصلا إلى المكان الذي قال له الله عنه بنى هناك إبراهيم مذبحاً ورفع عليه الحطب.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afcwnh n~I~caak pefs/ri: aftalof e~jen piman~erswousi cap~swi n~nirwkh.
languages.english: And he bound Isaac his son hand and foot and laid him on the altar, upon the firewood.
languages.arabic: وأوثق اسحق إبنه ووضعه على المذبح فوق الحطب.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afcouten tefjij e~bol n~je Abraam: e~[i n~]jor] n~]ma,era: e~qolqel n~I~caak pefs/ri.
languages.english: Then Abraham stretched out his hand and took the knife to slay his son.
languages.arabic: ثم مد إبراهيم يده واخذ السكين ليذبح إبنه.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afmou] e~rof n~je ouaggeloc n~te P[oic e~bol qen tve: pejaf naf: jeAbraam Abraam n~yof de pejaf: je h/ppe a~nok.
languages.english: But the Angel of the Lord called to him from heaven and said, "Abraham! Abraham!" So he said, "Here I am." He then replied,
languages.arabic: فناداه ملاك الرب من السماء وقال إبراهيم إبراهيم. فقال هانذا.

languages.coptic: Pejaf naf je m~peren tekjij e~jen pia~lou: oude m~perer h~li naf: ]nou gar aie~mi je akerho] qath/ m~Vnou] n~yok: ouoh m~pek]a~co e~peks/ri m~menrit eyb/t.
languages.english: "Do not lay your hand on the lad, or do anything to him, for now I know you fear God, since for My sake you have not spared your beloved son."
languages.arabic: فقال لا تمد يدك الى الغلام ولا تفعل به شيئا. لاني الآن علمت انك خائف الله فلم تمسك إبنك وحيدك عني.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afjoust n~je Abraam n~nefbalafnau: h/ppe ic oue~cwou eutahno m~mof qen neftap:
languages.english: Then Abraham lifted his eyes and looked, and there behind him a ram was caught in a thicket by its horns.
languages.arabic: فرفع إبراهيم عينيه ونظر واذا كبش وراءه ممسكا في الغابة بقرنيه.

languages.coptic: Qen ous~s/n je cabek: afsenaf n~je Abraam af[i m~pie~cwou: ouoh afenf e~h~r/i n~ou[lil: e~v~ma I~caak pefs/ri. Ouoh a~Abaam ]ren v~ran m~pima e~te m~mau: je P[oic afouonhf haroi hijen paitwou.
languages.english: So he brought it for a whole burnt offering in the place of his son. Thus Abraham called the name of the place The-Lord-Has-Appeared; as it is said to this day, "In the mountain the Lord was seen."
languages.arabic: واصعده محرقة عوضاً عن اسحق إبنه. وسمى إبراهيم اسم ذلك الموضع، الرب تراءى لى على هذا الجبل.

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~ouaggeloc n~te P[oic mou] e~Abraam m~v~mah cop c~nau: e~bolqen t~ve Efjw m~moc je aiwrk m~moi peje P[oic: je e~v~ma je aki~ri m~pacaji: m~pek]a~coe~peks/ri m~menrit eyb/t.
languages.english: Then the Angel of the Lord called to Abraham a second time out of heaven, and said, "By Myself I have sworn, says the Lord, because you did this thing, and for My sake did not spare your beloved son.
languages.arabic: ونادى ملاك الرب إبراهيم مرة ثانية من السماء قائلاً: انى أقسمت بذأتى يقول الرب. بما انك عملت كلامى ولم تشفق على إبنك الحبيب من أجلى

languages.coptic: Qen ouc~mou eie~c~mou e~rok ouoh qen ouasai eie~y~re pekjroja~sai: m~v~r/] n~niciou n~te tve: nem pisw etqaten nenc~votou m~v~iom: ouoh e~repekjroj naerk~l/ronomin n~nibaki n~te n/et ]oub/k.
languages.english: I will certainly bless you, and assuredly multiply your seed as the stars of heaven and as the sand on the seashore; and your seed shall inherit the cities of their enemies.
languages.arabic: لاباركنك تبريكاً وأكثرن نسلك تكثيراً كنجوم السماء. وكالرمل الذي على شاطئ البحر.

languages.coptic: Eue~[ic~mou n~q~r/i n~q/tk n~jenis~lol t/rou n~te p~kahi: e~v~ma je akcwtem e~tac~m/.
languages.english: In your seed all the nations of the earth shall be blessed, because you obeyed My voice."
languages.arabic: ويرث نسلك مدن مضايقيك وتتبارك بك جميع قبائل الأرض من أجل إنك سمعت لقولى.

languages.coptic: Afkotf n~je Abraam hanefa~lwoui~: autwounou ausenwou eucop e~jen tsw] m~pia~nas.
languages.english: So Abraham returned to his servants, and they rose and went together to the Well of Oath; and Abraham dwelt at the Well of Oath.
languages.arabic: ثم رجع إبراهيم إلى غلاميه. فقاموا وانصرفوا معاً إلى بئر الحلف (بئر سبع ).

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen ?ca/~ac pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Isaiah the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من إشعياء النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Oup~neuma n~te P[oic et,/ hijwi: Eybe vai afyahct e~hisennoufi n~nih/ki:
languages.english: "The Spirit of the Lord is upon Me, because of which He anointed Me. He sent Me to proclaim good news to the poor,
languages.arabic: روح الرب علىّ. لذلك مسحنى لأبشر المساكين.

languages.coptic: Afouorpte~tal[o n~n/etqomqem qen pouh/t: e~hiwis n~nie,malwtoc n~ou,w e~bol: nem ounaum~bol n~nibelleu.
languages.english: To heal the brokenhearted, to preach liberty to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind;
languages.arabic: وأرسلنى لأشفى المنكسرى القلوب وأبشر المسبيين بالعتق والعمى بالبصر.

languages.coptic: E~mou] n~ourompi ecs/p m~P[oic: nem oue~hoou n~]sebiw: e~]nom]n~ouon niben e~terh/bi.
languages.english: To declare the acceptable year of the Lord, the day of recompense, and to comfort all who mourn;
languages.arabic: لانادى بسنة مقبولة للرب وبيوم المجازاة. وأعزى جميع النائحين.

languages.coptic: E~]w~ou n~n/eterh/bi e~Ciwn n~tsebiw~ n~nikermi: ouywhc n~teouounof n/e~terh/bi: nem oukatac~tol/ n~te ouw~ou: n~t~sebiw~ n~oupna n~mkahn~n/t:
languages.english: To give those who mourn in Zion glory instead of ashes, the oil of gladness to those who mourn; the garment of glory instead of a spirit of indifference.
languages.arabic: وأعطى مجداً لنائحي صهيون عوضاً عن الرماد. ودهن فرح للنائحين. وحلة مجد بدل روح كآبة القلب.

languages.coptic: Eue~mou] e~rwou je ]genea~ n~te niy~m/i: ou[o n~te P[oic ouw~ou.
languages.english: They shall be called generations of righteousness, the planting of the Lord for glory.
languages.arabic: فيدعون جيل الأبرار وغرس الرب الممجد.

languages.coptic: Ouoh eue~kwt n~hansafeu n~e~neh n/e~tauswf n~sorp eue~tounocou: hanbaki n~safeu eue~aitou m~beri: e~auswf icjen nigenea~.
languages.english: They shall build the ancient deserts, raise up those formerly abandoned, and renew the desert cities that laid waste for generations.
languages.arabic: ويبنون خرب الدهر ويشيدون ما دمر منذ القدم ويجددون المدن الموحشة التى خربت منذ أجيال

languages.coptic: Ouoh eue~i~ n~je niallogen/c eue~a~moni n~nou e~cwou: niallovuloc eue~swpi nwou n~refc~,ai ouoh n~[m/.
languages.english: Foreigners shall come and shepherd your sheep, and aliens shall be your plowmen and vinedressers;
languages.arabic: ويأتى الغرباء ويرعون غنمهم. والقبائل الغريبة يكونون لهم حراثين وكرامين.

languages.coptic: N~ywten de eue~mou] e~rwten jeniou/b n~te P[oic: nem nirefsemsi n~te Vnou]:
languages.english: but you shall be called priests of the Lord and the ministers of God.
languages.arabic: أما أنتم فتدعون كهنة الرب وخدام الله.

languages.coptic: Tjom n~nieynoc e~reten ouomc: ouoh qenoumetramao eue~ers~v/ri m~mwten.
languages.english: You shall eat the strength of nations and be admired because of their wealth.
languages.arabic: وتأكلون قوة الأمم ومن الغنى يتعجبون منكم ويتلاشى حزنكم وخزيكم

languages.coptic: Eue~yebio n~je netennehpi nem peten sws: e~reten erk~l/ronomin efm/n e~bolqen poukahi: e~reten[i m~poumeroc: efe~ swpi nwten n~je ourasi.
languages.english: So they shall inherit the land a second time, and eternal gladness shall be upon their head.
languages.arabic: وتنالون وترثون دائماً فى أرضهم. وتأخذون نصيبهم. ويكون لكم فرح.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Iwb piy~m/i: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Job the righteous, may his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من أيوب الصديق بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: F~onq n~je P[oic v/e~taf ]hap eroi m~pair/]: nem pipantokratwr v/e~taf]m~kahn~ta'u,/: je hoc on e~re panifi sop n~q/t: ouoh oup~neuma e~fouab e~ti ef,/ qen pasai.
languages.english: "As the Lord lives who thus judges me, And the Almighty who embittered my soul, Surely as long as my breath is in me and the divine breath is in my nostrils,
languages.arabic: حى هو الرب الذي حكم علىَّ هكذا والضابط الكل الذي أحزن نفسى أنه ما دامت نسمتى فىَّ وروح قُدُس فى أنفى

languages.coptic: N~ne nac~votou je oucaji n~a~nomon: oude ta'u,/ n~nec ermeletan n~han[in~joc.
languages.english: My lips will not speak lawless things, Nor shall my soul practice wrongdoings.
languages.arabic: لن تنطق شفتاى إثماً ولا تتلو نفسى ظلماً.

languages.coptic: N~necswpi n/i: e~y~rijoc je n~ywten hany~m/i sa]nou: n~na,w gar n~cwi n~tametatkakia~.
languages.english: May it not be I who set forth the opinion that you are righteous. Until the day I die, I will not put away my integrity from me.
languages.arabic: حاشاى أن أقول أنكم أبرار إلى الآن، ولن أقلع عن كمالى.

languages.coptic: Eie~]h~y/i de e~]meym/i ouoh n~na,arwi: ]cwoun gar m~moi an e~erh~li m~pethwou ie [in~jonc: m~mon de.
languages.english: I hold fast to my righteousness and am not letting it go; for I am not conscious in myself of having done anything wrong.
languages.arabic: وقد تمسكت بالحق فلا أتركه عنى. ولست أعرف إني فعلت شيئاً من الشر أو الظلم.

languages.coptic: Alla najaji eue~er m~v~r/] m~v~ouwjp n~ni a~ceb/c: ouoh n/ettwoun m~mwou e~h~r/i e~jwi m~vr/] m~p~tako n~niparanomoc.
languages.english: "Surely not, but rather may my enemies be as the destruction of the ungodly, and those who rise up against me as the destruction of the lawless.
languages.arabic: بل أعدائي يصيرون مثل سقوط المنافقين والقائمون علىّ مثل هلاك مخالفى الناموس.

languages.coptic: Asgar te t~helpic m~pia~ceb/c je afa~moni n~totf: afsan ,ah~y/f e~P[oic. <araf~nanohem: ie f~nacwtem e~peftwbh n~je P[oic: ie acsani~ e~jwf n~je oua~nagk/:
languages.english: For what hope is there for an ungodly man that he holds to it? Will he trust in the Lord and be saved? Will the Lord hear his prayer when distress comes upon him?
languages.arabic: فأنه ما هو رجاء المنافق إذا صبر وتوكل على الرب. أتراه يخلص؟ أو يسمع الرب صلاتٍه؟ أو إذا أتى عليه ضيق،

languages.coptic: M/f~najem h~li m~parr/cia~ m~pefm~yo e~bol: ie afsanws oub/f: m/ f~nacwtem e~rof.
languages.english: Has he any confidence before Him, or will the Lord hear him when he calls on Him?
languages.arabic: هل يجد أى دالة أمامه؟ أو إذا صرخ إليه هل يسمعه؟

languages.coptic: A~lla a~nok ]natamwten: je oupet qen nenjij m~P[oic: ouoh n~naje meynoujn~n/e~te n~totf m~pipantokratwr:
languages.english: "But indeed, I will tell you what is the hand of the Lord. I will not lie concerning what is with the Almighty.
languages.arabic: بل إنى أعرفكم بما فى يدىّ الرب ولا أكذب بما هو عند الضابط الكل.

languages.coptic: H/ppe tetene~mi t/rou: je hanpetsouit.
languages.english: Behold therefore, all of you know You are adding vanity to vanity.
languages.arabic: هوذا كلكم تعلمون أنه باطل

languages.coptic: Vai pev~meroc m~pirwmi n~a~ceb/c e~bol hiten P[oic: pijvio~ de n~te nijwri efe~i~ e~h~r/i e~jwfe~bol hitotf m~pipantokratwr.
languages.english: "This is the portion from the Lord for the ungodly man, And the possession of oppressors Shall come upon them from the Almighty.
languages.arabic: هو نصيب الرجل المنافق من قبل الرب، وخزى الأقوياء يأتى عليه من قبل الضابط الكل.

languages.coptic: Ausan a~sai de n~je nefs/ri: eue~swpi e~p~qolqel:ouoh e~swp ausanjemnom]: eue~sat meynai.
languages.english: If their children be many, they will be for slaughter; And if they reach manhood, they will beg.
languages.arabic: إن كثر بنوه فيكونون للذبح وإذا إعتزوا يتسولون.

languages.coptic: N/ de etsop naf eue~mou e~v~mou:nou,/ra de n~neh~li nainwou.
languages.english: Those who survive him shall be buried in death, And no one will have pity on their widows.
languages.arabic: والباقون له موتاً يموتون. وأراملهم لا يرحمهم أحد.

languages.coptic: Auyouet hat m~v~r/] n~oukahi: aucob] de m~v~noubm~v~r/] n~ouo~mi. Nai t/rou niy~m/i eyna[itou: nef,r~/ma de hanremn~/i eue~a~monim~mwou.
languages.english: Though he gathers silver like dust and shall prepare gold like clay, The righteous will acquire these things, and the true ones will possess his wealth.
languages.arabic: جمعوا الفضة كالتراب. وأعدوا الذهب كالطين. هذه جميعها يأخذها الصديقون. ويرث أهل البيت أمواله.

languages.coptic: Pef/i de afswpi m~v~r/] n~hanholi nem m~v~r/] n~ouc~tajoul. Efe~enkot den~je ouramao: ouoh n~nefouahtotf efouwn n~nefbal ouoh fsop an.
languages.english: His house goes away like a moth and like a spider's web. The rich man will lie down and not continue; He opens his eyes, but is no more.
languages.arabic: بيته صار مثل العث ومثل خيوط العنكبوت. يضطجع الغنى ولا يعود. يفتح عينيه فلا يوجد.

languages.coptic: Aui e~qoune~h~raf n~je nim~kahn~h/t m~v~r/] n~oumwou qen oue~jwrh: je afolf n~je oug~novoc. Efe~olf n~je oukau con ouoh efe~senaf efe~sasaf e~bol qen peftopoc:
languages.english: Pains happen to him like a flood, And thick darkness takes him away in the night. A burning wind will take him up, and he will be gone; and it will scatter him from his place.
languages.arabic: دخلت عليه الأحزان كالمياه فى الليل فيحمله الضباب. ويأخذه العاصف فيذهب.

languages.coptic: Ouoh efe~borber eh~r/i e~jwf n~nef]a~coan: qen ouvwt efe~vwt e~bol qen nefjij. Efe~ ennefjij e~h~r/i e~jwf: ouoh efe~fw] e~bol m~mof e~bolqen pefma.
languages.english: It will blow against him and not spare; He will try in vain to flee from its force. It will strike him with its power, And whistle him from his place.
languages.arabic: ويقتلعه من مقره مهاناً منبوذاً ولا يشفق عليه. وهروباً يهرب من يديه، فيرفع يديه عليه ويستأصله من مكانه.

languages.coptic: F~sop gar an n~je oumam~pihat: v/e~tauyamio e~bol n~q/tf. Pibenipi men gar auyamio mmof e~bolqenp~kahi: pihomt de auerhwb e~rof m~v~r/] mp~iwn~i.
languages.english: Indeed, there is a place for silver, from whence it comes, and a place for gold, from whence it is refined. Certainly, iron is taken from the earth, and copper is hewn out like a stone.
languages.arabic: الموضع الذي استخرجوا منه الفضة لا يوجد. واستخرجوا الحديد من الأرض ومن الحجر يشغل النحاس.

languages.coptic: Afkw n~outaxic mpi,aki: ouohqaeu niben n~yof etqotqet mmwou:
languages.english: He set an order to darkness and examines accurately every limit.
languages.arabic: وضع للظلمة حداً. وهو يفحص فى كل طرف.

languages.coptic: Ouwini nem ou,aki etqen t~q/ibi m~v~mou.
languages.english: A stone is darkness and the shadow of death.
languages.arabic: على الحجر الذي فى الظلمة وظلال الموت،

languages.coptic: Ouswte~bol n~te ou,imaroc e~bolqen oukwnia~: n/ de e~terpwbs n~]meym/i auswni e~bolqen pirwmi.
languages.english: There is a narrow channel of the brook because of dust; So those who forget the right way are weakened because of mortal men.
languages.arabic: ويقطع جيراً من الوادى. والذين ينسون البر مرضوا من البشر.

languages.coptic: Pikahi ouwik efe~i~ e~bol m~mof: capec/t mmof afvwnh m~v~r/]n~ou,rwm. Ouman~oapviroc pe pefw~ni ouoh Pefkahi ounoub pe.
languages.english: As for the earth, from it will come bread, but underneath, it is turned up as by fire; its stones are the source of sapphires, and its dust contains gold.
languages.arabic: والأرض تأتى بالخبز. ينقلب أسفلها كما بالنار. حجارتها هى موضع الياقوت وترابها ذهب.

languages.coptic: Oumwit m~pehal/tcouwnf: ouoh mpefnau e~rof n~je v~bal nounoser.
languages.english: There is a path no bird knows, nor has the eye of a vulture seen it.
languages.arabic: سبيل لم يعرفه طير. ولم تنظره عين نسر.

languages.coptic: Ouoh m~pouhwmi hiwtf n~jehans/ri n~te hanmet[aci h/t: m~pefcini n~q/tf n~je oumoui~.
languages.english: The sons of the arrogant have not trodden it, nor has the lion passed over it.
languages.arabic: ولم يطأه بنو المتكبرين. ولم يعبره الأسد.

languages.coptic: Afcouten tefjije~bolqen oulakh: afouwjp de n~hantwou e~bolqen noucen].
languages.english: He has stretched forth his hand to quarry stones and has overturned the mountains by the roots.
languages.arabic: إلى الزاوية يمد يده ويهدم الجبال من أساساتها.

languages.coptic: Afvwnj de nt~jomn~te haniarwou: hwb de niben ettai/out aunau e~rof af[orpou: afouwnh den~tefjom euouwini.
languages.english: He has broken asunder the whirlpools of rivers, and my eye has seen every valued thing. He has uncovered the depths of the rivers and has brought his power to light.
languages.arabic: ويقلب قوة الأنهار. أظهر لهم كل فعل جليل رأته أعينهم. وكشف قوته نوراً.

languages.coptic: }covia~ de e~taujemcywn: aspe v~ma n~]e~ pictim/: m~mon rwmicwoun m~pimwit: oude n~noujemc qen nirwmi.
languages.english: "But where can wisdom be found? What is the place of understanding? Mortal man has not known its way, nor is it found among men.
languages.arabic: أما الحكمة فاين توجد؟ وأين مقر الفهم؟ لا يعرف الإنسان طريقها ولا وجود لها فى البشر.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: P[oic peyna a~moni m~moi: n~nefy~ri erqae~ n~h~li:
languages.english: The Lord is my shepherd: I shall not want.
languages.arabic: الرب يرعانى فلا يعوزنى شئ.

languages.coptic: Afy~riswpi qen ouma efouetouwt: afsanoust hijen v~mwou n~te p~emton: all/louia.
languages.english: He makes me to lie down in green pastures. He leads me beside the still waters: Alleluia.
languages.arabic: فى مكان خضرة أسكننى. على ماء الراحة ربانى. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Matyeon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Matthew. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار متى البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Nh~r/i de qen pie~hoou n~houit n~te niatkwb: aui~ n~je nimay/t/c ha I/couc eujw m~moc: je akouws e~cebte pipac,a nak ywn e~ouomf.
languages.english: Now on the first day of the Feast of the Unleavened Bread the disciples came to Jesus, saying to Him, "Where do You want us to prepare for You to eat the Passover?"
languages.arabic: وفى أول يوم من الفطير جاء التلاميذ إلى يسوع قائلين: أين تريد أن نعد لكَ الفصح لتأكله؟

languages.coptic: N~yof de pejaf nwou: je masenwtene~taibaki ha pav~man n~rwmi ouoh a~joc naf: je peje piref]c~bw je pac/ou afqwnt: ainai~ri papac,a qatotk nem namay/t/c:
languages.english: And He said, "Go into the city to a certain man, and say to him, 'The Teacher says, "My time is at hand; I will keep the Passover at your house with My disciples."
languages.arabic: أما هو فقال لهم: اذهبوا إلى هذه المدينة إلى فلان الرجل وقولوا له: المعلم يقول ان زمانى قد اقترب، وعندك اصنع الفصح مع تلاميذى.

languages.coptic: Ouoh aui~ri n~je nimay/t/c m~v~r/] e~taI/couc joc nwou ouoh aucebte pipac,a.
languages.english: So the disciples did as Jesus had directed them; and they prepared the Passover.
languages.arabic: ففعل التلاميذ كما أمرهم يسوع وأعدوا الفصح.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Ninth Hour of Thursday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة التاسعة من يوم الخميس من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: And when Abraham became elevated in God's eyes above all other people, the Lord appeared to him and said: Abraham, Abraham whom I love, obey my words and do my will.
languages.arabic: فلما ازداد إبراهيم رفعة أمام الرب أكثر من جميع الناس، ظهر له الرب وخاطبه هكذا قائلاً: يا إبراهيم يا إبراهيم الذي أحبه، اسمع كلامى وافعل إرادتى،

languages.english: Take your dear son Isaac and offer him to me a sacrifice on a mountain.
languages.arabic: خذ اسحق إبنك حبيبك وقدمه لى محرقة على أحد الجبال

languages.english: Abraham did as the Lord said. He took his beloved son, two of his servants, a donkey, and went on.
languages.arabic: . فقام إبراهيم كقول الرب وأخذ إبنه حبيبه وغلامين من عبيده وأسرج دابته وسار هكذا.

languages.english: When he saw the mountain afar, he left the two servants and the donkey with them and said; I shall go there with my son to pray and come back.
languages.arabic: فلما رأى الجبل من بعيد ترك الغلامين والدابة معهما وقال: أنا وإبنى ننطلق إلى هناك لنسجد ثم نعود إليكما.

languages.english: He loaded the kindling on his only son and carried the knife and the fire. They went up the mountain to the place that the Lord Almighty designated.
languages.arabic: وحمل الحطب على وحيده والسكين والنار كان مع إبراهيم، وصعد الإثنان على الجبل المقدس الموضع الذي أعلمه به الضابط الكل.

languages.english: Isaac said to his father Abraham: Here is the fire where is the lamb? Abraham said to him: My son, the Lord will arrange for a sacrificial lamb that pleases him.
languages.arabic: فقال اسحق لأبيه إبراهيم: هوذا الحطب فأين هو الحمل؟ فقال: يا إبنى الله يعد حملاً للذبح مقبولاً يرضيه.

languages.english: Then he gathered stones, and built an altar, and stacked the firewood on the altar. Before he lit it, he tied the boy's hands and feet and put him on the wood.
languages.arabic: ثم جمع احجاراً وبنى مذبحاً وجعل الحطب عليه قبل أن يوقد النار، وشد يدي الصبى وساقيه وجعله على الحطب.

languages.english: The boy (Isaac) said: Here, I am your sacrifice that you offer, father.
languages.arabic: فقال الصبى: هاأنذا اليوم قربانك يا أبتاه الذي تصنعه.

languages.english: When Abraham held the knife and started to proceed to fulfill the offering, the Lord shouted and said: Abraham, hold your hand and do not touch (your son) for I have verified your love towards me. Isaac your beloved son shall grow and multiply.
languages.arabic: فمد يده وأخذ السكين لكى يكمل القضية. وإذا بصوت كان من الرب نحو إبراهيم هكذا قائلاً: إمسك يدك ولا تصنع به شراً فقد عرفت محبتك لى. بالنمو ينمو وبالكثرة يكثر اسحق إبنك الحبيب.

languages.english: And as you did not hesitate to offer your first born, I shall bless you and your descendants, your sons shall be like the stars and will be as numerous as the sand.
languages.arabic: وكما إنك لم تشفق على إبنك بكرك أنا سأباركك وزرعك معاً وبنوك يكونون مثل النجوم ويكثر عددهم مثل الرمل.

languages.english: Abraham looked behind him and saw a sheep tied with its horns to a tree of Safak.
languages.arabic: ثم إلتفت إبراهيم فنظر خروفاً مربوطاً بقرنيه فى شجرة صافاك.

languages.english: He untied Isaac and slew the sheep instead of him. And the Lord Almighty blessed Abraham because he found him acceptable in all his deeds.
languages.arabic: فحل اسحق من وثاقه وذبح الخروف عوضاً عنه، وبارك الرب ضابط الكل إبراهيم لأنه وجده مرضياً له فى سائر أعماله.

languages.english: And the old man (Abraham) returned and went back with the two servants and his son.
languages.arabic: وهكذا رجع الشيخ وأخذ الغلامين وإبنه ومضوا.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Iermiac pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Jeremiah the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من أرميا النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Nai nee~tef jw m~mwou n~je P[oic je m/ v/e~safhei m/ f~natwnf an je: ie v/etaftacyo e~bol m/ m~paftacyo e~qoun je:
languages.english: For thus says the Lord: "Will not he who falls arise? Or he who turns away, will he not return?
languages.arabic: هذا ما يقوله الرب: هل من يسقط لا يقوم؟ ومن يرتد لا يرجع؟

languages.coptic: Eybeou aftacyo e~bol n~je pailaoc qen outacyo e~bol n~atsipi: ouoh aua~moni m~mwou n~q~r/i qen pououws m~pououws n~ywou e~tacywou.
languages.english: Why therefore has this My people turned away from Me in a shameful way, strengthened themselves in their choice, and were not willing to return?
languages.arabic: لما إرتد هذا الشعب إرتداداً وقحاً، وتمسكوا بهواهم وأبوا أن يرجعوا؟

languages.coptic: {ic~m/ je ]nou e~reten e~cwtem n~oucaji gar m~pair/]: m~mon h~li gar n~rwmi naermeta~noin qen tefkakia~ f~jw m~woc: je ou petaiai:
languages.english: Indeed, give ear and listen. Will they not speak thus: 'There is no man who repents of his vices, saying, "What have I done?'"
languages.arabic: أنصتوا الآن واسمعوا كلاماً لأنه هكذا ليس أحد من الناس يتوب عن شره قائلاً ماذا صنعت؟

languages.coptic: V/et[oji af,atotf e~bol qen pefman[oji: m~v~r/] n~ouh~yo e~re peffw] hiwtf e~bolqen pefhemhem ]a~cida n~te t~ve accouen pecc/ou: ou[~rom p~sal nem beni ouoh ou[aj n~te t~koi aua~reh e~nouyws e~sau se e~qoun n~q/tou:
languages.english: The runner ceases to run his race, as a sweating horse ceases to run when he is tired. Even the stork in the sky knows her appointed time, as do the turtledove and the swallow of the field. The sparrows watch for the times of their coming.
languages.arabic: الذي يجرى قد كف عن موضع جريه، كحصان عرقان من صهيله، عرف اللقلق فى السماء ميعاده واليمامة والسنونة وعصفورة الحقل عرفت أوقات دخولها،

languages.coptic: Palaoc de n~yof m~pefe~mi e~p~hap m~P[oic: pwc e~reten jwm~moc je a~non hancabeu a~non ouoh je v~nomoc m~P[oic sop nan: piyws e~t/p e~nigramateuc afswpi n~e~v~l/ou n~oumeym/i an pe.
languages.english: But My people do not know the judgments of the Lord. "How can you say, 'We are wise, and the law of the Lord is with us'? The lying pen becomes vanity for the scribes.
languages.arabic: وأما شعبى فلم يعرف حكم الرب! كيف تقولون إنا نحن حكماء وناموس الرب لنا، والناموس الذي كان محسوباً للكتبه صار باطلاً وليس حقاً؟

languages.coptic: Au[isipi n~je nicovoc ouoh ouc~yerter af[itou: je autacyo e~bol m~p~caji m~P[oic: ]covia~ ou/ou te n~q~r/i n~q/tou.
languages.english: Wise men are put to shame and convicted, for they rejected the word of the Lord. What wisdom is in them?
languages.arabic: خزى الحكماء والفلاسفة وتملكهم الفزع لأنهم رفضوا كلمة الرب، بعيدة هى الحكمة عنهم.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Paoujai nem paw~ou auqen panou]: Vnou] n~te tabo/yia ouoh tahelpic acqen Vnou]:
languages.english: In God is my salvation and my glory; He is the God of my help, and my hope is in God.
languages.arabic: خلاصى ومجدى بإلهى، إله معونتى، رجائى هو بالله.

languages.coptic: Ke gar n~yof pe Panou] Pacwt/r: parefsopt e~rof n~nakim n~houo: all/louia.
languages.english: For [indeed] He is my God and my Savior, My protector; I shall be shaken no more. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: لأنه إلهى ومخلصى. ناصرى فلا اتزعزع أبداً: الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: I/couc de afws e~bol ouoh pejaf: je v/eonah] e~roi afnah] e~roi an: alla afnah] e~v/e~taftaouoi.
languages.english: Then Jesus cried out and said, “He who believes in Me, believes not in Me but in Him who sent Me.
languages.arabic: فصاح يسوع وقال: الذي يؤمن بى ليس يؤمن بي, بل آمن بالذي أرسلنى،

languages.coptic: Ouoh v/eynau e~roi afnau e~v/e~taftaouoi. Anok aii~ euouwini m~pikocmoc: hina ouon niben eynah] e~roi n~tefs~temo~hi qen pi,aki.
languages.english: And he who sees Me sees Him who sent Me. I have come as a light into the world, that whoever believes in Me should not abide in darkness.
languages.arabic: ومن يرانى فقد رأى الذي أرسلنى. أنا قد جئت نوراً للعالم، حتى كل من يؤمن بى لا يمكث فى الظلمة،

languages.coptic: Ouoh v/eynacwtem e~nacaji ouoh n~tefstema~reh e~rwou a~nok eyna]hap e~rof an: nee~taii~ gar an hina n~ta]hap e~pikocmoc alla hina n~tanohem m~pikocmoc.
languages.english: And if anyone hears My words and does not believe, I do not judge him; for I did not come to judge the world but to save the world.
languages.arabic: وإن كان أحد يسمع كلامى ولا يحفظه فأنا لا أدينه، لأنى لم آتٍ لأدين العالم بل لأخلص العالم،

languages.coptic: V/etjwl m~moi e~bol ouoh e~te n~f~na[i n~nacaji an: ouon n~taf m~v/eyna]hap e~rof: picaji e~taicaji m~mof v/e~te m~mau eyna]hap e~rof qen pie~hoou n~qae~.
languages.english: He who rejects Me, and does not receive My words, has that which judges him—the word that I have spoken will judge him in the last day.
languages.arabic: ومن ينكرنى ولا يقبل كلامى فله من يدينه. الكلام الذي تكلمت به هو الذي يدينه فى اليوم الأخير،

languages.coptic: Je a~nok m~picaji e~bolhitot m~mauatf: alla v~iwt v/e~taftaouoi n~yof pe e~taf] entol/ n/i: ou pe]najof ie ou pe ]nacaji m~mof.
languages.english: For I have not spoken on My own authority; but the Father who sent Me gave Me a command, what I should say and what I should speak.
languages.arabic: لأنى لم أتكلم من ذاتى وحدى، بل الآب الذي أرسلنى هو الذي أعطانى الوصية ماذا أقول وبماذا أتكلم،

languages.coptic: Ouoh ]e~mi je tefentoli ouwnq n~e~neh te: n/ oun a~nok e~]jw mmwou kata v~r/] e~tafjoc n/i n~je paiwt pair/] ]caji.
languages.english: And I know that His command is everlasting life. Therefore, whatever I speak, just as the Father has told Me, so I speak.”
languages.arabic: وأعلم أن وصيته هى حياة أبدية، والذي أتكلم أنا به فكما قال لى أبى هكذا أتكلم.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Eleventh Hour of the eve of Thursday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الحادية عشر، من ليلة الخميس من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: Our Savior the Son of the living God said: I am the light of the world. He who believes in me and accepts my words will not be in the darkness.
languages.arabic: قال المخلص إبن الله الحي: أنا هو نور العالم بأسره، ومن يؤمن بى ويقبل كلامى لا يمكن أن يلبث فى الظلام،

languages.english: He who denies me and does not want to listen to my words or to obey them, I will not judge him, but the words I said will.
languages.arabic: ومن يجحدنى ولم يرد أن يسمع لقولى ولم يطعه فأنا لا أدينه، لكن القول الذي قلته هو يدينه،

languages.english: Because what I say is from the Father who sent Me. He gave me the commandment of what to say and what to tell.
languages.arabic: فأن القول الذي نطقت به ليس هو لى بل للآب الذي أرسلنى، وهو أعطانى الوصية بماذا أقول وأنطق.

languages.english: We believe in you that you are the omnipotent Word of God the benevolent Father.
languages.arabic: نحن نؤمن أنك أنت بالحقيقة كلمة الله الآب الصالح، وأن لك القدرة على كل شىء وليس شىء يعسر عليك.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Iezeki/l pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Ezekiel the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من حزقيال النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afolt n~je ou~p~neuma ouoh afent e~qoun e~]aul/ etcaqoun: ouoh h/ppe ic pi/i e~afmoh ebolqen p~w~ou n~te P[oic:
languages.english: The Spirit lifted me up and brought me into the inner court, and behold, the house was full of the Lord's glory.
languages.arabic: فحملنى الروح وأدخلنى إلى الدار الداخلية. وإذ البيت ممتلئ من مجد الرب.

languages.coptic: Ouoh aiohie~rat ouoh h/ppe ic ouc~m/ n~te v/etcaji nem/i e~bolqen pi/i: ouoh nare pirwmi ohi e~ratf pe qa youwi:
languages.english: Then I stood, and behold, there was a voice from the house, and a Man was standing with me.
languages.arabic: فوقفت وإذا بصوت يتكلم معى من البيت، وكان الرجل واقفاً بجانبى، وقال لى:

languages.coptic: Ouoh pejaf n/i je p~s/ri m~v~rwmi: aknau e~vma m~pay~ronoc: nem v~ma n~]sentatci n~tena[a~lauj: nai e~tef naswpi n~q/tou n~je paran qen y~m/] m~p~/i m~Piicra/l sae~neh:
languages.english: He said to me, "Son of man, you have seen the place of My throne and the place of the soles of My feet, where I will dwell in the midst of the house of Israel forever.
languages.arabic: أترى يا إبن الإنسان مكان عرشى وموضع باطن قدمى؟ هؤلاء الذين يكون فيهم أسمى فى وسط بيت اسرائيل إلى الأبد،

languages.coptic: Ouoh n~ne p/i m~Piicra/l wreb m~paran eyouab: je n~ywou nem nouhugoumenoc n~q~r/i qen oupon/ria~: nem niqwteb n~te nouhugoumenoc qen toum/].
languages.english: No more will the house of Israel defile My holy name, they nor their leaders, by their fornication or murders of the leaders in their midst.
languages.arabic: ولن ينجس بعد بيت اسرائيل أسمى القدوس. هم ومدبريهم فى الإثم وقتل مدبريهم فى وسطهم

languages.coptic: Qen p~jiny~rou,w m~paro qaten nourwou ouoh naouejrwou qaten nouejrwou: ouoh au,w n~tajoi m~v~r/] e~naca~moni m~moi nemwou:
languages.english: When they set My threshold by their thresholds, and My doorpost by their doorposts, with a wall between them and Me,
languages.arabic: عندما جعلوا بابى عند أبوابهم، وأعتابى بجانب أعتابهم، وجعلوا سياجهم كما لو كانت تمسكنى معهم،

languages.coptic: Ouoh auw~reb m~paran eyouab qen noua~nomia~ e~naui~ri m~mwou: ouoh aiqemqwmou qen pam~bon nem qen ouqwteb:
languages.english: they desecrated My holy name by their lawlessness, and I destroyed them in My anger and with slaughter.
languages.arabic: فنجسوا أسمى القدوس بآثامهم التى يفعلونها فسحقتهم بغضبى قتلاً.

languages.coptic: Ouoh ]nou marou,w n~noupon/ria~: nem niqwteb n~te nouhugoumenoc e~bol haroi: ouoh ]naswpi qen toum/] sae~neh:
languages.english: Now let them remove their fornication from My presence, and the murders of their leaders, and I will dwell in their midst forever.
languages.arabic: والآن فليتركوا شرورهم. وقتل مدبريهم أمامى، فأحل فى وسطهم إلى الأبد،

languages.coptic: Ouoh n~yok hwk p~s/ri m~v~rwmi: matame p~/i m~Piicra/l e~pi/i nem tefhoracic: nem pefyws ouoh cenaheri e~bolha nounobi: ouoh nai cena[i n~toukoulacic:
languages.english: "As for you, son of man, explain this house to the house of Israel, and they will cease from the shame of their sins; and describe to them its vision and its plan.
languages.arabic: وأنت أيضاً يا إبن الإنسان أخبر بيت اسرائيل عن البيت وشكله ورسمه فيكفون عن خطاياهم،

languages.coptic: Eybe hwb niben e~tauaitou ouoh eke~c~qai m~pi/i nem pefcob]: nem pefmwit e~bol: nem pefmwit e~qoun: nem tefhupoctacic: nem nefouahcahni t/rou:
languages.english: They shall take the chastisements for all the things they did, and you shall describe the house, its design, its exits, and its substance, and all its ordinances.
languages.arabic: وهؤلاء ينالون عقابهم من أجل كل ما صنعوه، وترسم البيت وهيئته ومخارجه ومداخله ونظامه، وكل أوامره أخبرهم بها.

languages.coptic: Eke~tamwou e~rwou ouoh eke~c~q/tou m~poum~yo e~bol: ouoh cenaa~reh e~nameym/i t/rou nem naouahcahni t/rou n~ceaitou.
languages.english: You shall make known its laws to them and write them out in their sight. Then they will keep all My requirements and all My ordinances and perform them.
languages.arabic: وأكتب ذلك أمامهم فيحفظون جميع حقوقى وجميع وصاياى ويعملون بها.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Matanqoi Vnou] je a~hanmwou: se e~qoun sa ta'u,/:
languages.english: Save me, O God, for the waters flood my soul.
languages.arabic: أحينى يا الله فإن المياه قد بلغت إلى نفسى،

languages.coptic: Kata p~a~sai n~te nekmetsenh/t: joust e~q~r/i e~jwi: all/louia.
languages.english: According to Your abundant compassion, look upon me. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: وأنظر إلى ككثرة رأفاتك: الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Eybe vai fmei m~moi n~je paiwt: je a~nok ]na,w n~ta'u,/ hin on n~ta[itc:
languages.english: “Therefore My Father loves Me, because I lay down My life that I may take it again.
languages.arabic: من أجل هذا يحبنى أبى، لأنى أضع نفسى لأخذها أيضاً.

languages.coptic: Mmon hli wli m~moc n~tot alla a~nok et,w m~moc e~q~r/i e~bol hito m~mauat: ouon] ersisi m~mau e~,ac ouon ersisi m~mau on e~[itc:
languages.english: No one takes it from Me, but I lay it down of Myself. I have power to lay it down, and I have power to take it again.
languages.arabic: ليس أحد يأخذها منى ولكنى أضعها أنا من ذأتى وحدى، ولى سلطان أن أضعها، ولى أيضاً سلطان أن آخذها،

languages.coptic: Yai te ]entol/ e~tai[itc e~bol hiten paiwt.
languages.english: This command I have received from My Father.”
languages.arabic: هذه هى الوصية التى قبلتها من أبى.

languages.coptic: Ouc~,icma on afswpi qen niIoudai eybe paicaji: <anm/s de e~bol n~q/tou naujwm~moc je ouon oude mwn nemaf ouoh f~lobi: eybeou tetencwtem e~rof.
languages.english: Therefore there was a division again among the Jews because of these sayings. And many of them said, “He has a demon and is mad. Why do you listen to Him?”
languages.arabic: فحدث شقاق بين اليهود بسبب هذا الكلام، فقال كثيرون منهم أن به شيطان وقد جن فلماذا تسمعون له.

languages.coptic: Hanke,wouni de naujw m~moc je nai caji na ourwmi an pe e~ouon ou demwn nemaf m/ ouons~jom n~oudemwn e~a~ouwn nnibal n~hanbelleu.
languages.english: Others said, “These are not the words of one who has a demon. Can a demon open the eyes of the blind?”
languages.arabic: وقال آخرون ليس هذا كلام إنسان به شيطان، هل يقدر شيطان أن يفتح أعين العميان.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the First Hour of the eve of Thursday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الاولى، من ليلة الخميس من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: Christ our Lord, master and king reveals his divinity and dominion. The God who prevails over all hegemony and power in heavens and on earth.
languages.arabic: ربنا وسيدنا وملكنا المسيح يظهر لاهوته وسلطانه أنه هو الإله المتعالى على كل رئاسة وكل سلطان فى السماء وعلى الأرض،

languages.english: That is why He tells us: My Father loves Me and I humble Myself to earn it. No one can force the cross on Me, but only through My own will that I humble Myself and that I have the power to take it away.
languages.arabic: فلذلك قال إن الآب يحبنى فأنى أضع نفسى لكى آخذها، وليس أحد ينزعها منى لكن أنا الذي أضعها بإرادتى فإن لى سلطان أن أضعها لى ولى سلطان أن آخذها،

languages.english: There developed a schism among the Jews because of these words that He told them. The hypocrites among them said He is crazy, do not listen to Him.
languages.arabic: فصار انشقاق بين اليهود من أجل هذا الكلام الذي قال لهم. وقال قوم من المنافقين ,لماذا تسمعون منه؟

languages.english: Others said; these are not the words of a possessed man. Crazy people cannot open the eyes of someone born blind.
languages.arabic: وقال آخرون: هذا الكلام ليس هو كلام إنسان به شيطان، لا يقدر مجنون أن يفتح عينى أعمى مولود.

languages.english: Truly He is the light for the faithful hearts—except for the contrary Jews whom he blinded the vision of their hearts and their eyes—so that they may not see with their eyes and that they may not understand with their hearts and return to Him with true love, great hope and total honesty and that He may forgive their sins so as to save them of their transgressions.
languages.arabic: هو بالحقيقة الذي يضيئ أعين قلوب المؤمنين به ما خلا اليهود المخالفين، طمس عيون قلوبهم وأجسادهم كيلا ينظروا بعيونهم ويفهموا بقلوبهم يرجعوا إليه بمحبة حقيقة ورجاء عظيم وأمأنه كاملة، ويغفر لهم كثرة خطاياهم ويسامحهم بزلاتهم.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Amwc pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Amos the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من عاموس النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Nai ne n/etefjw m~wou n~je P[oic Vnou]:
languages.english: [Thus says the Lord God:]
languages.arabic: هذا ما يقوله الرب الإله:

languages.coptic: Areten senwten e~qoun e~B/y/l ouoh a~reten era~nomin: ouoh n~q~r/i qen Galaad Galgal a~reten a~sai e~p~jin ermeta~ceb/c:
languages.english: "You come to Bethel and act lawlessly and multiply your transgressions in Gilgal.
languages.arabic: إنكم دخلتم إلى بيت إيل فأثمتم، وفى جلجال جلعاد أكثرتم النفاق،

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~reteni~ni n~hana~tooui~ n~netensouswousi: nem netenrema] m~v~mah somt n~e~hoou:
languages.english: You bring your sacrifice in the morning and your tithes every three days.
languages.arabic: وفى كل صباح قدمتم ذبائحكم، وفى اليوم الثالث عشوركم

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~retenws n~ounomoc cab: ouoh autwbh n~hanomologia~ hiwis:
languages.english: Moreover, outside they read things of the Law and call for professions.
languages.arabic: وقرأت ناموساً خارجاً.

languages.coptic: je nai aumenritoun~je nens/ri m~p~Icra/l: peje P[oic Vnou].
languages.english: Proclaim that the children of Israel love these things," says the Lord God. "
languages.arabic: طلبوا الاعتراف والأنذار لأن بنى اسرائيل أحبوا هذه قال الرب الإله،

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~nok ]na] nwten n~ouq~lij n~najhi qen netenbaki t/rou: nem oumetreferqae~ n~wik qen netenbaki t/rou: ouoh m~petenkety/nou haroi pe je P[oic:
languages.english: And in all your cities I gave you cleanness of teeth, and in all your places a lack of bread, Yet you did not return to Me," says the Lord.
languages.arabic: فأنى أنا سأعطيكم ضرس الأسنان فى جميع مدنكم، وعوز الخبز فى جميع مدنكم، فلم ترجعوا إلى يقول الرب،

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~nok aitahno m~pimounhwou e~bolharwten qajen somt n~a~bot n~tep~[wl: ouoh eiehwou hijen oubaki n~ouwt: kebaki de ]nahwou e~jwc an:
languages.english: "And also, I withheld rain from you for the three months before the harvest. I caused it to rain upon one city while I withheld rain from another.
languages.arabic: وأنا أيضاً منعت عنكم المطر قبل الحصاد بثلاثة أشهر، سأمطر على مدينة واحدة وعلى مدينة أخرى لا أمطر.

languages.coptic: Outoi n~ouwt ece[imwou ouoh ]ketoi ]nahwou e~jwc an ece~swoui~.
languages.english: On one field it rained, but where it did not rain, the crops withered.
languages.arabic: جزء واحد يشرب، والجزء الآخر لا أمطر عليه فيجف،

languages.coptic: Ouoh eue~ywou] n~je baki c~nou] ie som] e~oubaki n~ouwt eyrocuemwou ouoh n~nouci: ouoh pair/] on m~peten kety/nou haroi peje P[oic:
languages.english: So two or three cities wandered to another city to drink water, but they were not satisfied. “Yet,” says the Lord, "you did not return to Me."
languages.arabic: فتجمع مدينتان أو ثلاث إلى مدينة واحدة ليشربوا ماء و لا يرتوا. وكذلك لم ترجعوا إلى قال الرب،

languages.coptic: Ouoh aisari e~rwten qen ouq~mom nem oua~rws: a~reteny~re peten[w~qem a~sai: nem neteniaha~loli nem neteniah kente nem neteniahjwit acouo~mou n~je ]et/si:
languages.english: "I struck you with a parching and blight. When you multiplied your gardens, your vineyards, your fig trees, and your olive trees, the caterpillar devoured them.
languages.arabic: ضربتكم بالحمى والبرد فأكثرتم نجاساتكم، وأكل القمص (أبناء الجراد) جناتكم وكرومكم وتينكم وزيتونكم

languages.coptic: Ouoh pair/] on m~peten ket y/nou haroi peje P[oic.
languages.english: Yet you did not turn back to Me," says the Lord.
languages.arabic: وكذلك أيضاً لم ترجعوا إلى قال الرب.

languages.coptic: Aiouwrp n~oumou e~qoun e~rwten qen v~mwit n,/mi: ouoh aiqwteb n~neten qelsiri qen t~c/fi nem oue,malwcia~ n~netenh~ywr:
languages.english: "I sent forth death against you by way of Egypt, and I killed your young men with a sword, together with your captured horses.
languages.arabic: فأرسلت عليكم وباء فى طرق مصر. قتلت بالسيف شبانكم مع سلب خيلكم،

languages.coptic: Ouoh aii~ e~h~r/i qen ou,rwm e~jen netenparembol/ qen oujwnt: ouoh pair/] on mpetenket y/nou haroi peje P[oic:
languages.english: And in My wrath I brought fire upon your army camps. Yet you did not return to Me," says the Lord.
languages.arabic: وأتيت بالنار على عساكركم بغضب، هكذا أيضاً لم ترجعوا إلى يقول الرب.

languages.coptic: Aivenj y/nou m~v~r/] e~tafvenj n~je Vnou] Codoma nem Gomorra ouoh a~retenswpi m~v~r/] n~oulaoc e~au[a~qmef e~bolqen ou,rwm ouoh m~petenket y/nou haroi peje P[oic.
languages.english: "I overthrew you as God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah, and you became like a torch that burns out after being plucked out of the fire. Yet even after all this you did not return to Me," says the Lord.
languages.arabic: قلبت بعضكم كما قلب الله سدوم وعمورة فصرتم كشعلة منتشلة من الحريق فلم ترجعوا الي يقول الرب.

languages.coptic: Eybe vai ]nai~ri nak Piicra/l: p~l/n ]nairi nak m~pair/]: cebtwtk Piicra/l e~twbh m~peknou]:
languages.english: "Therefore, O Israel, thus shall I do to you, and because I will do thus to you, make yourself ready to call upon your God, O Israel!
languages.arabic: لذلك أصنع بك هكذا يا اسرائيل، وبما أنى أصنع هذا فإستعد لتدعوا إلهك يا اسرائيل

languages.coptic: Je h/ppe a~nok ettajro n~ouqarabai: ouoh etcwnt n~oup~neuma: ouoh efhiwis m~pef,rc qen nirwmi: v/etyamio~ n~hana~tooui nem ounifi: ouoh efa~l/i e~jen ni[ici n~te p~kahi:
languages.english: For behold, I am the One who strengthens the thunder, and creates the wind, and proclaims His Anointed One to mankind, making the daybreak and the darkness, while treading upon the high places of the earth.
languages.arabic: فها أنا المثبت الرعد والخالق الريح والمبشر بمسيحه فى البشر الخالق الصبح والنسمة والراكب على أعالى الأرض،

languages.coptic: P[oic Vnou] pipantokratwr pe pefran.
languages.english: The Lord God Almighty is His name!"
languages.arabic: الرب الإله الضابط الكل هو أسمه.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.english: The Psalm “His words were softened above oil (Au[~non)” is chanted in the “Shammy” tune of “Your Throne (Peky~ronoc)”:

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Au[~non n~je nefcaji e~hote ouneh: ouoh n~ywou hancoynef ne:
languages.english: His words were softened above oil, And they are arrows.
languages.arabic: كلامه ألين من الدهن وهو نصال.

languages.coptic: {ic~m/ Vnou] e~ta p~roceu,/: ouoh m~perhi p~ho m~patwbh: all/louia.
languages.english: Give ear to my prayer, O God, And do not despise my supplication: Alleluia.
languages.arabic: أنصت يا الله لصلاتى، و لا تغفل عن تضرعى: الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Markon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Mark. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار مرقس البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Ouoh ef,/ qen b/ya~nia~ qen p~/i n~Cimwn pikakceht efrwteb aci~ n~je ouc~himi e~re ouon oumoki n~cojen n~totc nardoc m~pic~tik/ e~nasen~couenf:
languages.english: And being in Bethany at the house of Simon the leper, as He sat at the table, a woman came having an alabaster flask of very costly oil of spikenard.
languages.arabic: وفيما هو فى بيت عنيا فى منزل سمعان الأبرص متكئاً، جاءت إمرأة ومعها قارورة طيب ناردين خالص كثير الثمن،

languages.coptic: Eacqomqem m~pimoki acjosf ejen tefa~ve.
languages.english: Then she broke the flask and poured it on His head.
languages.arabic: فكسرت القارورة وسكبته على رأسه،

languages.coptic: Nare hanouon ,~remrem nem noue~r/ou: je eybeou a~paitako n~te paicojen swpi.
languages.english: But there were some who were indignant among themselves, and said, “Why was this fragrant oil wasted?
languages.arabic: وكان قوم قد تذمروا فيما بينهم قائلين: لم كان أتلاف هذا الطيب،

languages.coptic: Neouon s~jom gar e~]m~vai e~bol capswi n~somt se n~cayeri ouoh e~t/itou n~nih/ki: ouoh naum~bon e~roc pe.
languages.english: For it might have been sold for more than three hundred denarii and given to the poor.” And they criticized her sharply.
languages.arabic: فإنه كان يمكن أن يباع هذا بأكثر من ثلثمائة دينار ويعطى للمساكين. وكانوا يؤنبونها،

languages.coptic: Peje I/couc nwou je ,ac: a~qwten teten]qici nac: ouhwb e~nanef petacerhwb e~rof n~q/t.
languages.english: But Jesus said, “Let her alone. Why do you trouble her? She has done a good work for Me.
languages.arabic: فقال لهم يسوع: دعوها، ما بالكم تعنفونها؟ عملاً حسناً الذي عملته به،

languages.coptic: Nc/ou niben nih/ki ce nemwten: ouoh e~swp n~tetenouws ouons~jom m~mwten e~er peynanef nemwou n~c/ou niben: a~nok de ]nemwten an n~c/ou niben.
languages.english: For you have the poor with you always, and whenever you wish you may do them good; but Me you do not have always.
languages.arabic: فإن المساكين معكم كل حين، وإذا أردتم أمكنكم أن تحسنوا إليهم كل حين، وأما أنا فلست معكم فى كل حين،

languages.coptic: V/e~tac[itf acaif acersorp gar n~yahc m~pacwma m~paicojen e~pjinkoct.
languages.english: She has done what she could. She has come beforehand to anoint My body for burial.
languages.arabic: عملت ما عندها قد سبقت و دهنت بالطيب جسدي للتكفين.

languages.coptic: Am/n ]jwm~moc nwten: je pima e~tounahiwis m~paieuaggelion m~mof qen pikocmoc t/rf: v/hwf e~tayai aif eue~caji m~mof eumeui~ nac.
languages.english: Assuredly, I say to you, wherever this gospel is preached in the whole world, what this woman has done will also be told as a memorial to her.”
languages.arabic: الحق أقول لكم إنه حيثما يكرز بهذا الإنجيل فى العالم كله، يخبر أيضاً بما عملته هذه تذكاراً لها.

languages.coptic: Ouoh Ioudac piickariw~t/c piouai n~te pim/t c~nau afsenaf ha niar,/e~reuc hina n~teft/if nwou.
languages.english: Then Judas Iscariot, one of the twelve, went to the chief priests to betray Him to them.
languages.arabic: ثم أن يهوذا الإسخريوطى أحد الإثنى عشر ذهب إلى رؤساء الكهنة لكى يسلمه إليهم،

languages.coptic: N~ywou de e~taucwtem aurasi ouoh au]naf n~ouhat: ouoh nafkw] je pwc f~nat/if qen oueukeria.
languages.english: And when they heard it, they were glad, and promised to give him money. So he sought how he might conveniently betray Him.
languages.arabic: فلما سمعوا فرحوا وأعطوه فضة فكان يلتمس فرصه كيف يسلمه بحيلة.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Third Hour of the eve of Thursday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الثالثة، من ليلة الخميس من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: The woman poured the precious spikenard over the Lord's feet and who wiped them with her hair because of her loyalty and great love.
languages.arabic: المرأة التى دهنت رجلى الرب بالطيب الفائق ومسحتهما بشعر رأسها، من أجل ثبات أمانتها وحبها الكثير.

languages.english: Thus she earned for herself good dividends and her name filled the earth.
languages.arabic: هذه إقتنت لها نصيباً صالحاً وصيتاً عالياً فى جميع العالم،

languages.english: The disciples spread the word about her deed in all corners of the earth. Her name is honored in all generations, and mentioned by all the faithful.
languages.arabic: وبشر الرسل بما فعلته فى جميع زوايا الأرض، فدام إسمها فى جميع الأجيال، يتلوه سائر المؤمنين.

languages.english: Behold these spiritual gifts and the high esteem she gained. Let us be filled with zeal over her virtue and love of the Lord with all our hearts.
languages.arabic: يا لهذه المواهب الروحانية وهذه الكرامات العالية التى فازت بها، فلنمتلئ غيره على فضيلتها ونحب الرب من كل قلوبنا،

languages.english: Not like Judas who became infuriated by her good deed. This cost him his evil thoughts that led him to betray his master.
languages.arabic: وليس مثل يهوذا الذي حنق عليها من أجل أنها صنعت الخير.

languages.english: And the silver he received as a price of the precious blood (of Jesus Christ) will perish with him in hell. His name disappeared in a single generation and he was denied descendants on earth.
languages.arabic: فكلفته أفكاره الشريرة حتى باع سيده، والفضة التى أخذها ثمن الذكى ستهبط معه إلى الجحيم ليفنى أسمه فى جيل واحد و لا يكون له خلف على الأرض.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Amwc pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Amos the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من عاموس النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Cwtem e~paicaji vai e~taicaji m~mof e~jen y/nou p~/i m~p~iIcra/l: nem qa vul/ niben e~taie~nou e~bolqen p~kahi n~,/mi eujwm~moc.
languages.english: O house of Israel, hear this word the Lord has spoken against you, against the whole family which I brought up from the land of Egypt, saying,
languages.arabic: أسمعوا هذا القول الذي تكلمت به عليكم يا بيت اسرائيل وعلى كل القبائل التى أخرجتها من أرض مصر قائلاً:

languages.coptic: Je t~l/n n~ywten aicouen y/nou e~bol qen nivul/ t/rou n~te p~kahi: eybe vai eie~[i m~psis e~jen y/nou t/rou n~netennobi t/rou.
languages.english: "Out of all the families of the earth, I have especially known you. Therefore I shall exact vengeance upon you for all your sins.
languages.arabic: إياكم عرفت من بين جميع قبائل الأرض، فلذلك أنتقم منكم عن جميع خطاياكم.

languages.coptic: An eue~mosi n~je c~nau eucop n~toustem couen noue~r/ou e~p~t/rf.
languages.english: If two people walk together, will each one not come to know the other?
languages.arabic: أيسير اثنان معاً و لا يعرف بعضهما البعض قط؟

languages.coptic: An efe~hemhem n~je oumoui~ e~bolqen ouiahss/n m~mon tefjorjf: an e~re oumac m~moui~ ]n~tefc~m/ ebolqen pefb/b e~p~t/rf afstemhwlem n~ouh~li.
languages.english: Will a lion roar from his lair in the forest if he has no prey? Will a lion's whelp cry out from his den if he has nothing?
languages.arabic: أيزمجر الأسد فى الغابة وليس له فريسة؟ أيطلق الشبل صوته من عرينه قط، إلا إذا خطف شيئا؟

languages.coptic: A~n efehei n~je ouhal/t hijen pikahi m~mon v/etjwrj e~rof: an e~re oujorjc swpi hijen pkahi n~ouesen tahe hli.
languages.english: Will a bird fall to the earth without a fowler? Will a snare be sprung if it has caught nothing?
languages.arabic: أيسقط طير على الأرض من غير قانص؟ أيكون فخ على الأرض من غير أن يصيد شيئاً ؟

languages.coptic: An e~re oucalpigx mou] qen oubaki ouoh n~te sten oulaoc nousp: an e~re oukakia~ swpi qen oubaki m~pe~P[oic yamioc.
languages.english: If a trumpet is sounded in a city, will not the people be alarmed? If evil should be in a city, has not the Lord brought it?
languages.arabic: أيصوت بوق فى مدينة ولا يهلع الشعب؟ هل تحدث بلية فى مدينة والرب لم يصنعها ؟

languages.coptic: Je ou/i n~nefi~ri n~ouhwb n~je N~[oic Vnou] afstem [wrp e~bol n~tefc~bw nnefe~biaik m~p~rov/t/c:
languages.english: For the Lord God does nothing unless He reveals instruction to His servants the prophets.
languages.arabic: إن الرب الإله لا يصنع أمراً إلا ويعلن تأديبه لعبيده الآنبياء،

languages.coptic: Oumoui~ afws e~bol nim pe etefnaerho] an: P[oic Vnou] afcaji nim pe e~tefnaer p~rov/teuin an:
languages.english: A lion shall roar, and who will not fear? The Lord God speaks, and who will not prophesy?
languages.arabic: أسد قد زمجر فمن لا يخاف، الرب الإله تكلم فمن لا يتنبأ؟

languages.coptic: Matame ni,wra etqen Niaccurioc nem hijen ni,wra n~te,/mi ouoh a~joc:
languages.english: "Proclaim it in the regions among the Assyrians and to the lands of Egypt, and say,
languages.arabic: أخبروا كور الآشوريين وكور مصر وقولوا:

languages.coptic: Je ywou] hijen p~twou n~t~Camaria~: ouoh a~nau e~hans~v/ri euos qen tecm/]: nem ]metrefsepjwri e~te n~q/tc.
languages.english: 'Gather yourself to the mountains of Samaria, and behold the many remarkable things in her midst and the oppression that is within her.
languages.arabic: اجتمعوا على جبل السامرة وأنظروا الغرائب الكثيرة التى فى وسطها، والجور الذي فى داخلها،

languages.coptic: Ouoh m~pece~mi e~n/eynaswpi m~pecm~yo peje P[oic: n/ethioui~ e~qoun n~ou[i n~jonc nem outalepwrea~ qen nou,wra:
languages.english: She does not know the things that will come against her,' says the Lord, 'she stores up injustice and misery in her lands.'
languages.arabic: ولم تعلم ما يكون أمامها يقول الرب. بما أنهم يكنزون ظلماً وشقاء فى كورهم،

languages.coptic: Eybe vai naine n/e~tefjw mmwou n~je Po#c# Vnou]: je Turoc pekahi e~te mpekw] efeswf: ouoh efe~i~ni e~pec/t n~je tejom e~bol n~q/].
languages.english: "Therefore thus says the Lord God: "O Tyre, your land round about you shall be made desolate, and your strength shall be sapped from you.
languages.arabic: فلذلك هذا ما يقوله الرب الإله لصور: إن أرضك التى حولك تخرب وقوتك تسقط منك.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Nahmet P[oic cabol n~ourwmi efhwou: e~bolha ourwmi n~ref[in~jonc matoujoi.
languages.english: Deliver me, O Lord, from the evil man, Rescue me from the unjust man,
languages.arabic: نجنى يارب من إنسان شرير ومن رجل ظالم أنقذنى.

languages.coptic: N/e~tauco[ni n~han [in~jonc qen pouh/t: m~pie~hoou t/rf aucob] n~hanbwtc: all/louia.
languages.english: Who devised wrongdoing in their heart; They arrayed themselves for war all day long: Alleluia.
languages.arabic: الذين تفكروا بالظلم فى قلبهم النهار كله كانوا يستعدون للقتال: الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Nai e~taf jotou n~je I/couc afsenaf af,opf e~bol harwou. Naim/s de m~m/ni afaitou mpoumy~o e~bol m~pounah] e~rof:
languages.english: These things Jesus spoke, and departed, and was hidden from them. But although He had done so many signs before them, they did not believe in Him,
languages.arabic: قال يسوع هذا ثم مضى وتوارى عنهم، ومع هذه الآيات الكثيرة التى صنعها أمامهم لم يؤمنوا به،

languages.coptic: Hina n~tefjwk e~bol n~je p~caji n~/~cai~ac pip~rov/t/c v/e~tafjof je P[oic nim pe e~tafnah] e~tenc~m/: ouoh p~swbs m~P[oic e~taf[wrp e~nim.
languages.english: That the word of Isaiah the prophet might be fulfilled, which he spoke: “Lord, who has believed our report? And to whom has the arm of the Lord been revealed?”
languages.arabic: ليتم كلام أشعياء النبى الذي قاله: يارب من صدق خبرنا. ولمن أعلنت ذراع الرب.

languages.coptic: Eybe vai ne m~mons~jom m~mwou e~nah]: je afjoc on n~je ?ca/~ac: Je afywm n~noubal: ouoh afywm m~pouh/t: hina n~tous~temnau n~noubal: ouoh n~toustem ka] qen pouh/t: ouoh n~toukotou haroi n~tatoujwou:
languages.english: Therefore they could not believe, because Isaiah said again: “He has blinded their eyes and hardened their hearts, Lest they should see with their eyes, Lest they should understand with their hearts and turn, So that I should heal them.”
languages.arabic: ومن أجل هذا لم يكونوا ليقدروا أن يؤمنوا لأن أشعياء قال أيضاً: قد طمس عيونهم وقفل قلوبهم لئلا يبصروا بعيونهم ويفهموا بقلوبهم ويرجعوا إلى فأشفيهم.

languages.coptic: Nai afjotou n~je ?ca/~ac je afnau e~p~w~ou m~Vnou] ouoh afcaji eyb/tf.
languages.english: These things Isaiah said when he saw His glory and spoke of Him.
languages.arabic: قال أشعياء هذا لأنه رأى مجد الله وتكلم عنه،

languages.coptic: O~mwc men]oi oum/s e~bolqen nikear,wn aunah] e~rof: alla nauouwnh m~mof e~bolan pe eybe nivariceoc: je n~nouaitou n~a~pocunagwgoc:
languages.english: Nevertheless even among the rulers many believed in Him, but because of the Pharisees they did not confess Him, lest they should be put out of the synagogue;
languages.arabic: ومع ذلك فإن كثيراً من الرؤساء أيضاً آمنوا به، ولكنهم لسبب الفريسيين لم يعترفوا به لئلا يصيروا خارج المجمع

languages.coptic: Aumenre p~w~ou gar n~nirwmi mallon e~hote p~w~ou m~Vnou].
languages.english: For they loved the praise of men more than the praise of God.
languages.arabic: لأنهم أحبوا مجد الناس أكثر من مجد الله.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Sixth Hour of the eve of Thursday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة السادسة، من ليلة الخميس من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: Isaiah the prophet—by the Spirit—chastizes the sons of Israel for their foolishness and rebukes them outright because of the vileness of their deeds and their sins.
languages.arabic: أشعياء النبى يصرخ بالروح نحو الشعب الجاهل بنى اسرائيل، يبكتهم بغير محاباة من أجل دنس أعمالهم وآثامهم.

languages.english: They rejected the miracles that Immanuel made, rejected His words full of grace and leaned towards myths and vagaries and rejected the glory of His divinity.
languages.arabic: لما ظهر عمانوئيل وصنع أعمالاً تبهر العقول، فتعدوا أقواله المملوءة نعمة ومالوا إلى الخرافات والأعمال الباطلة، وجحدوا مجد لاهوته،

languages.english: O great prophet (Isaiah), chastise these disobedient children and fruitless trees for they have emulated their fathers and followed on their heels: O Lord who believes our word?
languages.arabic: أعنى الأبناء المرذولين والزرع الغير مثمر، بكت رأيهم أيها النبى العظيم، لأنهم تشبهوا بآبائهم وكملوا مكاييلهم فقال: يارب من صدق خبرنا؟

languages.english: And Your arm, O Lord, to whom has it been announced? The voice of the Lord is His only-begotten Son who appeared in the flesh to the sons of Israel.
languages.arabic: وذراعك يارب لمن أعلنت؟ إن صوت الرب هو إبنه الوحيد الذي تراءى بالجسد لبنى اسرائيل

languages.english: He showed in them His mercy and His justice and nevertheless they did not obey Him and did not believe in Him.
languages.arabic: وعدله ورحمته أظهرهما فيهم، ومع هذا لم يطيعوا ولم يؤمنوا به.

languages.english: How could they believe: Isaiah prophesied about them and said: I blind their eyes, harden their hearts, deafen their ears and their understanding altogether.
languages.arabic: كيف يؤمنون وأشعياء سبق فنطق من أجلهم هكذا قائلاً: إنه أطمس عيونهم وبلد قلوبهم وثقل آذانهم وأفهامهم.

languages.english: Listen O Israel; no one else will save you from God's wrath but Jesus the Savior of the world, He who made the two into one by His Incarnation.
languages.arabic: أسمع يا اسرائيل، ليس آخر يقوم يخلص شعبك من قبله إلا يسوع مخلص العالم الذي جعل الإثنين واحداً بتجسده.

languages.english: The light has come to His own and His own loved the darkness and the Gentiles accepted His commandments and became His nation everywhere.
languages.arabic: جاء النور إلى خاصته وخاصته لم تقبله، بل أحبوا الظلمة والشعوب الغريبة قبلت وصاياه وصارت له شعباً مجتمعاً فى كل مكان،

languages.english: They experience His mercy and His immeasurable grace that He bestowed on them.
languages.arabic: وعرفوا رحمته وغزير نعمته التى أفاضها عليهم كصلاحه.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Iezeki/l pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Ezekiel the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من حزقيال النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Eybe vai caji nem p~/I m~Piicra/l p~s/ri m~v~rwmi ouoh eke~joc nwou: je nai ne n/e~tefjwm~mwou n~je Adwnai P[oic:
languages.english: "Therefore speak to the house of Israel, son of man, and you shall say to them, 'Thus says the Lord:
languages.arabic: لأجل ذلك كلم بيت اسرائيل يا إبن آدم، وقل لهم: هذا ما يقوله أدوناى الرب،

languages.coptic: Je sa e~qoun e~taiounou au]jwnt n/i n~je netenio] n~q~r/i qen nouparap~ twma n/etauhei n~q/tou e~qoun e~roi:
languages.english: "Up to this point, your fathers provoked Me by the transgressions they committed against Me.
languages.arabic: إلى هذه الساعة أغضبنى آباؤكم بآثامهم التى سقطوا فيها أمامى،

languages.coptic: Ouoh ai[itou e~qoun e~p~kahi v/e~tai couten tajij e~bolhijwf: ouoh aunau e~yal niben et[oci: nem capec/t n~s~s/n niben etoi n~lajwbi:
languages.english: But I led them into the land I swore with an oath to give them, and they saw every high hill and every shade tree.
languages.arabic: وأدخلتهم إلى الأرض التى بسطت يدي عليها لأعطيهم إياها. فرأوا كل تل عال، وإلى أسفل كل الأشجار المورقة

languages.coptic: Ouoh ausetsouswousi m~mau n~ninou]: ouoh auyws n~c~yoinoufi m~pima e~te m~mau ouoh au ouw~ten m~mau n~ouw~ten e~bol.
languages.english: There they sacrificed to their gods; and there they appointed fragrant offerings and poured out their drink offerings.
languages.arabic: وذبحوا هناك الذبائح للآلهة وقربوا البخور فى ذلك الموضع وسكبوا هناك سكائبهم

languages.coptic: Ouoh aijoc nwou: je oupe abbana je n~ywten tetennase e~qoun e~mau:
languages.english: Then I said to them, 'What is this high place you go to?'
languages.arabic: فقلت لهم: ما هذه الأبانا المرتفعة التى تدخلون إليها؟

languages.coptic: Ouoh aumou] e~pefran je abbana sa e~qoun e~voou n~e~hoou: Eybe vai a~joc m~p~/i m~pI~icra/l:
languages.english: So they call its name Bamah, to this day.'" Therefore say to the house of Israel,
languages.arabic: فدعى أسمها أبانا إلى هذا اليوم، لذلك قلت لبيت اسرائيل

languages.coptic: je nai ne n/e~tefjw m~mwou n~je P[oic P[oic: je icje a~retenna[wqem n~ywten qen nia~nomia~ n~te niio] ouoh tetennamowi camenh/ n~nouw~reb:
languages.english: 'Thus says the Lord: "Do you defile yourselves with the lawlessness of your fathers, and commit fornication after their abominations?
languages.arabic: هذا ما يقوله الرب، إذ كنتم ستتنجسون بآثام الآباء وتتبعون أرجاسهم بتقديم باكورات تقدماتكم

languages.coptic: Nem qen niar,/ n~te netentaio qen p~jinouw~] e~bol n~netens/ri qen pi,rwm: nowten teten[aqem qen netenmeui~ t/rou sa e~qoun e~voou n~e~hoou: a~nok hw ]nae~rouw nwten p~/i m~Piicra/l:
languages.english: You defile yourselves in the first fruits of your gifts with all your inventions to this very day. Shall I answer you, O house of Israel?
languages.arabic: وإجازة إبنائكم فى النار، تتنجسون بجميع أفكاركم إلى هذا اليوم، وأنا أيضاً هل أجاوبكم يا بيت اسرائيل؟

languages.coptic: }wnq a~nok pe je A~dwnai P[oic: je an ]nae~rouw nwten. Je an vai nai~ e~jen petenpna ouoh n~nec swpi m~pair/]: Ouoh a~retenjw m~moc n~ywten
languages.english: "As I live," says the Lord, "I will not answer you, nor will an answer occur to your spirit; for it will not be as you say,
languages.arabic: حى أنا، يقول أدوناى الرب إننى لا أجاوبكم، سوف لا يخطر هذا على بالكم ولن يكون هذا،

languages.coptic: Je tetennaswpi m~v~r/] n~nieynoc: nem m~v~r/] n~ni.u,/ n~te nirwmi: ep~jinsemsi n~hanse nemhan w~ni:
languages.english: 'We will be like the nations and like the tribes of the earth, to worship trees and stones.'
languages.arabic: إذ تقولون إننا سنصير مثل الأمم وكقبائل الأرض وكنفوس البشر فنعبد الخشب والحجر،

languages.coptic: Eybe vai ]onq a~nok: peje Adwnai P[oic: je n~q~r/i qen oujij eca~mahi: nem ouswbs ef[oci nem oum~bon efven e~bol: ]naerouro e~jen y/nou.
languages.english: "Therefore, as I live," says the Lord, "I will reign over you with a mighty hand, with a high arm, and with anger poured out.
languages.arabic: فلذلك حى أنا يقول أدوناى الرب، إننى بيد عزيزة وبذراع عالية وبغضب مسكوب أملك عليكم.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: P[oic panou] ai,ah~y/i e~rok nahmet ouoh matoujoi: e~bol n~totou n~n/et[oji n~cwi:
languages.english: O Lord my God, in You I hope; Save me from all who pursue me, and deliver me,
languages.arabic: أيها الرب إلهى عليك توكلت فخلصنى، ومن أيدى جميع الطاردين لى نجنى،

languages.coptic: M/pote n~touhwlem: n~ta'u,/ m~vr/] n~oumoui: all/louia.
languages.english: Lest like a lion he snatch away my soul: Alleluia.
languages.arabic: لئلا يخطفوا نفسى مثل الأسد: الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: V/e~ta paiwt tpif n/i ounis] pe e~ouon niben: ouoh m~mon h~li nas~holmou e~bolqen t~jij m~paiwt:
languages.english: My Father, who has given them to Me, is greater than all; and no one is able to snatch them out of My Father’s hand.
