languages.arabic: ابى الذي أعطانى إياها هو أعظم من الكل، فلا يقدر أحد أن يخطفها من يد أبى.

languages.coptic: Anok nem paiwt a~non ouai: Auel wni oun n~je niIoudai hina n~cehioui~ e~jwf.
languages.english: I and My Father are one.” Then the Jews took up stones again to stone Him.
languages.arabic: أنا وأبى واحد. فتناول اليهود حجارة ليرجموه

languages.coptic: Afe~rouw~ nwou n~je I/couc efjw m~moc: je oum/s n~hwb e~naneu aitamwten e~rwou e~bolhiten paiwt: eybe as oun n~hwb tetennahiw~ni e~jwi:
languages.english: Jesus answered them, “Many good works I have shown you from My Father. For which of those works do you stone Me?”
languages.arabic: فأجابهم يسوع قائلاً: أعمالاً كثيرة حسنة أريتكم إياها من عند أبى، فمن أجل أى عمل ترجموننى.

languages.coptic: Aue~rouw~ naf n~je niIoudai ouoh pejwou je: eybe ouhwb e~nanef tennahiw~ni e~jwk an alla eybe oujeoua~: je n~yok ourwmi hwk k~iri m~mok n~nou]:
languages.english: The Jews answered Him, saying, “For a good work we do not stone You, but for blasphemy, and because You, being a Man, make Yourself God.”
languages.arabic: فأجابه اليهود قائلين: لسنا من أجل عمل حسن نرجمك بل لأجل تجديف، لأنك وأنت إنسان تجعل نفسك إلهاً

languages.coptic: Afe~rouw~ nwou n~je I/couc ouoh pejaf: je m/ c~c~q/out an qen petennomoc je a~nok aijoc je n~ywten hannou].
languages.english: Jesus answered them, “Is it not written in your law, ‘I said, “You are gods” ’?
languages.arabic: . فأجابهم يسوع وقال: أليس مكتوب فى ناموسكم أنا قلت أنكم آلهة،

languages.coptic: Icje afjoc n~n/ je nou] n/eta~ p~caji m~Vnou] swpi harwou ouoh m~mon s~jom n~te ]g~rav/ bwl e~bol: V/eta~ v~iwt teubof ouoh afouorpf epikocmoc n~ywten tetenjwm~moc je akje oua~je aijoc je a~nok pe p~s/ri m~Vnou].
languages.english: If He called them gods, to whom the word of God came (and the Scripture cannot be broken), do you say of Him whom the Father sanctified and sent into the world, ‘You are blaspheming,’ because I said, ‘I am the Son of God’?
languages.arabic: فإن كان قد قال آلهة لأولئك الذين صارت إليهم كلمة الله ولايمكن أن ينقض المكتوب فالذي قدسه الآب وأرسله إلى العالم أتقولون له أنتم أنك تجدف لأنى قلت أنا إبن الله.

languages.coptic: Icje ]i~ri an n~nih~b/oui~ n~te paiwt m~pernah] e~roi: Icje de ]i~ri m~mwou kan e~swp a~retenstemnah] e~roi nah] e~nihb/oui~: hina n~tetene~mi ouoh n~tetencwoun je a~nok ]qen paiwt ouoh paiwt n~q/t.
languages.english: If I do not do the works of My Father, do not believe Me; but if I do, though you do not believe Me, believe the works, that you may know and believe that the Father is in Me, and I in Him.”
languages.arabic: إن كنت لا أعمل أعمال أبى فلا تؤمنوا بى، وإن كنت أعملها فإن لم تؤمنوا بى، فآمنوا بالأعمال، لتعلموا وتعرفوا أنى أنا فى أبى وأبى فى.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Ninth Hour of the eve of Thursday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة التاسعة، من ليلة الخميس من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: O you foolish obstinate, corrupt and contrary people, listen to the Merciful with His divine mouth praise the faithful saying;
languages.arabic: أيها الناس الجهلة المعاندون، الشعب النجس، والمخالف، اسمعوا الرحوم بفمه الإلهى يمدح المؤمنين به قائلاً:

languages.english: what the Father has given me is more precious than all the things on earth, and no one can take them away from my Father's hand.
languages.arabic: الذي أعطانى الآب هو أعظم من كل من على الأرض، وليس أحد يقدر أن يخطفهم و لا يسلبهم من يد أبى

languages.english: I and the Father are one with the Holy Spirit without separation.
languages.arabic: وأنا والآب واحد مع الروح القدس بغير إفتراق.

languages.english: When the Jews in their envy picked the rocks to stone Him, He responded to them in modesty saying: I did among you good deeds from My Father.
languages.arabic: وللوقت تناول اليهود حجارة بحسد عظيم ليرجموه، فأجابهم المخلص بوداعة ليعلمهم: أظهرت لكم أعمالاً حسنة مكرمة جداً من عند أبى،

languages.english: What do you stone Me for when I seek your salvation? Know and be certain you foolish Jews that I am in My Father and My Father is in Me.
languages.arabic: من أجل أى شئ ترجموننى وأنا أريد خلاصكم؟ إعلموا وتيقنوا أيها اليهود الجهال أننى فى أبى وأبى فى.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen ?ca/~ac pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Isaiah the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من إشعياء النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Ouoh ece~swpi qen pie~hoou e~tem~mau e~jen twou niben et[oci: nem e~jen kalamvo niben eth~loulwou: n~je oumwou efcwk mpie~hoou e~te mmau: e~swp a~resan oum/s tako: n~tefhei n~je pipurgoc.
languages.english: On every high mountain and on every high hill there will be streams in that day, when many perish and the towers fall.
languages.arabic: وسيكون في ذلك اليوم علي كل جبل شامخ وعلي كل أكمة مرتفعة ماء يجري،

languages.coptic: Nte v~ouwini mpiioh ermv~r/] mv~r/: ouoh v~ouwini mv~r/ n~sasf n~kwb: mpie~hoou e~te mmau: afsantal[o m~p~qomqem mpeflaoc: ouoh afsan tal[o m~petkac n~te pekerqot:
languages.english: In that day, the light of the moon will be as the light of the sun, and the light of the sun will be sevenfold, when the Lord heals the wound of His people and the pain of your plague.
languages.arabic: في ذلك اليوم عندما يهلك كثير ويسقط البرج، ويكون نور القمر كنور الشمس، ونور الشمس يصير سبعة أضعاف، في ذلك اليوم إذا ما جبر الرب كسر شعبه وداوي ضربات جراحه،

languages.coptic: Ic v~ran P[oic n/ou hiten ounis] n~c/ou: oujwnt efmoh nem ouw~ou pe p~caji n~tenef c~votou: picaji de efmoh n~jwnt: ouoh p~jwnt n~te pefm~bon efe~ouwm m~v~r/] n~ou,rwm.
languages.english: Behold, the name of the Lord comes after a long time, a burning anger. The teaching of His lips is with glory, a revelation full of wrath, and the wrath of His anger shall devour like fire.
languages.arabic: هوذا إسم الرب يأتي من زمن بعيد غضب مشتعل ومجد هو كلام شفتيه، والكلام مملوء حنقاً ورجز سخطه يأكل كنار،

languages.coptic: Pefp~neuma n/ou m~v~r/] n~oumwou efcwk: qen oumouncwrem sa nimo]: ouoh efe~vws syorter e~nieynoc: e~jen ]p~lan/ etsouit: ouoh ouon oup~lan/ na[oji n~cwou: ouoh cena[itou: mpoumyo e~bol.
languages.english: His breath, like an overflowing stream in a valley, shall reach up to the neck and be divided, to trouble the nations for their vain error; and error shall pursue and overtake them.
languages.arabic: وتأتي نفخة مثل الماء الجاري في واد إلي الأعناق. ويقسم علي الأمم قلقاً لأجل الضلالة الباطلة، وستكدرهم الضلالة وتأخذهم علي وجوههم،

languages.coptic: M/ hw] eyreten ereuv~ranicye n~c/ou niben: ouoh e~ se e~qoun en/eyu n~t/i n~c/ou niben: m~v~r/] n~n/etersai ouoh etounof: e~se e~qoun nem ouc/bi n~jw e~pitwou n~te Vnou] e~ratf mpinou] etjor: ouoh v/eyu n~te p~Icra/l:
languages.english: Must you always be glad, and go into My holy places continually, as those who keep a feast, and must you always go with a flute, as those who are glad when they go into the mountain of the Lord, to the God of Israel?
languages.arabic: هل تتنعمون كل وقت وتدخلون مقادسي كل حين كالمعيدين والفرحين وتدخلون بآلات اللهو إلي جبل الله، إلي الإله القوي قدوس اسرائيل؟

languages.coptic: Ouoh Vnou] efe~y~roucwtem e~p~w~ou n~tefc~m/: ouoh f~naouwnh e~bol mp~jwnt mpefswbs: n~tefi~ni e~jwou n~han[a~lauj n~jonc: nem oujwnt n~te oumbon: nem ousah n~te oum~bon efeouwm m~v~r/] n~oumwou nem oua~l eun/ou e~pec/t n~jonc eucop.
languages.english: God will cause His glorious voice to be heard, and He will show the anger of His arm with anger and wrath, and the flame of a devouring fire. He shall strike violently with thunderbolts, and His wrath shall be as water and violent hail.
languages.arabic: فيسمعهم الله جلال صوته, ويظهر نزول غضب ذراعه ويأتي عليهم بأرجل غاضبة وغضب وحنق ولهيب الرجز يأكل مثل الماء والبرد النازلين بعنف.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen niparoimia~ n~te Colomwn pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Proverbs of Solomon the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من أمثال سليمان النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Pas/ri a~reh e~ninomoc n~te pekiwt: ouoh m~per,wn~cwk n~nico[ni n~te tekmau: morou e~tek'u,/ qen outajro:
languages.english: My son, guard the laws of your father, and do not depart from the rules of your mother.
languages.arabic: يا إبني إحفظ شريعة أبيك ولا ترفض مشورة أمك،

languages.coptic: n~tekaitou n~ou,lal e~pekmo]: e~swp aksanmosi a~litou nemak:
languages.english: But fasten them to your soul continually and wear them as a collar upon your neck.
languages.arabic: أربطها بثبات في نفسك واجعلها قلادة في عنقك،

languages.coptic: Ouoh marecswpi nak aksan enkot mareca~reh e~rok: je ,ac aksan twnk n~tec caji nemak. ]entol/ gar n~te Vnou] oureferouwini te:
languages.english: When you walk about, bring along this commandment and let it be with you; and as you sleep, let it guard you, that when you arise, it may speak to you.
languages.arabic: وإذا مشيت خذها معك ولتكن لك، وإذا نمت فلتحرسك حتى إذا استيقظت فإنها تحدثك

languages.coptic: Pinomoc de ououwini pe n~temwit niben. Sare ]c~bw gar j~ve nimwit n~te pia~hi:
languages.english: For a commandment of law is a lamp and a light, and the way of life is reproof and instruction,
languages.arabic: لأن وصية الله مصباح والناموس نور كل السبل، لأنه الأدب يكسب طريقه طول العمر،

languages.coptic: je,ac ece~a~reh e~rok e~ouc~himi n~yok an te: nem e~bolha oudi a~bal/ n~lac c~nau: nem ou,rof n~te ourwmi n~semmo:
languages.english: that you may keep yourself from a married woman and from the slanderous tongue of a strange woman.
languages.arabic: لكي يحفظك من امرأة ليست هي لك ومن دغل ذي لسانين وغش إنسان غريب،

languages.coptic: Mpeny~ref[~ro e~rok n~je p~cai n~te oue~piyumia~: ouoh m~peny~rec jwrj e~rok: ouoh m~peny~rec holmek qen necnoh:
languages.english: Do not let the desire of beauty conquer you; neither be caught by her eyes, nor captivated by her eyelids;
languages.arabic: فلا يغلبك جمال الشهوة ولا تصيدك ولا تقتنصك بحبالها

languages.coptic: Ptaio~ gar n~ouc~himi m~porn/ sa ouwik n~ouwt: sare t~c~himi jwrj n~t~'u,/ m~pirwmiettai/out:
languages.english: for the value of a prostitute is only one loaf, and such a woman hunts for the precious souls of men.
languages.arabic: لأنه بسبب إمرأة زانية تفتقر الى رغيف خبز واحد والمرأة تصطاد نفس الرجل الكريم.

languages.coptic: M/ ouon ouai namer hanjebc n~,rwm e~kenf n~tefs~tem rwkh n~nefh~bwc: ie ouon ouai namosi e~jen hanjebc n~,rwm n~tefs~tem jofjef nef[a~lauj.
languages.english: Shall anyone bind fire to his bosom and his garments not burn? Or will anyone walk about on coals of fire and not burn his feet?
languages.arabic: أيضم أحد جمر نار في حضنه ولا تحترق ثيابه؟ أم يمشي أحد علي جمر نار ولا تكتوى رجلاه؟

languages.coptic: Pair/] ourwmi efnase e~qoun haouc~himi e~ouonhai n~tac: n~nefswpi eftoub/out e~nobi: oude ouon niben et[inemac:
languages.english: Likewise is the one who goes in to a married woman; he shall not be guiltless, nor any who touch her.
languages.arabic: هكذا إنسان يدخل على إمرأة ذات زوج لا يكون بريئاً من الخطية ولا من يمسها.

languages.coptic: N~ous~v/ri an pe ausan jem ouai ef[ioui~: f~[ioui~ gar je efe~t~ci n~tef'u,/ echoker: ausantahof de f~nat/itou n~sasf n~kwb: ouoh f~na] n~nefhupar,onta t/rou n~tef toujof:
languages.english: It is not surprising if anyone who steals is caught, for he steals that he may fill his hungry soul; but if he is caught, he will repay sevenfold, and by giving all his goods, he shall deliver himself.
languages.arabic: لا عجب إذا وجد أحد سارقاً فإنه يسرق ليشبع نفسه الجائعة. وإذا أمسك يعطي سبعة أضعاف ويعطي كل ما له ليخلص،

languages.coptic: Pinwik de eybe tefmetath/t efe~jvo n~outako n~tef.uk/ f~nafai qa hanemkah n~h/t nem hansws: ouoh pefs~vit nafw] e~bol an sa e~neh.
languages.english: But the adulterer through his lack of discernment obtains the destruction of his soul; he bears both pain and dishonor, and his disgrace will not be wiped away forever.
languages.arabic: أما الفاسق فمن أجل جهله سيجلب علي نفسه هلاكاً ويقاسي أحزاناً وخزياً وعاره لا يمحي إلي الأبد،

languages.coptic: Pjwnt m~pechai moh gar n~,rwm m~paf]a~co gar qen oue~hoou n~]sebiw: ouoh f~na,wp an n~tefmetjaji qah~li n~cw]: oude f~nabwl an qahli n~dwron.
languages.english: For the anger of her husband is full of jealousy; he will not spare in the day of judgment; he will not take any ransom in exchange for his hatred, nor will he be reconciled by many gifts.
languages.arabic: لأن حنق رجلها يلتهب ناراً ولن يشفق في المجازة ولا يخفي عداوته نظير أي فدية ولا نظير أي هدية.

languages.coptic: Pas/ri: a~reh e~ nacaji: ouoh n~tek ,wp n~naentol/ qatotk: mataie Vnou] tarekjemjom: ouoh m~pererho] qa t~h/ n~keouai e~b/l e~rof:
languages.english: My son, guard my words, and hide my commandments within yourself; my son, honor the Lord, and you shall be strong, and fear none other but Him.
languages.arabic: يا إبني إحفظ كلامي وإدخر وصاياي عندك. أكرم الله لتتقوي ولا تخف أحدا سواه،

languages.coptic: A~reh e~naentol/ eke~wnq: moi n~nacaji e~nekt/b m~vr/] n~t~allou n~oubal c~q/tou hijen p~swk m~pekh/t:
languages.english: Guard my commandments and you will live, and my words as the pupils of your eyes; and put them around your fingers, and write them upon the breadth of your heart.
languages.arabic: وإحفظ وصاياه فتحيا، وإحرص علي كلامي كحدقة العين، وأربطه علي أصابعك. أكتبه في عمق قلبك،

languages.coptic: a~joc n~]covia~ je tacwni: ouoh pika] pe pekrwmi.
languages.english: Say that wisdom is your sister, and gain discernment as a friend for yourself.
languages.arabic: قل للحكمة: أنت أختي وللفهم هو رجلك.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

title.arabic: عظة لابينا القديس أنبا يوحنا ذهبى الفم

languages.coptic: Oukat/,/cic n~te peniwt eyouab abba Iwann/c pi,~rucoctomoc: e~re pefc~mou eyouab swpi neman: a~m/n.
languages.english: A homily of our holy father Abba John Chrysostom. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: عظة لابينا القديس يوحنا ذهبى الفم: بركته المقدسة تكون معنا آمين.

languages.coptic: }ouws de oun w~nic~n/ou e~]m~vmeui~ nwten m~pe]jw m~mof nwten n~oum/s n~cop: e~tev~nau pe eten[i e~bolqen nimuct/rion eyouab n~te Pi,~rictoc.
languages.english: I want to remind you with what I repeatedly reiterated to you concerning our communion with the Holy Mysteries which is of Christ.
languages.arabic: أريد أن أذكركم أيها الإخوة بما قلته لكم مرات عديدة وقت تناولنا من الأسرار المقدسة التي للمسيح

languages.coptic: Aisannau e~rwten qen oubwl e~bol nem ounis] m~metatho] ecem~p~sa n~nehpi e~roc n~tarimi e~roi m~minm~moi
languages.english: I see you in a state of extreme looseness, permissiveness, and an alarming audacity and lamentable recklessness.
languages.arabic: إذ رأيتكم في إنحلال عظيم وعدم مخافة تستوجب النوح

languages.coptic: Ouoh n~tajoc qen pameui~: je hara nai ce cwoun holwc je euohi e~ratou e~nim:
languages.english: I weep over my condition and ask myself; Do these people really know for whom do they stand?
languages.arabic: فأبكي علي نفسي وأقوال في فكري: هل تري هؤلاء عارفون لمن هم قائمون،

languages.coptic: Ie je ceernoin e~t~jom m~pimuct/rion je oupe: ouoh pair/] sai m~bon qen paouws an:
languages.english: Or do these people realize the power of this Mystery? At this thought I become angry reluctantly.
languages.arabic: أم تري هم عارفون ماهي قوة هذا السر. وعند ذلك أغضب بغير إرادتي،

languages.coptic: Icjek nai ouws e~i~ e~bolqen tetenm/] hiten pihojhej n~te ta'u,/: ouoh acsanswpi n~tacohi n~ouai e~bolqen y/nou nafer acyanecye holwc: Alla safer ,remrem n~cwi hwc e~tai[itf n~jonc.
languages.english: If I could go away, I would have left your community out of distraughtness. If I scold one of you, he disregards my words and resents the reprimand as if I were unfair to him.
languages.arabic: حتي لو إستطعت الخروج لخرجت من بينكم من ضيق نفس، وإذا ما وبخت أحداً منكم فلم يكترث بقولي، بل يتذمر علي كأنني قد ظلمته!

languages.coptic: W]nis] n~s~v/ri: n/et[iy/nou n~jonc euw~li n~netenen,ai tetenjwnt e~rwou an m~v~r/] e~tetenjwnt e~roi a~nok eyouws m~petenoujai.
languages.english: I am amazed that you do not get angry at those who violate you and plunder your possessions as much as you are angry at me; I who am keen over your salvation.
languages.arabic: يا لهذا العجب العظيم إن الذين يظلمونكم ويسلبون أمتعتكم لم تغضبوا عليهم كغضبكم علي الآن أنا الذي أغار علي خلاصكم

languages.coptic: }oi n~ho] ouoh ]nehself e~taie~mi m~p~]sebiw eynaswpi nwten e~bol hiten Vnou]: eybe pir/] e~te tenerkatavronin m~pai nis] m~muct/rion
languages.english: I dread the thought that God’s wrath may be inflicted upon you because of your disregard of this great Mystery.
languages.arabic: والخائف بوجل من أن يحل بكم عقاب الله بسبب تهاونكم بهذا السر العظيم.

languages.coptic: <ara tetene~mi je nim pe vai e~tetenouws e~[i e~boln~q/tf: picwma eyu n~te Vnou] pilogoc: nem pefc~nof e~taft/if qapenoujai.
languages.english: Do you really know who is He you want to partake of? This is the Holy Body of God the Word, and His blood that He offered for our salvation.
languages.arabic: أتري تعلمون من هذا الذي تريدون أن تتناولوا منه؟ هو الجسد المقدس الذي لله الكلمة، ودمه الذي بذله عن خلاصنا.

languages.coptic: Vaia~resan ouai [i e~boln~q/tf qen oumetatemp~sa: efe~swpi naf n~ou,rima nem oujwr e~bol. Mv~r/] hwf e~taswpi n~Ioudac v/ e~taf] m~P[oic e~bol qen p~jinyref[i e~bol n~q/tf qen oumetatm~p~sa.
languages.english: Anyone who partakes in it undeservingly will suffer abominable punishment; as was the case with Judas who betrayed God when he had communion with Him without being worthy.
languages.arabic: هذا إذا تناول أحد منه بغير استحقاق يكون له عقوبة ومحقاً، كما صار ليهوذا الذي أسلم الرب عندما تناول منه بغير استحقاق.

languages.coptic: Marener c~v~rajizin n~]kat/,/cic n~te peniwt eyouab abba Iwann/c pi,~rucoctomoc v/e~taferouwini m~pennouc: nem nibal n~te nenh/t: qen v~ran m~Viwt nem Ps/ri nem Pip~neuma eyouab ounou] n~ouwt: a~m/n.
languages.english: We conclude the homily of our holy father Abba John Chrysostom who enlightened our minds and our hearts. In the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
languages.arabic: فلنختم موعظة أبينا القديس يوحنا ذهبى الفم: الذي أنار عقولنا وعيون قلوبنا بإسم الآب والإبن والروح القدس الإله الواحد آمين.

languages.english: The Psalm "Your Throne (Peky~ronoc)" is chanted in the “Shammy” tune:

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Peky~ronoc Vnou] sa e~neh n~te pie~neh: ouoh pis~bwt m~p~cwouten pe p~s~bwt n~te tekmetouro:
languages.english: Your throne, O God, is forever and ever; Your royal scepter is a scepter of uprightness.
languages.arabic: كرسيك يا الله إلي دهر الدهور. قضيب الاستقامة هو قضيب ملكك.

languages.coptic: Wouniatf m~v/eynaka] e~jen ouh/ki nem oujwb: qen pie~hoou ethwou efe~nahmef n~je P[oic: all/louia.
languages.english: Blessed is he who understands the poor and needy; the Lord will deliver him in an evil day. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: طوبى للذي يتفهم في أمر المسكين والفقير في اليوم السوء ينجيه الرب. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Matyeon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Matthew. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار متى البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Mv~r/] gar n~ourwmi efnasenaf e~p~semmo afmou] e~nefe~biaik ouoh af] m~petentaf e~totou:
languages.english: “For the kingdom of heaven is like a man traveling to a far country, who called his own servants and delivered his goods to them.
languages.arabic: كمثل إنسان مسافر، دعا عبيده وسلمهم أمواله،

languages.coptic: Ouai men af]naf n~t~iou n~jin[w~r: ke ouai de af]naf n~c~nau ke ouai de af]naf n~ouai: piouai piouai kata tefjom ouoh afsenaf e~p~semmo:
languages.english: And to one he gave five talents, to another two, and to another one, to each according to his own ability; and immediately he went on a journey.
languages.arabic: فأعطي واحداً خمس وزنات، وآخر وزنتين وآخر وزنة كل واحد علي قدر طاقته وسافر للوقت.

languages.coptic: Afsenaf de n~je v/e~taf[im~pit~iou n~jin[wr aferhwb n~q/tou ouoh afj~ve ke t~iou:
languages.english: Then he who had received the five talents went and traded with them, and made another five talents.
languages.arabic: فمضي الذي أخذ الخمس وزنات وتاجر بها فربح خمس وزنات أخر،

languages.coptic: Pair/] on v/e~taf[i m~pic~nau afjve ke c~nau.
languages.english: And likewise he who had received two gained two more also.
languages.arabic: الذي أخذ الوزنتين. ربح وزنتين اخريين.

languages.coptic: V/ de e~taf[i m~piouai afsenaf afswk n~oukahi ouoh af,wp m~pihat n~te pef[oic: Menenca ounis] de n~c/ou afi n~je P[oic n~nie~biaik e~tem~mau ouoh affiwp nemwou:
languages.english: But he who had received one went and dug in the ground, and hid his lord’s money. After a long time the lord of those servants came and settled accounts with them.
languages.arabic: وأما الذي اخذ الوزنة فمضى وحفر في الأرض ودفن فضة سيده. وبعد زمان كثير جاء سيد اولئك العبيد وحاسبهم،

languages.coptic: Afi~ de n~je v/e~taf[i m~pit~iou n~jin[wr afen ke t~iou njin[wr efjw m~moc je Pa[oic t~iou n~jin[wr akt/itou n/i: ic ke t~iou n~jin[wr aij~vwou.
languages.english: “So he who had received five talents came and brought five other talents, saying, ‘Lord, you delivered to me five talents; look, I have gained five more talents besides them.’
languages.arabic: فجاء الذي أخذ الخمس الوزنات وقدم خمس وزنات أخر قائلاً: يا سيد خمس وزنات سلمتني وهذه خمس وزنات أخرى ربحتها.

languages.coptic: Peje pef[oic de naf je kalwc pibwk eynanef ouoh e~tenhot: e~pid/ akenhot qen hankouji eie~,ak hijen hannis]: masenak e~qoun e~v~rasi n~te pekoc:
languages.english: His lord said to him, ‘Well done, good and faithful servant; you were faithful over a few things, I will make you ruler over many things. Enter into the joy of your lord.’
languages.arabic: فقال له سيده: نعماً أيها العبد الصالح والأمين، قد وجدت أميناً في القليل فسأقيمك علي الكثير، أدخل إلي فرح سيدك.

languages.coptic: Afi~ de n~je v/e~taf[i m~pijin[w~r c~nau pejaf je pa ~: jin[w~r c~nau akt/itou n/i ic ke c~nau aij~vwou:
languages.english: He also who had received two talents came and said, ‘Lord, you delivered to me two talents; look, I have gained two more talents besides them.’
languages.arabic: ثم جاء الذي أخذ الوزنتين وقال: يا سيدي وزنتين سلمتني وهاتان وزنتان أخريان ربحتهما.

languages.coptic: Peje pefoc de naf je kalwc pibwk eynanef ouoh e~tenhot: e~pid/ akenhot qen hankouji eie~,ak hijen hannis]: masenak e~qoun e~v~rasi n~te pekoc.
languages.english: His lord said to him, ‘Well done, good and faithful servant; you have been faithful over a few things, I will make you ruler over many things. Enter into the joy of your lord.’
languages.arabic: فقال له سيده: نعماً أيها العبد الصالح والأمين، قد وجدت أميناً في القليل فسأقيمك علي الكثير. أدخل إلي فرح سيدك.

languages.coptic: Afi~ de hwf n~je v/e~taf[i m~pijin[wr pejaf: je pa[oic aie~mi je n~yok ourwmi efnast: ekwcq m~v/e~te mpekcatf ouoh eke~ywou] e~qoun m~v/e~te m~pek jorf e~bol:
languages.english: “Then he who had received the one talent came and said, ‘Lord, I knew you to be a hard man, reaping where you have not sown, and gathering where you have not scattered seed.
languages.arabic: ثم جاء أيضاً الذي أخذ الوزنة وقال: يا سيد علمت أنك إنسان قاس، تحصد الذي لم تزرعه وتجمع الذي لم تبذره،

languages.coptic: Ouoh aierho] aisen/i ai,wp m~pekjin[wr qen p~kahi: ic pete vwk n~tot.
languages.english: And I was afraid, and went and hid your talent in the ground. Look, there you have what is yours.’
languages.arabic: فخفت ومضيت ودفنت وزنتك في الأرض. وها هوذا مالك عندي.

languages.coptic: Afe~rouw~ de n~je pef[oic pejaf naf: je pibwk ethwou ouoh n~[enne: icje ake~mi je saiwcq m~v/e~te m~picatf: ouoh saiywou] e~qoun m~v/e~te m~pijorf e~bol:
languages.english: “But his lord answered and said to him, ‘You wicked and lazy servant, you knew that I reap where I have not sown, and gather where I have not scattered seed.
languages.arabic: فأجاب سيده وقال له: أيها العبد الشرير والكسلان، إن كنت قد علمت أني أحصد من حيث لم أزرع، وأجمع من حيث لم أبذر،

languages.coptic: Nacemp~sa oun nak pe e~] m~pahat e~totou nnit~rapezit/c: ouoh a~nok aiwani~ naina[i m~petevwi nem tefm/ci: A~lioui~ oun m~pijin[wr n~totf m~vai m/if m~va pim/t n~jin[wr.
languages.english: So you ought to have deposited my money with the bankers, and at my coming I would have received back my own with interest. Therefore take the talent from him, and give it to him who has ten talents.
languages.arabic: فكان ينبغي لك أن تسلم فضتي إلي الصيارفة، وكنت متي جئت إستلمتها مع ربحها. خذوا منه الوزنة وأعطوها لصاحب العشرة الوزنات،

languages.coptic: Ouon gar niben e~te ouontaf eue~] naf ouoh ere ouon erhouo e~rof: v/ de e~te m~mon n~taf v/e~ten~totf eue~olf n~totf: Ouoh piatsau mbwk e~te mmau hitf e~bol e~pi,aki etcabol pima e~te v~rimi naswpi mmof nem pic~yerter n~te ninajhi:
languages.english: ‘For to everyone who has, more will be given, and he will have abundance; but from him who does not have, even what he has will be taken away. And cast the unprofitable servant into the outer darkness. There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.’
languages.arabic: لأن كل من له يعطي ويزاد، ومن ليس له فالذي عنده يؤخذ منه وذلك العبد البطال ألقوه في الظلمة الخارجية. هناك يكون البكاء وصرير الاسنان.

languages.coptic: Eswp de afsani~ n~je p~s/ri mv~rwmi qen pefw~nem nefaggeloc eyu t/rou nemaf tote efe~hemci hijen p~y~ronoc n~te pefw~ou.
languages.english: “When the Son of Man comes in His glory, and all the holy angels with Him, then He will sit on the throne of His glory.
languages.arabic: ومتي جاء إبن الإنسان في مجده ومعه جميع ملائكته الأطهار، فحينئذ يجلس علي عرش مجده،

languages.coptic: Ouoh eue~ywou] nahraf n~je nieynoc t/rou: ouoh efe~vorjou e~bol nnoue~r/ou: m~v~r/] mpimane~cwou e~safvwrj n~nie~cwou e~bolqen nibaempi:
languages.english: All the nations will be gathered before Him, and He will separate them one from another, as a shepherd divides his sheep from the goats.
languages.arabic: وتجتمع أمامه جميع الشعوب، فيفرز بعضهم من بعض كما يفرز الراعي الخراف من الجداء،

languages.coptic: Ouoh nie~cwou men efe~,au catefoui~nam nibaempi de catefja[/:
languages.english: And He will set the sheep on His right hand, but the goats on the left.
languages.arabic: فيقيم الخراف عن يمينه والجداء عن يساره.

languages.coptic: Tote efe~joc n~je piouro n~n/etcatefouinam: je a~mwini haroi n/etc~marwout n~te paiwt a~rik~l/ronomin n~te ]metouro y/etcebtwt nwten icjen t~katabol/ m~pikocmoc.
languages.english: Then the King will say to those on His right hand, ‘Come, you blessed of My Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world:
languages.arabic: حينئذ يقول الملك للذين عن يمينه: تعالوا إلي يا مباركي أبي رثوا الملك المعد لكم منذ إنشاء العالم،

languages.coptic: Aih~ko gar ouoh a~tetentemmoi: aii~bi ouoh a~tetent~coi: nai oi n~semmo ouoh a~tetensopt e~rwten: Nai b/s ouoh a~tetenhobct: naiswni ouoh a~tetenjem pasini: nai ,/ qen pisteko ouoh ateteni~ saroi:
languages.english: For I was hungry and you gave Me food; I was thirsty and you gave Me drink; I was a stranger and you took Me in; I was naked and you clothed Me; I was sick and you visited Me; I was in prison and you came to Me.’
languages.arabic: لأني جعت فاطعمتموني, وعطشت فسقيتموني، وكنت غريباً فأويتموني، وعرياناً فكسوتموني، ومريضاً فزرتموني، ومحبوساً فأتيتم إلي.

languages.coptic: Tote eue~e~rouw~ naf n~je niy~m/i eujw m~moc: je Pen[oic e~tannau e~rok n~y~nau ekhoker ouoh antemmok: ie ekobi ouoh ant~cok.
languages.english: “Then the righteous will answer Him, saying, ‘Lord, when did we see You hungry and feed You, or thirsty and give You drink?
languages.arabic: حينئذ يجيبه الصديقون قائلين: يا رب متي رأيناك جائعاً فأطعمناك، أو عطشاناً فسقيناك؟

languages.coptic: Ie e~tannau erok n~y~nau ekoi n~semmo ouoh ansopk eron: ie ekb/s ouoh anhobck: Ie e~tannau erok n~y~nau ekswni ie ek,/ qen pis~teko ouoh ani~ sarok:
languages.english: When did we see You a stranger and take You in, or naked and clothe You? Or when did we see You sick, or in prison, and come to You?’
languages.arabic: ومتي رأيناك غريباً فأويناك، أو عرياناً فكسوناك؟ ومتي رأيناك مريضاً أو محبوساً فأتٍينا إليك؟

languages.coptic: Ouoh efe~e~rouw~ n~je piouro efe~joc nwou: je a~m/n ]jwm~moc nwten: je e~vocon a~retenaitou n~ouai n~naikouji n~c~n/ou n~t/i a~nok pe e~taretenaitou n/i.
languages.english: And the King will answer and say to them, ‘Assuredly, I say to you, inasmuch as you did it to one of the least of these My brethren, you did it to Me.’
languages.arabic: فيجيب الملك ويقول لهم: الحق أقول لكم إنكم كلما فعلتم ذلك بأحد أخوتي هؤلاء الصغار فبي فعلتموه.

languages.coptic: Tote efe~joc n~n/ethwou etcatef ja[/: je masenwten e~bolharoin/et c~houort e~pi,rwm n~e~neh: v/etcebtwt m~m~pidia~boloc nem ouoh m~petentemmoi: aii~bi ouoh mpetent~coi:
languages.english: “Then He will also say to those on the left hand, ‘Depart from Me, you cursed, into the everlasting fire prepared for the devil and his angels: for I was hungry and you gave Me no food;
languages.arabic: حينئذ يقول للأشرار الذين عن يساره: إذهبوا عني يا ملاعين إلي النار الأبدية المعدة لإبليس وملائكته لأني جعت فلم تطعموني

languages.coptic: Naioi nsemmo ouoh m~petensopt e~rwten naib/s ouoh m~petenhobct naiswni ouoh m~petenjempasini: nai,/ qen pis~teko ouoh m~peteni~ saroi:
languages.english: I was thirsty and you gave Me no drink; I was a stranger and you did not take Me in, naked and you did not clothe Me, sick and in prison and you did not visit Me.’
languages.arabic: وعطشت فلم تسقوني, وكنت غريباً فلم تأووني وعرياناً فلم تكسوني، كُنْتُ مَرِيضًا فَلَمْ تَزُورُونِي. ومَحْبُوسًا فَلَمْ تَأْتُوا إليَّ.

languages.coptic: Tote eue~e~rouw~ hwou eujw m~moc: je penoc e~tannau e~rok n~y~nau ekhoker ie ekobi: ie ekoi n~semmo ie ekb/s: ie ekswni ie ek,/ qen pis~teko ouoh m~pensems/tk.
languages.english: “Then they also will answer Him, saying, ‘Lord, when did we see You hungry or thirsty or a stranger or naked or sick or in prison, and did not minister to You?’
languages.arabic: حينئذ يجيبونه هم أيضاً قائلين: يا رب متي رأيناك جائعاً أو عطشاناً، أو غريباً أو عرياناً، أو مريضاً ولم نخدمك؟

languages.coptic: Tote efe~ e~rouw~ nwou efjw m~moc: je a~m/n ]jwm~moc nwten: je e~vocon m~petenaitou n~ouai n~naikouji oude a~nok m~petenaitou n/i: Ouoh eue~senwou n~je nai eukolacic n~e~neh niy~m/i de euwnq n~e~neh.
languages.english: Then He will answer them, saying, ‘Assuredly, I say to you, inasmuch as you did not do it to one of the least of these, you did not do it to Me.’ And these will go away into everlasting punishment, but the righteous into eternal life.”
languages.arabic: حينئذ يجيبهم قائلاً: الحق أقول لكم بما أنكم لم تفعلوه بأحد هؤلاء الصغار فبي لم تفعلوه. فيذهب هؤلاء إلي العذاب الدائم والصديقون إلي الحياة الأبدية.

languages.coptic: Ouoh acswpi e~ta I/couc jek naicaji t/rou e~bol pejaf n~nefmay/t/c: Je tetene~mi je menenca ke e~hoou c~nau pipac,a naswpi: ouoh p~s/ri m~v~rwmi cena/if eyrouasf.
languages.english: Now it came to pass, when Jesus had finished all these sayings, that He said to His disciples, “You know that after two days is the Passover, and the Son of Man will be delivered up to be crucified.”
languages.arabic: ولما أكمل يسوع هذه الأقوال كلها قال لتلاميذه: تعلمون أنه بعد يومين يكون الفصح وإبن الإنسان يسلم ليصلب.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Eleventh Hour of Tuesday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الحادية عشر، من يوم الثلاثاء من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: Against You only have I sinned. O God Almighty, forgive me. In audacity, I have committed iniquities and I was negligent in obeying Your orders.
languages.arabic: لك وحدك أخطأت أيها الرب ضابط الكل فإغفر لي يا ربي وإلهي, وصنعت الشر بجسارة وتكاسلت في أوامرك أيها الرب.

languages.english: You come in the power of Your glory with hosts of angels around You. You sit on the throne of Your kingdom, O the righteous judge.
languages.arabic: إذا جئت بقوة مجدك ويحيط بك ملائكتك وتجلس أنت أيها الديان العادل علي كرسي مملكتك،

languages.english: All the nations from all four corners of the earth assemble in front you, yet with Your one word, they split apart to the right and to the left.
languages.arabic: وتجتمع إليك جميع الأمم من الأربع رياح زوايا الأرض ويفترقون بعضهم عن بعض، يميناً وشمالاً بكلمة واحدة،

languages.english: The sheep on your right and the goats on your left. Those on Your right will rejoice with You, as well as those virtuous who sought to please You and who observed Your commandments and fulfilled them all.
languages.arabic: وتقف الخراف عن يمينك والجداء عن يسارك فيفرح معك الذين عن يمينك والأبرار الذين صنعوا مرضاتك المتمسكون بأوامرك وحفظوها وصنعوها جميعاً،

languages.english: Those who fed You in Your hunger and gave You a drink in Your thirst; hosted You when You were a stranger in their homes; clothed You when You were naked; visited You when You were incarcerated. In Your sickness, they served You.
languages.arabic: الذين أطعموك في جوعك وسقوك أيضاً في عطشك وفي غربتك أووك في بيوتهم وفي عريك ستروك، وعندما دخلت السجن جاءوا لزيارتك وفي مرضك خدموك،

languages.english: Then they will rejoice in their good deeds and receive their rewards to the exclusion of the goats. The righteous inherit eternal life and the goats suffer.
languages.arabic: حينئذ يفرحون بأعمالهم الحسنة ويأخذون أجرهم دون الجداء، فيمضي الأبرار إلي الحياة الدائمة والجداء إلي العذاب.

languages.english: Listen O you foolish and fathom what you lost; that mercy prides itself over justice. Be merciful before you face judgment by the Judge.
languages.arabic: أسمعوا أيها الجهال وإفهموا أيها الضالين. أن الرحمة تفتخر في الحكم, فإصنعوا الرحمة قبل أن يأتي عليكم دينونة الديان.

languages.english: After our Savior concluded his talk, He told His disciples that Passover will come after two days and that the Son of Man will fulfill the prophecies of the prophets; to be the sacrificial lamb and complete Passover to the fullness of times. O Christ our Lord, truly You have been the sacrificial lamb and complete Passover to the fullness of times.
languages.arabic: فلما فرغ مخلصنا من كلامه أخبر التلاميذ أصفياءه أنه بعد يومين يكون الفصح، فإسمعوا يا أخوتي الذين إصطفيتهم، إن إبن الإنسان سيكمل عليه المكتوب في سفر الأنبياء لكي يكون خروفاً للذبح وفصحاً كاملاً إلي كمال الدهور،

languages.english: O Christ our Lord, truly You have been the unblemished lamb sacrificed for the life of mankind. He is the lamb of God, the Father, who takes away the sin of the world.
languages.arabic: فبالحقيقة صرت أيها المسيح إلهنا حملاً بلا عيب عن حياة العالم، الذي هو حمل الله الآب حامل خطية العالم بأسره.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pidoxodoc n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Exodus of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر الخروج لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: N~h~r/i de qen piabot m~mah somt n~te p~jini~ e~bol n~nens/ri m~p~Icra/l e~bol qen p~kahi n~,/mi: qen pie~hoou e~tem~mau: aui~ eh~r/i e~p~safe n~Cina:
languages.english: Now in the third month after the children of Israel departed from the land of Egypt, on the same day, they came into the Sinai Desert.
languages.arabic: وفى الشهر الثالث لخروج بنى اسرائيل من أرض مصر فى ذلك اليوم جاءوا إلى برية سيناء.

languages.coptic: Ouoh aufai e~bol qen Ravazin: ouoh aui~e~h~r/i e~p~safe n~Cina ouoh auouwnh m~mau m~pem~yo m~pitwou:
languages.english: For they departed from Rephidim, came into the Sinai Desert, and camped in the desert. So Israel camped there before the mountain.
languages.arabic: ورحلوا من رافازين ووصلوا إلى برية سيناء ونزلوا هناك قبالة الجبل.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afi~ n~je Mwuc/c e~h~r/i e~jen pitwou n~te Vnou]: ouoh afmou] e~rof n~je Vnou] e~bol qen pitwou efjw m~moc:
languages.english: Then Moses went up to the mountain of God, and God called to him from the mountain, saying,
languages.arabic: فصعد موسى إلى جبل الله فناداه الله من الجبل قائلاً:

languages.coptic: Je nai ne n/e~teknajotou m~p~/i n~Iakwb: ouoh eke~tame nens/ri m~p~Icra/l ekjw m~moc e~rwou:
languages.english: "Thus you shall say to the house of Jacob and tell the children of Israel:
languages.arabic: هذا ما تقوله لبيت يعقوب وتخبر بنى اسرائيل قائلاً لهم.

languages.coptic: Je n~ywten a~teten nau e~hwb niben e~taiaitou n~niremn~,/mi: ouoh ai[iy/nou m~v~r/] hijen hantenh n~te hana~qwm: aiceky/nou haroi.
languages.english: 'You have seen what I did to the Egyptians, and how I bore you on eagles' wings and brought you to Myself.
languages.arabic: قد رأيتم كل الأعمال التى صنعتها بالمصريين وكيف حملتكم كأنكم على أجنحة النسور وأتيت بكم إلي

languages.coptic: Ouoh ]nou e~swp qen oucwtem n~tetencwtem n~catac~m/: n~te tena~reh e~tadia~y/k/: e~retene~swpi n/i n~oulaoc efyou/t sae~neh e~bol oute nieynoc t/rou:
languages.english: Now therefore, if you will indeed obey My voice and keep My covenant, you shall be a special people to Me above all nations; for all the earth is Mine.
languages.arabic: والآن إن كنتم سمعاً تسمعون لصوتى وتحفظون عهدى. فأنكم تكونون لى شعباً مجتمعاً إلى الأبد من بين جميع الأمم. لأن لى الأرض بأسرها

languages.coptic: vwi gar pe p~kahi t/rf: n~ywten de e~retene~swpi n/i n~oumetouro e~couab: nem oueynoc eftoub/out: nai ne nicaji eteknajotou m~p~/i m~p~Icra/l.
languages.english: You shall be to Me a royal priesthood and a holy nation.' These are the words you shall speak to the children of Israel."
languages.arabic: وأنتم تكونون لى مملكة مقدسة وأمة مطهرة. هذا هو الكلام الذي تقوله لبيت اسرائيل.

languages.coptic: Afi~ de n~je Mwu~c/c afmou] e~nip~recbuteroc n~te pilaoc: ouoh af,w qatotou nnaicaji t/rou: nai e~tafouahcahni m~mwou nwou n~je Vnou].
languages.english: So Moses came and called for the elders of the people, and laid before them all these words the Lord commanded him.
languages.arabic: فجاء موسى ودعا شيوخ الشعب وقص عليهم كل هذه الكلمات التى أمره الله بها.

languages.coptic: Afe~rouw~ n~je pilaoc t/rf eucop pejwou: je hwb niben e~tafjotou n~je Vnou] tennaaitou: ouoh tennacoymou: ouoh a~Mwu~c/c en nicaji n~te pilaoc e~p~swi ha Vnou].
languages.english: Then all the people answered with one accord and said, "Everything the Lord said we will do and hearken to." So Moses reported these words to God.
languages.arabic: فأجاب جميع الشعب معاً وقالوا. كل ما تكلم به الله نسمعه ونعمل به. فرفع موسى كلام الشعب إلى الله.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Iwb piy~m/i: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Job the righteous, may his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من أيوب الصديق بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Ke gar ]emi je pacohiou e~bolhitotf pe: ouoh tefjij ach~ros e~jen pafia~hom:
languages.english: "Indeed, I know pleading is out of my reach, for His hand is heavy upon my groaning.
languages.arabic: أنا أعلم أن توبيخي هو منه. ويده قد ثقلت على تنهدى.

languages.coptic: Nim gar eynae~mi je ]najemf: ouoh je au]nem /i sa p~jwk:
languages.english: Who then would know, that I might find Him, and might bring this matter to an end?
languages.arabic: من الذي يعلم أنى أجده وأنهم تحابوا معى إلى التمام

languages.coptic: Ouoh an je ]na je ouhap nahraf. Pwi efe~moh n~coh:
languages.english: I would state my case before Him and fill my mouth with arguments.
languages.arabic: ولست أستطيع أن أقول حكماً أمامه.

languages.coptic: Eie~mi de e~ nitajro n~n/e~tefnajotou n/i: eie~er ecyanecye e~n/e~tefnatamoi e~rwou.
languages.english: Would that I knew the words He would answer me and could understand what He would tell me.
languages.arabic: فيمتلئ فمي توبيخاً. أنا أعلم بثبات ما يقوله لي وأشعر بما يعرفنى أياه.

languages.coptic: Ouoh je an f~nai e~h~r/i e~jwi qen ounis] n~jom: e~tefnaer,racye n/i an qenoum~bon:
languages.english: Though He would come on me in His great strength, He would not use the occasion to threaten me.
languages.arabic: ولا يأتى على بقوة عظيمة ولا يفسح لي فى الرجز.

languages.coptic: }meym/i gar nem picohi hane~bol hitotf ne: efe~i~ni de e~bol m~pahap sae~bol:
languages.english: For truth and rebuke are from Him, and He would bring my judgment to an end.
languages.arabic: لأن البر والتوبيخ هما منه. ويخرج حكمي إلى الإنقضاء

languages.coptic: Eie~sen/i de sa nihoua~]: ouoh n~nasop an je: oude ]e~mi e~rof qen niqaeu.
languages.english: "Though I should proceed to this important end until I no longer exist, still what would I know about the last things?
languages.arabic: وأمضى إلى الأوائل. ولا أكون بعد. ولا أعلم ما فى الأواخر.

languages.coptic: Afyamio n~hanja[/ ouoh m~piamoni: efe~hwbc n~hanoui~nam ouoh n~nanau: f~cwoun gar h/d/ n~yof m~pamwit:
languages.english: When He worked on the left hand, I could not understand it. His right hand will encompass me, but I will not see it.
languages.arabic: خلق الشمال ولم أمسك ما يستر اليمين ولا أنظر.

languages.coptic: Aferdiakrinin gar mmoi m~v~r/] m~pinoub:
languages.english: For He knows my way already, and He has weighed me as gold.
languages.arabic: هو عارف طريقى ومحصنى مثل الذهب.

languages.coptic: Eie~mosi de n~q~r/iqen nefhonhen ouoh n~na,au n~cwi: Nefcaji eie~,opou qenkent: icje n~yof af]hap m~pair/].
languages.english: I will go forth in His commandments; for I have kept His ways and will not turn aside. I will not disregard His commandments; but I have hidden His words in my bosom.
languages.arabic: فأسلك بحسب أوامره ولا أرفضها أخفى كلامه فى حضنى.

languages.coptic: Nim pe v/eynaeran]legin naf: v/ gar e~tafouasf: vai pe e~tafaif.
languages.english: "If He too has thus judged, who is he that has opposed Him? Whatever He has willed, that He has done.
languages.arabic: فأن كان قد حكم هكذا فمن هو الذي يقاومه. وهو ما يريده يفعله

languages.coptic: Eybe vai aii/c m~moi e~h~r/i e~jwf: efe~]c~bw de n/i aierho] qatefh/: e~h~r/i e~jen vai.
languages.english: Therefore I pursue Him zealously, and when I was instructed, I thought of Him.
languages.arabic: من أجل ذلك أسرعت إليه أدبنى فخفت منه.

languages.coptic: Eie~i/c qath/ m~pefho eie~comc ouoh e~nousp e~bol m~mof.
languages.english: Therefore let me be serious before His face. I will consider and be afraid of Him.
languages.arabic: لهذا أسرع قدام وجهه وأتأمل فأرتعب منه.

languages.coptic: P[oic de afen ouswe~jen pah/t: ouoh pipantokratwr afi/c n~cwi:
languages.english: For the Lord softened my heart, and the Almighty has alarmed me.
languages.arabic: لأن الرب قد أضعف قلبى. والضابط الكل أسرع ورائى.

languages.coptic: Naie~mi gar pe je f~nai~ e~h~r/i e~jwi n~je ou,aki: ougnovoc de pe e~tafhwbc e~bol qat~h/ m~paho.
languages.english: For I did not know darkness would come upon me, but thick darkness covered my face.
languages.arabic: لأنى كنت أعلم أن الظلمة ستأتى على. والضباب غطى وجهى.

languages.coptic: Eybe ou de auhwp e~P[oic n~je hanounwoui~:
languages.english: "Why have the times escaped the Lord's notice?
languages.arabic: كيف خفيت هذه الساعات عن الرب.

languages.coptic: Nia~ceb/c de auercabol n~nouyws e~auhwlem n~ouohi nem pefmane~cwou:
languages.english: "Why have the ungodly stepped over the boundary, snatching away the flock with the shepherd?
languages.arabic: فتجاوز المنافقون حدودهم مختطفين القطيع مع راعيه.

languages.coptic: Oue~w~ de n~te hanorvanoc auolf: Ouoh ]e~he n~te ou,/ra auolc nauouw~.
languages.english: They have led away the donkey of the orphans and have taken the widow's ox as a pledge.
languages.arabic: وأخذوا حمار الأيتام وإرتهنوا بقرة الأرملة.

languages.coptic: Auy~re hanatjom riki e~bolha v~mwit n~te ]meym/i: au,opou de eucop n~je niremraus n~te p~kahi:
languages.english: They have turned aside the weak from the right way; the gentle of the land have hidden themselves together.
languages.arabic: وجعلوا الضعفاء يميلون عن طريق الحق وإختفى ودعاء الأرض معاً.

languages.coptic: Auswpi de m~v~r/] n~hane~heu qen t~koi e~aucet toup~raxic e~bolhijwi auhloj naf n~je ouwik n~te hana~lwoui~.
languages.english: They departed like donkeys in the field. Contrary to me, they went forth to their own pursuits. Their bread was sweet to their little ones.
languages.arabic: وصاروا كالبقر فى الحقل. وطرحوا أعمالهم على وإستحلوا خبز الأطفال.

languages.coptic: Ouiohi m~vwou an pe auocqf m~pate tefhw] swp: hanatjom de auerhwb e~hanma n~a~loli n~te nia~ceb/c n~atbe,e ouoh n~ayouwm:
languages.english: For they harvested a field that was not their own before the time, and the weak worked the vineyard of the ungodly without pay or food.
languages.arabic: حقلاً ليس لهم حصدوه قبل أوانه. يعمل الضعفاء فى كروم المنافقين بلا أجرة ولا طعام.

languages.coptic: Oum/s eub/s auy~rouenkot n~ath~bwc auw~li n~t~hebcw n~te tou'u,/:
languages.english: They caused many naked to sleep without clothing, and they took away the covering of their life.
languages.arabic: كثيراً ما جعلوهم يبيتون عراة بغير لباس ونزعوا كساء أنفسهم.

languages.coptic: Cehwrp de qen niteltili n~te nitwou: eybe je m~mon tou c~kep/ m~mau aujolou noupetra:
languages.english: They are wet with the showers of the mountains and have huddled around the rock for want of shelter.
languages.arabic: فأبتلوا من قطر الجبال. وحيث أن لا خيام لهم أستتروا بالصخور.

languages.coptic: Auhwlem de n~ouorvanoc e~bolqen noumno]: v/ de e~tafhei auyebiof:
languages.english: They have snatched the orphan from the breast and have humiliated the banished.
languages.arabic: خطفوا الأيتام عن ثديهم. ومن سقط أذلوه.

languages.coptic: Auy~re hanouon de enkot eub/s qen nou[in~jonc: n/de ethoker auw~li mpouwik qen hanma euj/ou
languages.english: They have unjustly caused them to sleep without clothing, and they have taken away the morsel from the hungry.
languages.arabic: بظلمهم جعلوا قوماً ينامون عراة. وأخذوا خبز الجياع.

languages.coptic: Aujwrj qen ou[in~jonc: v~mwit de n~te ]meym/i mpoucouwnf:
languages.english: They have wrongfully laid snares in narrow places and have not known the way of righteousness.
languages.arabic: فى المواضع الضيقة أصطادوا بالظلم. وطريق العدل لم يعرفوه.

languages.coptic: N/ de e~nauhioui~ mmwou e~bol qen noubaki nem nouio~u m~poucouw~nou. t~'u,/ de n~te hankouji n~a~lwoui~ acer hannis] m~fia~hom:
languages.english: They have cast the weak out of the city and their own houses, and the soul of the infants sighed greatly. Why then has He not visited them?
languages.arabic: والذين طردوهم من مدنهم وبيوتهم لم يعرفوهم. فصارت نفس الأطفال فى تنهد شديد. لماذا لم يفتقد هؤلاء

languages.coptic: Nyof de eybeou m~pefjem p~sini n~nai eusop hijen pikahi: ouoh m~poue~mi v~mwit de n~te ]meym/i: m~poucouwnf oude mpoumosi qen necmitwoui:
languages.english: "They are ones on the earth who do not know the Lord, and they do not understand the way of righteousness, nor do they walk in His paths.
languages.arabic: وهم على الأرض وهم لم يعرفوا طريق البر. ولم يمشوا فى سبله.

languages.coptic: E~tafe~mi de n~nouh~b/oui~ aft/itou e~p~,aki: ouoh qen pie~jwrh efe~er m~vr/] n~ouref[ioui~:
languages.english: But He knows their works and delivered them into darkness; and one shall be like a thief in the night.
languages.arabic: فلما علم بأعمالهم أسلمهم للظلمة وفي الليل يصير مثل اللص،

languages.coptic: Vbal n~ounwik efa~reh e~ou,aki efjw m~moc je m~mon bal nau e~roi: ouoh af,at n~ouman~,wp n~te ouho.
languages.english: For the eye of the adulterer watches for the darkness, saying, 'No eye will perceive me'; and he puts a covering on his face.
languages.arabic: وعين الزاني تراقب الظلام قائلاً: لا تبصرنى عين. فيجعل ستراً على وجهه.

languages.coptic: Afhisatc e~han/i qen pi,aki: qen pie~hoou auhitebc e~rwou m~min m~mwou: ouoh m~poucouen v~ouwini je hanatooui~:
languages.english: In the dark he breaks into houses; in the daytime they seal themselves up; they do not know the light.
languages.arabic: نقب بيوتاً فى الظلام وفى النهار أغلقوا على أنفسهم. فلا يعرفون النور صباحاً.

languages.coptic: Ouq/ibi n~te v~mou eynaswpi nwou eucop: je efe~couen hans~yorter n~te t~q/ibi m~v~mou:
languages.english: For in due time, the shadow of death will be the same to them, because they shall know the troubles of the shadow of death.
languages.arabic: لأن ظل الموت يدركهم معاً. لأنه يعرف أهوال ظل الموت.

languages.coptic: f~a~ciw~ou hijen p~ho n~oumwou: efe~swpi efc~houort n~je poumeroc hijen p~kahi.
languages.english: "He is swift on the face of the waters; may his portion be cursed on earth.
languages.arabic: خفيف هو على وجه الماء. فليكن نصيبهم ملعوناً على الأرض.

languages.coptic: Eue~ouwnh de e~bol n~je n/etr/t n~twou eusouw~ou hijen p~kahi: euhwlem gar n~han,nau n~te hanorvanoc:
languages.english: May their plants wither on earth, for they have taken away from the orphans even the smallest portions.
languages.arabic: وليظهر نباتهم يابساً على وجه الأرض. لأنهم نهبوا أعمار الأيتام.

languages.coptic: Ita afervmeui~ m~pefnobi: afswpi de n~ayouwnh m~v~r/] n~ounif n~te ouiw]: eue]sebiw~ naf nn/e~tafaitou: efe~qomqem de n~je ref[in~jonc niben m~vr/] n~ouse n~atsau:
languages.english: Then his sin is recalled to memory, and he vanishes like a mist of dew; but what he has done, may it be recompensed to him, and may every wrongdoer be crushed like rotten wood.
languages.arabic: وحين ذكر خطيته وصار غير ظاهر كمثل الخشب غير النافع.

languages.coptic: Oua[r/n gar m~pouerpeynanef nac: Ouoh ouatc~himi m~pounai naf.
languages.english: For he has not treated the barren woman well, and showed no mercy to the feeble woman.
languages.arabic: لأنهم لم يحسنوا إلى العاقر ولم يرحموا (الأرملة).

languages.coptic: Qen oujwnt gar aurwqt n~hanatjom: afsantwnf gar oun m~peny~ref tenhet pefwnq:
languages.english: "In his anger, he overturns the weak; therefore when he rises up, no one believes his own life is safe.
languages.arabic: وبغضب طرحوا الضعفاء. فاذا قام لا يأمن على حياته.

languages.coptic: Afsanswni de m~peny~ref erhelpic je f~nalojf: alla efe~hei qen ouswni:
languages.english: When he falls sick, let him not hope to recover, but let him perish by disease.
languages.arabic: وإذا مرض لا يجعلوه يرجو أن يشفى بل يسقط بالمرض.

languages.coptic: oum/s de afyebiw~ou n~je pef[ici: aflwm de n~je ou,~lo/ qen oukauma ie m~v~r/] n~ouqemc e~af hei mmauatf e~bol qen hanrwoui~.
languages.english: For his exaltation mistreated many, but he has withered as mallows in the heat, or as an ear of corn falling on its own from the stalk.
languages.arabic: إن كثيرين خفضهم إرتفاعه فذبلت خضرتهم بالحر مثل السنبل إذا سقط وحده من البرائب.

languages.coptic: Icje m~mon nim pe e~tafjoc naf je aij~e meynouj: euoh n~tef,w n~nacaji je hanh~li af ne.
languages.english: "If it is not so, who says I speak falsely and will make my speech worth nothing?"
languages.arabic: وإلا فمن قال له أنى كذبت ويجعل كلامى كلا شئ.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Wcie~ pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Hosea the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من هوشع النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Cwtem e~p~caji m~P[oic nens/ri m~p~Icra/l: je pihap m~P[oic oube n/etsop hijen p~kahi: je ou/i m~mon meym/i: oude m~mon nai: oude m~mon couen nou] hijen p~kahi:
languages.english: Hear the word of the Lord, you children of Israel, for the Lord has a judgment for the inhabitants of the land: "There is no truth or mercy or knowledge of God in the land.
languages.arabic: إسمعوا كلام الرب يا بنى اسرائيل فأن للرب محاكمة مع سكان الأرض لأنه لا حق ولا رحمة ولا معرفة الله على الأرض.

languages.coptic: Oucahoui~ nem oumeynouj nem ouqwteb: nem ou[ioui~ nem oumetnwik auvwne~bol hijen p~kahi: ouoh hanc~nof cemoujt m~mwou e~jen hanc~nof.
languages.english: Cursing and lying, murder and theft and adultery gushed forth in the land, and blood is mingled with blood.
languages.arabic: بل لعنة وكذب وقتل وسرقة وفسق قد فاضت على الأرض ودماء تختلط بدماء.

languages.coptic: Eybe vai efe~erh/bi n~je p~kahi nem ouon niben etsop n~q/tf: ouoh efe~erkouji nem niy/rion n~te t~koi: nem ni[atfi n~te p~kahi: nem nihala] n~te t~ve: ouoh niketebt n~te v~iom eue~mounk:
languages.english: Therefore the land shall mourn and be diminished with all the things that dwell in it: the wild beasts of the field, the reptiles of the earth, and the birds of the sky, and the fish of the sea shall come to an end;
languages.arabic: لذلك تنوح الأرض وكل من يسكن فيها. يذبل مع وحوش البرية ودبابات الأرض وطيور السماء وسمك البحر أيضاً يفنى

languages.coptic: Hopwc n~neh~li [ihap oude n~nefcohi: pilaoc aferantilegin naf n~oumetsamse i~dwlon: m~v~r/t m~piou/b eferan tilegin naf n~oumetsamse nou]:
languages.english: That neither may anyone judge, nor analyze another; But my people are as a priest who is spoken against.
languages.arabic: حتى لا يكون من يحاكم ولا من يوبخ، مثل الشعب الذي يمارى فى عبادة الأصنام. مثل الكاهن الذي يمارى فى عبادة الإله.

languages.coptic: Ouoh efe~swk m~pie~hoou ouoh efe~swki m~pip~rov/t/c nemak. tekmau aitenywnc e~pie~jwrh:
languages.english: "Thus you shall be weak by day, and the prophet shall be weak with you; I have compared your mother to the night.
languages.arabic: فيتعثر بالنهار ويتعثر أيضاً النبي معك. وأمك شبهتها بالليل.

languages.coptic: Palaoc afer m~v~r/] m~v/e~te m~mon tefcwoun m~mau: je n~yok ak,w m~p~cwoun n~cwk: a~nok hw ]na,ak n~cwi e~s~tem erou/b n/i:
languages.english: My people are like as those who have no knowledge. Because you have rejected knowledge, I will also reject you from being a priest to Me;
languages.arabic: وصار شعبى كمن لا معرفة له. لأنك أنت رفضت المعرفة. أنا أيضاً أرفضك فلا تكهن لى.

languages.coptic: Ouoh on ]naerp~wbs m~vnomoc m~p~Icra/l ouoh ]naerp~wbs n~nouh~b/oui~:
languages.english: And because you have forgotten the law of your God, I also will forget your children.
languages.arabic: أنسى أنا أيضاً ناموس اسرائيل وأنسى أعمالهم.

languages.coptic: Pair/] auernobi: pouw~ou ]na,af eusws:
languages.english: According to their multitude, so they sinned against Me; I will turn their glory into dishonor.
languages.arabic: هكذا أخطأوا فأبدل مجدهم هوانا.

languages.coptic: Ninobi n~te palaoc auouomou: ouoh n~q~r/i qen nou[in~jonc cew~li n~nou'u,/.
languages.english: They will eat the sins of My people and take away their lives because of their wrongdoings.
languages.arabic: وخطايا شعبى تأكلهم. وبظلمهم تنزع نفوسهم.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

title.english: Homily of Abba Shenouda the Archimandrite
title.arabic: عظة لابينا القديس أنبا شنودة رئيس المتوحدين

readings.reference: Homily of Abba Shenouda the Archimandrite

languages.coptic: Oukat/,/cic n~te peniwt eyouab abba Senou] pia~r,/mand~rit/c: e~re pefc~mou eyouab swpi neman: a~m/n.
languages.english: A homily of our holy father Abba Shenouda the archimandrite. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: عظة لابينا القديس أنبا شنودة رئيس المتوحدين: بركته المقدسة تكون معنا آمين.

languages.coptic: Hwb c~nau n/e~]najotou: ouon niben e~taurasi e~jwou qen t~ve eybe toumeta~noia~ hijen p~kahi: cenanau an e~lup/ oude m~kah qen pima e~te m~mau:
languages.english: Let me inform you about two matters. Those for whom the heavens rejoiced because they repented their sin on earth will not suffer sadness or pain in the place they are destined to inherit.
languages.arabic: أنا أخبركم بأمرين. أن كل الذين فرح بهم فى السماء لأجل توبتهم على الأرض. سوف لا يرون حزنا ولا ألماً فى ذلك المكان

languages.coptic: N/de e~te m~pourasi e~jwou qen t~ve eybe p~jin tacyo n~toumeta~noia~ hijen p~kahi: cenanau an e~rasi oude a~napaucic qen pima e~tem~mau: e~re nai gar naer pourasi hijen p~kahi: n~cenanau an e~rasi oude a~napaucic icjen ]nou.
languages.english: As for those whom heavens did not rejoice for because they did not atone their sins and did not repent their iniquities on earth they will find neither joy nor comfort in that place.
languages.arabic: وأما الذين لم يفرح بهم فى السماء لأجل الإرتداد من توبتهم على الأرض فسوف لا يرون فرحاً ولا نياحا فى ذلك الموضع.

languages.coptic: N~tetencwtem an je w~ounia~tou n~n/e~terh/bi je n~ywou petouna]ho e~rwou: oude nike,wouni eynaer pourasi an hijen p~kahi: n~cenaaitou on qen niv/oui.
languages.english: Because those who revel in pleasures and delights will enjoy neither happiness nor comfort in heavens.
languages.arabic: لأن الذين سيصنعون فرحهم على الأرض. سوف لا يرون فرحاً ولا نياحا من الآن.

languages.coptic: Ntetencwtem an je ouoi nwten n/et cwbi ]nou: je teten naerh/bi:
languages.english: Have not you heard his saying Blessed are those who mourn because they shall be comforted.
languages.arabic: أما سمعتم طوبى للحزانى فأنهم يتعزون.

languages.coptic: Nywten n~tetenrimi: m/ vai an pe pic/ou n~te n/etoi n~jwb ]hiw~tou n~oujom: ouoh v/e~te m~mon s~jom m~mofeyrefjoc je]jemjom a~nok qen p~jiny~ref] m~pefh/t e~picaji et cq/out.
languages.english: Also those who do not rejoice on earth shall rejoice in heavens or have not you read woe to you who laugh now for you shall weep and mourn. Isn’t this the time when the meek is vested with power.
languages.arabic: وكذلك الأخرون الذين لا يفرحون على الأرض. يفرحون أيضاً فى السموات أما سمعتم الويل لكم أيها الضاحكون الآن فأنكم ستبكون وتحزنون. أليس هذا هو الزمان الذي فيه يلبس الضعفاء القوة.

languages.coptic: Ouoh kata p~caji m~pip~rov/t/c: ceos n~je n/e~tauerjwb qen poucwma: hiten p~a~sai n~te touporia~: cenaerjwb de on qen noukeh/t. Mvr/] e~te ]g~rav/ jw m~moc n~nai m~pair/]: je f~naouwjp qen ]akayarcia~ n~te tef'u,/.
languages.english: And he who is not strong will say I am strong when he yields his heart to the Written Word. As the prophet says; many are those whose repeated adultery has weakened their bodies, and they shall be weakened at heart as well.
languages.arabic: والذي ليس بقوى يقول أنا قوى عند ما يعطى قلبه للقول المكتوب. وكقول النبي. كثيرون هم الذين ضعفت أجسادهم. من كثرة زناهم سيضعفون أيضاً فى قلوبهم

languages.coptic: E~re picaji de n~te n/e~tauer a~gwnizecye qen oumetjwri jw m~moc: je ,wlem matahok e~ratk n~oucwtp m~Vnou]: n~ouergat/c m~paf[isipi: efswt e~bol m~p~caji n~]meym/i.
languages.english: As the Book says about those; "they will be devastated by their own profanity. As for those who struggle with courage it was said about them; hasten and straighten yourself to be a companion of God undisgraced worker who preaches the Word of Truth."
languages.arabic: كما يقول الكتاب عن هؤلاء هكذا. أنه يتحطم بنجاسة نفسه. وأما المجاهدون بشجاعة فقد قيل عنهم. أسرع وقوم ذاتك صفيا لله. فاعلا لا يخزى. يقطع كلمة الحق.

languages.coptic: Marener c~v~rajizin n~]kat/,/cic n~te peniwt eyouab abba Senou] pia~r,/mand~rit/c v/e~taferouwini m~pennouc: nem nibal n~te nenh/t: qen v~ran m~Viwt nem Ps/ri nem Pip~neuma eyouab ounou] n~ouwt: a~m/n.
languages.english: We conclude the homily of our holy father Abba Shenouda the archimandrite who enlightened our minds and our hearts. In the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
languages.arabic: فلنختم موعظة أبينا القديس أنبا شنودة رئيس المتوحدين الذي أنار عقولنا وعيون قلوبنا بإسم الآب والإبن والروح القدس الإله الواحد آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: P[oic eke~nohem n~ta'u,/ e~bol qen hanc~votou n~oji: nem e~bol ha oulac n~,~rof.
languages.english: O Lord, deliver my soul from unjust lips and from a deceitful tongue.
languages.arabic: يارب تنجى نفسى من الشفاه الظالمة ومن اللسان الغاش.

languages.coptic: Naioi n~hir/n/koc pe nem n/eymoc] n~]hir/n/: e~swp aisancaji nemwou saubwtc e~roi n~jinj/: all/louia.
languages.english: With those who hate peace, I was peaceful; when I spoke to them, they made war against me without cause. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: ومع مبغضى السلام كنت صاحب سلامة. وحين كنت أكلمهم كانوا يقاتلوننى مجانا. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Palinon peje I/couc nwou je a~nok ]nasen/i ouoh tetennakw] n~cwi ouoh tetennajemt an ouoh tetennamou qen netennobi je pima a~nok e~]nasen/i e~rof m~mon s~jom m~mwten e~i~ e~rof.
languages.english: Then Jesus said to them again, “I am going away, and you will seek Me, and will die in your sin. Where I go you cannot come.”
languages.arabic: ثم قال لهم يسوع أيضاً أنا أمضى وستطلبونني فلا تجدوننى وتموتون بخطاياكم. وحيث أمضى أنا فلا تقدرون أنتم أن تأتوا إليَّ.

languages.coptic: Naujw oun m~moc pe n~je niIoudai je m/ti afnaqoybef m~mauatf: je f~jw m~moc je pima a~nok e~]nasen/i e~rof n~ywten n~tetennas~i~ e~rof an.
languages.english: So the Jews said, “Will He kill Himself, because He says, ‘Where I go you cannot come’?”
languages.arabic: فقال اليهود العله يقتل نفسه وحده. حتى يقول حيث أمضى أنا لا تقدرون أنتم أن تأتوا.

languages.coptic: Ouoh naujw m~moc nwou pe je n~ywten n~ywten han e~bolqen n/e~te n~q~r/i a~nok de a~nok ou e~bol mp~swi: ~nywten n~ywten e~bolqen pai kocmoc: a~nok de a~nok ou e~bolqen pai kocmoc an:
languages.english: And He said to them, “You are from beneath; I am from above. You are of this world; I am not of this world.
languages.arabic: فقال لهم أنتم أنتم من أسفل. وأما أنا فمن فوق. أنتم أنتم من هذا العالم. وأما أنا فلست من هذا العالم.

languages.coptic: Aijoc oun nwten je tetennamou n~q~r/i qen netennobi: e~swp oun a~reten s~temnah] je a~nok pe: tetennamou n~q~r/i qen netennobi.
languages.english: Therefore I said to you that you will die in your sins; for if you do not believe that I am He, you will die in your sins.”
languages.arabic: قد قلت لكم أنكم تموتون بخطاياكم. لأنكم أن لم تؤمنوا أنى أنا هو. تموتون بخطاياكم.

languages.coptic: Naujw oun m~moc naf pe je n~yok nim: Peje I/couc nwou je n~]ar,/ aierp~kecaji nemwten:
languages.english: Then they said to Him, “Who are You?” And Jesus said to them, “Just what I have been saying to you from the beginning.
languages.arabic: فقالوا له من أنت. فقال لهم يسوع أنا من البدء تكلمت معكم

languages.coptic: ouoh Ouon] oum/s e~jotou eybe y/nou ouoh e~]hap:
languages.english: I have many things to say and to judge concerning you,
languages.arabic: ولى أشياء كثيرة أقولها وأحكم بها من نحوكم.

languages.coptic: Alla v/ e~taftaouoi ouy~m/i pe: ouoh a~nok hw n/etaicoymou n~totf: nai ]caji mmwou qen pikocmoc: Mpoue~mi je nafcaji nemwou eybe v~iwt.
languages.english: but He who sent Me is true; and I speak to the world those things which I heard from Him.” They did not understand that He spoke to them of the Father.
languages.arabic: ولكن الذي أرسلنى هو حق وأنا ما سمعته منه فهذا أتكلم به في العالم. فلم يفهموا أنه كان يقول لهم عن الأب.

languages.coptic: Peje I/c nwou je e~swp aretensan[ec p~s/ri mv~rwmi: tote e~retene~mi je a~nok pe: ouoh n~]er hli an e~bolhitotf m~mauat:
languages.english: Then Jesus said to them, “When you lift up the Son of Man, then you will know that I am He, and that I do nothing of Myself;
languages.arabic: فقال لهم يسوع متى رفعتم إبن الإنسان فحينئذ تعلمون أنى أنا هو. ولست أفعل شيئاَ من ذاتى وحدى.

languages.coptic: Alla kata v~r/] e~taft~caboi n~je paiwt nai ]caji m~mwou.
languages.english: but as My Father taught Me, I speak these things.
languages.arabic: بل أتكلم بهذا كما علمنى أبى.

languages.coptic: Ouoh v/e~taftaouoi f~,/ nem/i: ouoh m~pef,at m~mauat: je a~nok ]i~ri n~n/eyranaf n~c/ou niben.
languages.english: And He who sent Me is with Me. The Father has not left Me alone, for I always do those things that please Him.”
languages.arabic: والذي أرسلنى هو معى ولم يدعنى وحدى لأنى فى كل حين أفعل ما يرضيه.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the First Hour of Tuesday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الاولى، من يوم الثلاثاء من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: And Israel came to Mount Rephidim after three months in the wilderness. Then the Israelites came out of Egypt and Mount Sinai to this place.
languages.arabic: وجاء اسرائيل إلى جبل رافازين من بعد ثلاثة أشهر وهو فى البرية. وخرج بنو اسرائيل من مصر وجبل سيناء إلى هذا المكان.

languages.english: Moses came and stood in the presence of God; He called and spoke to him saying: “This is what you tell the house of Israel, and report to the sons of Israel.
languages.arabic: فجاء موسى ووقف قدام الله فناداه وتكلم معه قائلاً: هذا ما تقوله لبيت يعقوب وتخبر به بنى اسرائيل.

languages.english: You have seen the many deeds I have inflicted on the Egyptians and how I carried you with my soaring power as if you were on the wings of eagles.
languages.arabic: أنكم قد رأيتم أعمالى الكثيرة التى صنعتها أنا بالمصريين وكيف حملتكم أنا بقوتى العالية كأنكم على أجنحة النسور.

languages.english: Keep my laws and commandments, take heed to my words and carry out my will, for I have chosen you from among the nations, for I have the earth and the sea as well. You will be my kingdom, a chosen people and a holy nation.”
languages.arabic: فإحفظوا ناموسى ووصاياى وأنصتوا لكلامى وأصنعوا إرادتى فإننى أخترتكم من بين جميع الأمم لأن لى الأرض كلها والبحر معاً. لتصيروا لى مملكة وشعباً مختاراً وأمة مطهرة.

languages.english: And Moses came back and told the people all what God has said. The public cheered in one voice saying: “Whatever God wills, we will observe.”
languages.arabic: فجاء موسى وأخبر الشعب بجميع هذا الكلام الذي قاله الرب. فصرخ جميع الشعب بصوت واحد قائلين كلما يرسم به الله نحن نحفظه.

languages.english: Moses then told the Omniscient that the people adhered to his orders. But Israel turned back, Jacob retreated, and the sons of Israel strayed away. God's commandments became as if they were not, and his instructions ignored.
languages.arabic: فقام موسى وخبر العارف أن الشعب سمع أوامرك. فعاد اسرائيل ورجع يعقوب إلى خلف وحاد بنو اسرائيل. وصارت وصاياه كلا شئ وأوامره عادت باطلة.

languages.english: Thus God delivered them into the hands of hateful enemies, and subjugated them to strangers once again. He humiliated them before the nations and they lived in eternal shame and disgrace.
languages.arabic: فلذلك أسلمهم إلى أعداء مبغضين واستعبدوا للغرباء مرة أخرى. ونكس رؤوسهم أمام الأمم و صاروا فى فضيحة و خزى أبدى.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen pideuteronomion n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Deuteronomy of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر التثنية لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Mah~y/k erok e~s~temer p~wbs m~P[oic peknou] e~s~tem y~reka~reh e~nefentol/ nem nefhap nem nefmeym/i: nai a~nok e~]honhen m~mwou e~totk: m/pwc n~tekouwm n~tekci n~tekkwt n~han/i e~naneu ouoh e~necwou n~tekswpi n~q/tou:
languages.english: "Watch yourself, that you do not forget the Lord your God by not keeping His commandments, judgments, and ordinances I command you today, lest—when you have eaten and are full, and have built beautiful houses and dwell in them,
languages.arabic: إحترز من أن تنسى الرب إلهك ولا تحفظ وصاياه وأحكامه وحقوقه. هذه التى أنا أوصيك بها. لئلا تأكل وتشبع وتبنى بيوتاً حسنة جميلة وتسكنها.

languages.coptic: ouoh neke~cwou n~cea~sai nak nem nekehwou: n~cea~sai nak n~je pihat nem pinoub ouoh n~cea~sai nak n~je en,ai niben etsop nak:
languages.english: And when your cattle and sheep multiply, and your silver and gold are multiplied, and all you have is multiplied, when your heart is lifted up.
languages.arabic: ويكثر لك الغنم والبقر. ويكثر لك الذهب والفضة. وتكثر كل مقتنياتك،

languages.coptic: n~teker pwbs m~P[oic peknou]: v/e~tafenk e~bolqen p~kahi n~,/mi e~bol qen p~/i n~tekmetbwk.
languages.english: And you forget the Lord your God who brought you from the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage,
languages.arabic: فتنسى الرب إلهك الذي أخرجك من أرض مصر من بيت عبوديتك

languages.coptic: Vai e~tafenk e~bol qen pai nis] nsafe ouoh etoi n~ho]: pima ere hanhof n~q/tf nem han[l/ eu[ilapcin: nem oui~bi m~mon mwou sop n~q/tf.
languages.english: Who led you through that great and fearful desert, with its biting serpent and scorpion and thirst, where there was no water,
languages.arabic: الذي أجازك هذا القفر العظيم المخوف. حيث الحيات والعقارب اللادغة. وحيث العطش ولا يوجد ماء.

languages.coptic: V/e~tafi~ni nak e~bol n~oupug/ m~mwou qen oupetra n~koh n~swt: v/e~taftemmok m~pimanna hip~safe: vai e~te n~cecwoun m~mof an n~je nekio]:
languages.english: Who brought a spring of water for you out of the sharp-edged rock, who fed you in the desert with manna your fathers did not know,
languages.arabic: الذي أخرج لك ينبوع ماء من صخرة صماء. الذي أطعمك المن فى البرية. هذا الذي لم يعرفه آباؤك.

languages.coptic: Hopwc efe~t~hemko m~mok ouoh efe~[w~nt m~mok menencwc n~teferpeynanef nak qen tekqae~. Ouoh m~perjoc qen pekh/t je tanom] ouoh p~tajro n~najij v/e~tafiri n/i n~nai nis] m~peynaneu:
languages.english: that He might deal harshly with you and might test you, to do you good in the end of your days—then do not say in your heart, 'My strength and the might of my hand gained me this great power.'
languages.arabic: لكى يؤدبك ويجربك ثم يحسن إليك فى آخرتك. ولا تقل فى قلبك أننى بشجاعتى وقوة يدي صنعت لى هذه الخيرات العظيمة.

languages.coptic: Alla eke~erv~meui~ m~P[oic peknou]: je vai pettajro mmok eyre oujom swpi nak: hopwc n~teftaho n~tefdi~ay/k/ e~ratc eta~ P[oic wrk eyb/tc n~nekio] m~v~r/] mvoou n~e~hoou.
languages.english: Then you shall remember the Lord your God, for [it is He] who gives you strength, that you may gain power, and He may establish His covenant the Lord swore to your fathers, as it is today.
languages.arabic: بل تذكر الرب إلهك فهو الذي ثبتك ليجعل لك القوة. لكى يفى بعهده الذي أقسم الرب من أجله لأبائك كما فى نهار هذا اليوم.

languages.coptic: Acsanswpi de n~tekerpwbs qen ouerp~wbs m~P[oic peknou]: n~teksenak n~tekouahk nca hankenou] n~semmo: n~tekwemsi mmwou ouoh n~tekouwst mmwou.
languages.english: Thus it shall be, if you forget the Lord your God, and follow after different gods and serve and worship them,
languages.arabic: فإن أنت نسيت نسياناً الرب إلهك وذهبت واتبعت آلهه أخرى غريبة لتعبدها وتسجد لها.

languages.coptic: }ermeyre nwten m~voou n~ehoou n~t~ve nem p~kahi je qen outako tetennatako:
languages.english: I testify against you today, [before heaven and earth] you shall surely perish.
languages.arabic: فأنى أشهد عليكم اليوم السماء والأرض إنكم تهلكون هلاكاً،

languages.coptic: Mvr/] n~nikeeynoc n/eta P[oic natakwou qat~h/ mmwten: pair/] hwten e~retentako je m~petencwtem e~t~c~m/ m~P[oic petennou].
languages.english: As the remaining nations the Lord destroys before your face, so you shall perish, because you would not be obedient to the voice of the Lord your God.
languages.arabic: كبقية الأمم التى أبادها الرب من أمامكم. هكذا أنتم تهلكون لأنكم لم تطيعوا لصوت الرب إلهكم.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen I/cou n~te Cira, pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Wisdom of Joshua, son of Sirach, the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من يشوع بن سيراخ النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Pas/ri icje ,~na] m~pek ouoi e~erbwk m~P[oic cebte tek'u,/ e~hanpiracmoc: couten pekh/t ouoh fai e~rok n~teks~temjapjep qen p~c/ou n~nekqici:
languages.english: My son, if you draw near to serve the Lord, prepare your soul for temptation. Set your heart right and be steadfast, and do not strive anxiously in distress.
languages.arabic: يا إبني إن تقدمت لخدمة الرب هيئ نفسك للتجارب. قوم قلبك وأحتمل ولا تنحل فى زمان أتعابك

languages.coptic: Tomk e~rof n~teks~temhenk e~bol m~mof: je eke~aiai qen tekqae~:
languages.english: Cleave to Him and do not fall away, That you may be honored at the end of your life.
languages.arabic: التصق به ولا تبتعد عنه. لكى تنمو فى آخرتك.

languages.coptic: hwb niben eyn/ou e~jwk sopou e~rok n~tekswpi n~refw~oun~h/t qen pkahi m~pekyebio: je e~sauer dokimazin gar m~pinoub hiten pi,~rwm: nicwthwou n~te nirwmi qen ouhrw n~yebio:
languages.english: Accept whatever is brought upon you, and in exchange for your humiliation, be patient; because gold is tested in fire and acceptable men in the furnace of abasement.
languages.arabic: أقبل كل ما يأتى عليك لتكون طويل الروح فى أرض تواضعك فإن الذهب يمحص بالنار. والمختارين من الناس فى أتون الذل

languages.coptic: Nah] e~rof ouoh f~nasopk e~rof: couten nekmwit n~tekerhelpic e~rof:
languages.english: Believe in Him, and He will help you; make your ways straight and hope in Him.
languages.arabic: آمن به فينصرك. قوم سبلك وليكن عليه إتكالك.

languages.coptic: N/e~terho] qat~h/ m~P[oic joust qat~h/ m~pefnai: m~perriki je n~netenhei: n/e~terho] qat~h/ m~P[oic nah] e~rof: ouoh netenbe,e n~noutako.
languages.english: You who fear the Lord, wait for His mercy, and do not turn aside, lest you fall. You who fear the Lord, believe in Him, and your reward will not fail.
languages.arabic: أيها المتقون الرب أنتظروا رحمته ولا تحيدوا لئلا تسقطوا يا خائفى الرب آمنوا به فلا يضيع أجركم

languages.coptic: N/e~terho] qath/ m~P[oic erhelpic e~hana~gayon nem ouwnq n~e~neh nem ounai.
languages.english: You who fear the Lord, hope for good things and for everlasting gladness and mercy.
languages.arabic: ويا خائفى الرب إرجوا الخيرات والحياة الأبدية والرحمة.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Mahap e~pahap ouoh cott: eybe pekcaji mariwnq:
languages.english: Plead my cause and redeem me; give me life because of Your word.
languages.arabic: إحكم حكمى ونجني من أجل كلامك أحيني.

languages.coptic: F~ou/~ou cabol n~niref e~rnobi n~je pioujai: je nekmeym/i m~poukw] n~cwou: all/louia.
languages.english: Salvation is far from sinners, for they have not searched Your ordinances. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: بعيد الخلاص من الخطاة لأنهم لم يطلبوا حقوقك. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Matyeon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Matthew. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار متى البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Ieroucal/m Ieroucal/m y/etqwteb n~nip~rov/t/c ouoh e~thiw~ni e~jen n/e~tauouorpou haroc:
languages.english: “O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, the one who kills the prophets and stones those who are sent to her!
languages.arabic: يا أورشليم يا أورشليم يا قاتلة الأنبياء وراجمة المرسلين إليها.

languages.coptic: Oum/s n~cop aiouws e~you/t nes/ri m~v~r/] n~ouhal/t e~safywou] n~nefmac e~qoun qaneftenh ouoh m~petenouws:
languages.english: How often I wanted to gather your children together, as a hen gathers her chicks under her wings, but you were not willing!
languages.arabic: كم من مرة أردت أن أجمع بنيك كما يجمع الطائر فراخه تحت جناحيه فلم تريدوا.

languages.coptic: H/ppe ]na,w m~petn/i nwten efswf. ]jw gar m~moc nwten je n~netennau e~roi icjen ]nou satetenjoc je f~c~marwout n~je v/eyn/ou qen v~ran m~P[oic:
languages.english: See! Your house is left to you desolate; for I say to you, you shall see Me no more till you say, ‘Blessed is He who comes in the name of the LORD!’”
languages.arabic: هوذا أترك لكم بيتكم خراباً. فأنى أقول لكم أنكم من الآن لا ترونى حتى تقولوا مبارك بإسم الرب.

languages.coptic: Ouoh e~tafi~ ouoh aui~ harof n~je nefmay/t/c eutamo m~mof n~nikwt n~te piervei:
languages.english: Then Jesus went out and departed from the temple, and His disciples came up to show Him the buildings of the temple.
languages.arabic: ولما خرج يسوع من الهيكل ومضى. تقدم إليه تلاميذه ليروه بناء الهيكل
