languages.coptic: Hanouon de e~bol n~q/tou ausenwou ha nivariceoc autamwou e~v/e~tafaitou n~je I/couc:
languages.english: But some of them went away to the Pharisees and told them the things Jesus did.
languages.arabic: وذهب قوم منهم الى الفريسيين واخبروهم بما فعل يسوع

languages.coptic: Auywou] oun n~je niar,/e~reuc nem nivariceoc n~ouywoutc: ouoh naujw m~moc je ou petennaaif nase nim/ini n~te pairwmi i~ri m~mwou:
languages.english: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees gathered a council and said, “What shall we do? For this Man works many signs.
languages.arabic: فجمع رؤساء الكهنة والفريسيون مجمعا وقالوا: ماذا نصنع فان هذا الإنسان يعمل آيات كثيرة,

languages.coptic: Ouoh e~swp ansan,af m~pair/] cenanah] e~rof t/rou: ouoh cenai~ n~je nirwmeoc cenawli m~pentopoc nem pens~lol.
languages.english: If we let Him alone like this, everyone will believe in Him, and the Romans will come and take away both our place and nation.”
languages.arabic: وان تركناه هكذا يؤمن الجميع به فيأتي الرومانيون ويأخذون موضعنا وامتنا.

languages.coptic: Afe~rouw~ de n~je ouai e~bol n~q/tou e~pefran pe Kaia~va foi n~ar,/e~reuc n~te ]rompi e~tem~mau: pejaf nwou je n~ywten tetencwoun nh~li an.
languages.english: And one of them, Caiaphas, being high priest that year, said to them, “You know nothing at all,
languages.arabic: فأجاب واحد منهم إسمه قيافا, كان رئيساً للكهنة في تلك السنة وقال لهم: أنتم لا تعرفون شيئاً,

languages.coptic: Ouoh tetenmokmek m~mwten an je ernofri nwten hina n~te ourwmi n~ouwt mou e~h~r/i e~jen pilaoc ouoh n~tes~tem piynoc t/rf tako:
languages.english: Nor do you consider that it is expedient for us that one man should die for the people, and not that the whole nation should perish.”
languages.arabic: ولا تفكرون أنه خير لكم أن يموت إنسان واحد عن الشعب ولا تهلك الأمة كلها.

languages.coptic: Netaf je vai an e~bol hitotf m~mauatf alla je nafoi n~ar,/e~reuc n~te ]rompi e~tem~mau aferp~rov/teuin je hw] n~te I/couc mou e~h~r/i e~jen pis~lol.
languages.english: Now this he did not say on his own authority; but being high priest that year he prophesied that Jesus would die for the nation,
languages.arabic: ولم يقل هذا من تلقاء نفسه, بل انه إذ كان رئيس الكهنة في تلك السنة تنبأ أنه ينبغي أن يموت يسوع عن الأمة,

languages.coptic: Ouoh e~jen pis~lol m~mauatf an: alla hina nikes/ri n~te Vnou] etj/r e~bol ]~Ioudea afsenaf e~bol m~mau e~ou,wr ntefyowtou eumetouai:
languages.english: And not for that nation only, but also that He would gather together in one the children of God who were scattered abroad.
languages.arabic: وليس عن الأمة فقط, بل ليجمع أيضاً أبناء الله المتفرقين إلي واحد.

languages.coptic: I/couc jen pie~hoou e~tem~mau auco[ni hina n~ceqoybef: I/couc de nafmosi an je pe n~ouwnh e~bolqen ]Ioudea afsenaf e~bol m~mau e~ou,wra qaten pisafe e~oubaki eumou] e~roc je e~V~rem ouoh afswpi m~mau nem nefmay/t/c.
languages.english: Then, from that day on, they plotted to put Him to death. Therefore Jesus no longer walked openly among the Jews, but went from there into the country near the wilderness, to a city called Ephraim, and there remained with His disciples.
languages.arabic: ومن ذلك اليوم تشاوروا أن يقتلوه, وأما يسوع فلم يكن يمشي في اليهودية علانية بعد ولكنه إنطلق من هناك إلي كورة عند البرية, إلي مدينة تدعي آفرايم, ومكث هناك مع تلاميذه.

languages.coptic: Nafqent de pe n~je pipac,a n~te niIoudai: ouoh aui~ n~je oum/s e~h~r/i e~Ieroucal/m e~bolqen ],wra qajen pipac,a hina n~toutoubwou:
languages.english: And the Passover of the Jews was near, and many went from the country up to Jerusalem before the Passover, to purify themselves.
languages.arabic: وكان فصح اليهود قد قرب, فصعد كثيرون من الكورة إلي أورشليم قبل الفصح ليتطهروا

languages.coptic: Naukw] oun pe n~ca I/couc n~je niIoudai eujwmmoc n~noue~r/ou euo~hi e~ratou qen piervei: je oupe e~tetenmeui e~rof je f~nai~ an e~h~r/i e~paisai:
languages.english: Then they sought Jesus, and spoke among themselves as they stood in the temple, “What do you think—that He will not come to the feast?”
languages.arabic: وكان اليهود يطلبون يسوع قائلين بعضهم لبعض وهم قائمون فى الهيكل: ماذا تظنون هل لا يأتى الى العيد؟

languages.coptic: Neau] entol/ de pe n~je niar,/e~reuc nem nivariceoc hina a~resan ouai e~mi je afywn n~teftamwou e~rof hina n~cetahof.
languages.english: Now both the chief priests and the Pharisees had given a command, that if anyone knew where He was, he should report it, that they might seize Him.
languages.arabic: وكان رؤساء الكهنة والفريسيون قد أوصوا أنه اذا علم أحد اين هو فليدل عليه لكى يمسكوه.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the First Hour of Wednesday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الاولى، من يوم الأربعاء من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: As the Pharisees gathered together and said to one another “what can we do?”
languages.arabic: فاجتمع الفريسيون وخاطب بعضهم بعضا قائلين: ما الذي نصنعه؟

languages.english: This man is doing many miracles and supernatural things. If we leave him alone all the people will believe in him; then the Romans will replace us.
languages.arabic: فان هذا الرجل يصنع آيات وعجائب كثيرة وان تركناه فسيؤمن به الكل فيأتي الرومانيون ويأخذون موضعنا

languages.english: One of them, who is Caiaphas, the chief priest of the Jews said: "It is expedient for you that one man should die for the people, and that the whole nation should not perish."
languages.arabic: فقال أحدهم الذي هو قيافا رئيس كهنة اليهود: أنه يجب أن يموت رجل واحد عن الشعب دون الأمة كلها

languages.english: And from then on they conspired to kill Jesus. Jesus went into the wilderness and stayed there with his disciples.
languages.arabic: ومن تلك الساعة تشاوروا على يسوع مشورة رديئة ليقتلوه فمضى يسوع الى كورة فى البرية واقام هناك مع تلاميذه

languages.english: And it was about the time of the feast of the Jews, the Jews who sought to kill Him. Verily it was a fulfillment of the prophecy of Isaiah: "Wail on a nation full of evil.
languages.arabic: وكان قد قرب عيد اليهود وكانوا يطلبونه لكى يقتلوه. بالحقيقة اكمل ما قاله عليهم أشعياء النبي: الويل للامة المملوءة إثماً

languages.english: A brood of evil doers. Children who are corrupt. For the ox knows its owner, and the donkey its master, but Israel does not know that I am his creator. Therefore, they shall be with their children in Hell-their home-forever.
languages.arabic: الزرع الفاسد الأبناء المخالفين من اجل أن الثور عرف مذوده والحمار عرف قانية واسرائيل لم يعرفنى ولم يعلم اننى انا خالقه من اجل ذلك يخلدون هم وإبناؤهم فى الجحيم بيتهم الى الأبد.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pidoxodoc n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Exodus of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر الخروج لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Qen p~jiny~re varaw~ ,w m~pilaoc e~bol m~pef[imwit qajwou n~je Vnou] e~v~mwit m~Vulictin: je nafqent pe:
languages.english: Thus when Pharaoh let the people go, God did not lead them by way of the land of the Philistines, although that was near;
languages.arabic: وعندما اطلق فرعون الشعب لم يهدهم الله الى طريق فلسطين مع انها كانت قريبة

languages.coptic: Eafjoc gar n~je P[oic: je m/pote n~tefouwmn~h~y/f n~je pilaoc afsannau e~oupolemoc n~tefkotf e~q~r/i e~,/mi:
languages.english: for God said, "Lest perhaps the people change their minds when they see war' and return to Egypt."
languages.arabic: لان الرب قال لئلا يندم الشعب اذا رأى حربا فيرجع الى مصر

languages.coptic: A Vnou] tacyo mpilaoc e~v~mwit etjajw e~q~r/i e~v~iom n~sari: qen pijwou de mmah t~iou a~nens/ri m~p~Icra/l i e~h~r/i e~bolqen ,/mi.
languages.english: So God led the people around by way of the desert to the Red Sea, and in the fifth generation the children of Israel went up from the land of Egypt.
languages.arabic: فادار الله الشعب الى الطريق الوعرة الى البحر الأحمر. فى الجيل الخامس خرج بنو اسرائيل من مصر.

languages.coptic: Afw~li de n~je Mwu~c/c n~nikac n~te Iwc/f nemaf: qen oua~nas gar a~Iwc/f tarko n~nens/ri mp~Icra/l efjwmmoc:
languages.english: Now Moses took the bones of Joseph with him, for he had placed the children of Israel under solemn oath, saying,
languages.arabic: وحمل موسي عظام يوسف معه، لان يوسف كان قد استحلف بني اسرائيل بحلف قائلا:

languages.coptic: je qen oujem p~sini f~najempetensini n~je P[oic e~retenw~li n~nakac nemwten:
languages.english: "God will surely visit you, and you shall carry up my bones from here with you."
languages.arabic: إن الرب سيفتقدكم افتقادا فاحملوا عظامى من هنا معكم

languages.coptic: Autwounou de n~je nens/ri m~p~Icra/l e~bolqen Co,wy aumosi e~q~r/i qen Oyom qaten p~safe.
languages.english: So they took their journey from Succoth and camped in Etham by the desert.
languages.arabic: وارتحل بنو اسرائيل من سكوت) العريش( ونزلوا فى إيثام عند البرية.

languages.coptic: Vnou] de nafmosi qajwou qen pie~hoou qen ouc~tulloc n[/pi e~tamwou e~v~mwit: m~pie~jwrh de qen ouc~tulloc n~,rwm:
languages.english: Moreover, God led them, by day in a pillar of cloud to show them the way, and by night in a pillar of fire.
languages.arabic: وكان الله يسير أمامهم نهارا بعمود سحاب ليهديهم الطريق وليلا فى عمود نار

languages.coptic: Mpefmounk n~je pic~tulloc n~[/pi qen pie~hoou ouoh pic~tulloc n~,rwm m~pie~jwrh m~pem~yo e~bol m~pilaoc t/rf.
languages.english: Thus the pillar of cloud by day and the pillar of fire by night did not depart from before all the people.
languages.arabic: ولم يزل عمود السحاب نهارا وعمود النار ليلا من أمام الشعب.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen I/cou n~te Cira, pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Wisdom of Joshua, son of Sirach, the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من يشوع بن سيراخ النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: V/et ]cbw garn~oucojf~oi m~vr/] m~v/ettem velj e~velj: nem m~v~r/] mvettounoc v/etenkot qen ouhunim efhors:
languages.english: He who teaches a fool is like one who glues pottery together, or like trying to arouse one from a sound sleep.
languages.arabic: الذي يؤدب الأحمق كمن يلصق شقفة علي شقفة وكمن ينبه مستغرقاً في نوم ثقيل

languages.coptic: v/etcaji nem oucoj f~oi m~v~r/] m~v/etcaji nem ouai efhunim: ouoh t~qae safjoc je ou petsop:
languages.english: He who tells something to a fool tells it to a drowsy man, and at the end he will say, "What is it?"
languages.arabic: من يكلم الأحمق كمن يكلم متناعسا وفى النهاية يقول: ماذا حدث؟

languages.coptic: Rimi e~jen ourefmwout je af,w n~cwf n~piouwini: ouoh rimi e~jen oucoj je af,w n~cwf n~]metcabe.
languages.english: Weep for a dead man, for he left the light behind; but weep over a fool, for he left intelligence behind.
languages.arabic: ابك على الميت لأنه ترك النور وابك على الأحمق ,لأنه ترك الأدب

languages.coptic: Nane ourimi e~jen ourevmwout jeafm~ton m~mof: p~wnq de m~picoj f~hwou e~hotepefmou:
languages.english: Weep gladly for a dead man, because he is at rest; but the life of the fool is worse than death.
languages.arabic: افضل البكاء على الميت لأنه استراح اما الأحمق فحياته أشقى من موته

languages.coptic: Sasf n~e~hoou pe p~h/bi n~ouref mwout: vapicoj de nem pia~ceb/c pe peva~ji t/rf
languages.english: Mourning for a dead man lasts seven days, but mourning for a fool or an ungodly man lasts all his life.
languages.arabic: النوح على الميت سبعة ايام والنوح على الأحمق والمنافق جميع ايام حياته

languages.coptic: m~per era~sai n~caji nem oucoj: ouoh m~perse e~ratf n~ouat//t:
languages.english: Do not hold a conversation with a fool, and do not visit with a senseless man.
languages.arabic: لا تكثر الكلام مع الأحمق ولا تخالط الجاهل تحفظ منه.

languages.coptic: a~reh e~rok e~bolharof hopwc n~nekqici ouoh n~nek ywleb:
languages.english: Beware of him, so as to avoid trouble, and you will not be defiled when he shakes himself off.
languages.arabic: لئلا تتعب وتتدنس اذا شد الرحال

languages.coptic: Afsanahf e~bolhenk cabol m~mof tarekjimi n~ouemton ouoh n~nek erm~kah n~h/t qen teva~nomia~.
languages.english: Stay away from him, and you will find rest and not be exhausted by his insanity.
languages.arabic: اعرض عنة فتجد راحة ولا تحزن بأثامه.

languages.coptic: Oupethors p~itath: ouoh oupe pefran hwf e~b/l e~picoj: c~moten n~fai qaousw nem ouh~mou: nem outaj m~benipi e~hote ourwmi n~ath/t:
languages.english: What will be heavier than lead? And what will be his name but "Fool"? Sand, salt, and a piece of iron are easier to bear than a senseless man.
languages.arabic: ما هو الأثقل من الرصاص وما اسمه أيضاً إلا الأحمق الرمل والملح وقرمة الحديد أخف حملا من الرجل الجاهل

languages.coptic: Mv~r/] n~oulajlej n~se efm/r qen oukwt n~nefkim qen oumonmen: vai pe m~f~r/t n~ouh/t eftajr/out e~jen ouco[ni:
languages.english: A wooden beam bound together in a building will not be broken loose in an earthquake; so a heart strengthened by reasonable counsel will not be afraid in a crisis.
languages.arabic: مثل رباط الخشب مشدود فى البناء لا يتفكك فى الزلزلة كذلك القلب الثابت بالمشورة

languages.coptic: Nem ouh/t eftajr/out e~jen oumeui~ n~ka] n~neferho] sae~neh:
languages.english: A heart settled on intelligent thought is like a plaster decoration on a smooth wall.
languages.arabic: والقلب الثابت بفكر الفهم لا يجزع الى الأبد كزينة الجدار المشيد

languages.coptic: Mv~r/] m~p~cai n~oujoi ec[eh: m~v~r/] n~han kas hijen ouma evca p~[wi n~nouheri nahren y/ou niben: vai pe m~v~r/] n~ouh/t n~jwb: nem oumeui~ n~coj: n~nefheri nahren ho] niben.
languages.english: As fences set on a high place will not stand firm against the wind, so a cowardly heart in the thought of a fool cannot stand firm against any kind of fear.
languages.arabic: وكمثل قضيب على مكان مرتفع لا يهدأ أمام كل ريح كذلك القلب الضعيف وفكر الأحمق لا يهدأ أمام كل هول.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Nafn/ou e~qoun pe e~nau nafcaji n~oumet e~v~l/ou: ouoh pefh/t afywou] naf n~ouanomia~.
languages.english: And if he comes to see us, he speaks in vain; his heart gathered lawlessness to itself.
languages.arabic: كان يدخل لينظر فكان يتكلم باطلاً, وقلبه جمع له إثماً.

languages.coptic: Wouniatf m~v/eynaka] e~jen ouh/ki nem oujwb: qen pie~hoou ethwou efe~nahmef n~je P[oic: all/louia.
languages.english: Blessed is he who understands the poor and needy; the Lord will deliver him in an evil day. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: طوبى لمن يتفهم في أمر المسكين والضعيف, في يوم السوء ينجيه الرب. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Loukan a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Luke. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار لوقا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Nafqent de pe n~je p~sai n~te niatsem/r v/e~toumou] e~rof je pipac,a:
languages.english: Now the Feast of Unleavened Bread drew near, which is called Passover.
languages.arabic: وكان قد قرب عيد الفطير, الذي يقال له الفصح,

languages.coptic: Ouoh naukw] pe n~je niar,/e~reuc nem nicaq je aunatakof n~as n~r/] nauerho] gar pe qat~h/ m~pilaoc:
languages.english: And the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might kill Him, for they feared the people.
languages.arabic: وكان رؤساء الكهنة والكتبة يطلبون كيف يهلكونه, لأنهم كانوا يخافون الشعب,

languages.coptic: A p~catanac de se e~qoun e~p~h/t n~Ioudac v/e~toumou] e~rof je piickariwt/c eouai pe e~bol qen pim/t cnau.
languages.english: Then Satan entered Judas, surnamed Iscariot, who was numbered among the twelve.
languages.arabic: فدخل الشيطان قلب يهوذا الذي يدعى الإسخريوطي وهو أحد الإثني عشر.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afsenaf afcaji nem niar,/e~reuc nem nicat/gouc eybe pir/] e~tefnat/if e~totou:
languages.english: So he went his way and conferred with the chief priests and captains, how he might betray Him to them.
languages.arabic: فمضي وفاوض رؤساء الكهنة وقواد الجند كيف يسلمه إليهم,

languages.coptic: Ouoh aurasi ouoh aucemn/tc nemaf e~] naf n~ouhat ouoh afere~xomologin ouoh nafkw] pe n~ca oueukeria~ hina n~teft/if e~totou at[ne m/s.
languages.english: And they were glad, and agreed to give him money. So he promised and sought opportunity to betray Him to them in the absence of the multitude.
languages.arabic: ففرحوا وعاهدوه أن يعطوه فضة, وكان يتحين فرصة ليسلمه إليهم بمعزل عن الجميع.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Third Hour of Wednesday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الثالثة، من يوم الأربعاء من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: When the Feast of the unleavened bread, which is the Passover of the Jews, was near, the scribes and the chief priests sought a way to kill Jesus, but they did not know what to do because they feared the public.
languages.arabic: ولما قرب عيد الفطير الذي هو فصح اليهود كان الكتبة ورؤساء الكهنة يطلبون كيف يهلكون يسوع ولم يعلموا ماذا يصنعون فانهم كانوا يخافون من الجمع

languages.english: But Satan found himself a place in the heart of his accomplice, Judas Iscariot, who was counted among the disciples but was a Satan as the Lord described him. He went to the chief priests and the Sadducees to make a deal to deliver Jesus to them.
languages.arabic: فوجد الشيطان له مسكنا فى قلب رفيقه يهوذا الاسخريوطى وكان هذا محسوبا فى عد التلاميذ وكان شيطانا كقول الرب فمضى وخاطب رؤساء الكهنة والصدوقيين أن يسلمه اليهم

languages.english: The evil natured disciple discussed with his evil friends how to deliver to them the Savior of the World. They were more than pleased and paid him silver so that he may deliver him to them in absence of the people.
languages.arabic: فتكلم النجس مع اصحابه ان يسلم اليهم مخلص العالم ففرح الأنجاس الممتلئون غشا فرحا عظيما وقرروا معه ان يعطوه فضة حتى يسلمه اليهم خلوا من الجمع.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pidoxodoc n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Exodus of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر الخروج لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Peje mwu~c/c de nahren pilaoc je jemno]: e~reteno~hi e~raten y/nou e~retennau e~pioujai pie~bolhiten P[oic: vai e~tefnaaif nwten m~voou:
languages.english: Then Moses said to the people, "Be of good courage. Stand still and see the Lord's salvation which He will accomplish for you today.
languages.arabic: فقال موسى للشعب: تقووا قفوا وانظروا خلاص الرب يصنعه لكم اليوم

languages.coptic: Mv~r/ gar etaretennau e~niremn~,/mi m~voou: n~netenouahteny/nou enau e~rwou sae~neh n~ouc/ou: P[oic v/et] e~jen y/nou n~ywten de ,arwten.
languages.english: For the Egyptians whom you see today, you will never see again. The Lord will fight for you, and you shall hold your peace."
languages.arabic: فأنه كما رايتم المصريين اليوم لا تعودون ترونهم الى الابد؛ الرب يقاتل عنكم وانتم تصمتون

languages.coptic: Peje P[oic de m~Mwu~c/c je a~qok ekws e~p~swi haroi caji nem nens/ri m~p~Icra/l eue~kotou e~vahou:
languages.english: Then the Lord said to Moses, "Why do you cry to Me? Tell the children of Israel to go forward.
languages.arabic: فقال الرب لموسى ما بالك تصرخ الى؟ قل لبنى اسرائيل ان يرجعوا الى الوراء

languages.coptic: N~tekw~li m~peksbwt n~tekcouten tekjij e~h~r/i e~jen v~iom n~tekvaqf: n~te nens/ri m~p~Icra/l se e~qoun e~y~m/] m~viom kata petsouw~ou:
languages.english: Now lift up your rod, and stretch out your hand over the sea and divide it; and let the children of Israel go on dry ground through the midst of the sea.
languages.arabic: وخذ عصاك ومد يدك على البحر وشقه فيدخل بنو اسرائيل فى وسط البحر

languages.coptic: Ic h/ppe a~nok ]na] ensot m~p~h/t m~Varaw~ nem niremn~,/mi n~cei~ e~qoun cavahou m~mwou: n~ta[iw~ou qen Varaw~ nem pefm/s t/rf ouoh n~h~r/i qen nefharma nem nefh~ywr.
languages.english: I indeed will harden Pharaoh's heart and all the Egyptians, and they will go in after them. So I will be glorified in Pharaoh and over all his army, his chariots, and his horses.
languages.arabic: كما على اليابسة وها انا اقسى قلب فرعون والمصريين حتى يدخلوا وراءهم فاتمجد بفرعون وكل جيشه بمركباته وفرسانه.

languages.coptic: N~cee~mi t/rou n~je niremn~,/mi je a~nok pe P[oic eie~[iw~ou qen Varaw~ nem nefharma nem nefh~ywr:
languages.english: Then the Egyptians will know I am the Lord, when I am glorified upon Pharaoh, his chariots, and his horses."
languages.arabic: فيعلم كل المصريين أنى أنا هو الرب أتمجد بفرعون ومراكبه وفرسانه.

languages.coptic: Aftwnf de n~je piaggeloc n~te P[oic efmosi hit~h/ n~]parembol/ n~te nens/ri m~p~Icra/l afmosi hivahou m~mwou: afouwteb de on n~je pic~tulloc n~[/pi etqajwou:
languages.english: Now the Angel of God who went before the camp of Israel moved and went behind them; and the pillar of cloud also went from before them and stood behind them.
languages.arabic: فقام ملاك الرب السائر أمام عسكر بنى اسرائيل وسار وراءهم. وأنتقل عمود السحاب من أمامهم

languages.coptic: afse e~qoun oute ]parembol/ n~te niremn~,/mi: nem oute ]parembol/ n~te p~Icra/l afohi e~ratf ouoh afswpi n~je ou,aki nem oug novoc: ouoh afcini n~je pie~jwrh ouoh mpoumojt nem noue~r/ou m~pie~jwrh t/rf.
languages.english: So it came between the camp of the Egyptians and the camp of Israel, and the night passed; but there was such darkness and blackness, they did not come near one another all that night.
languages.arabic: ودخل مابين عسكر المصريين وعسكر اسرائيل ووقف فصار ظلاماً وضباباً. وعبر الليل. ولم يختلط (يقترب) أحد بعضهم بعضاً الليل كله.

languages.coptic: Afcouten tefjij de n~je Mwu~c/c e~h~r/i e~jen v~iom: afi~ni n~je P[oic m~pie~jwrh t/rf n~ouyour/c efnast: aftsouie v~iom: e~afvwq n~je pimwou:
languages.english: Then Moses stretched out his hand over the sea; and the Lord carried back the sea by a strong south wind all that night and made the sea dry ground. Thus the waters were divided.
languages.arabic: ومد موسى يده على البحر فجلب الرب ريحاً قبلية شرقية شديدة الليل كله فنشف البحر وإنشق الماء,

languages.coptic: Ause e~qoun n~je nens/ri m~PIcra/l e~y~m/] m~v~iom kata petsouw~ou: ouoh pimwou afsopnwou n~cobt caoui~nam nem caja[/ m~mwou:
languages.english: So the children of Israel went into the midst of the sea on the dry ground, and the waters were a wall to them on their right hand and on their left.
languages.arabic: فدخل بنو اسرائيل في وسط البحر علي اليبس وصار الماء لهم سوراً عن يمينهم وعن يسارهم

languages.coptic: Au[oji n~je niremn~,/mi cavahou n~nens/ri m~p~Icra/l ouoh au[oji n~cwou n~je nih~ywr t/rou n~te Varaw~ nem nefharma nem n/ettal/oute~h~r/i e~jwou e~y~m/] m~v~iom.
languages.english: Then the Egyptians pursued and went after them into the midst of the sea, all Pharaoh's horses, chariots, and horsemen.
languages.arabic: وتعقب المصريون بني اسرائيل ودخل وراءهم جميع خيل فرعون ومركباته إلي وسط البحر

languages.coptic: Acswpi de qen v~nau n~hana~tooui~: a~ P[oic joust e~jen ]parembol/ n~te niremn~,/mi qen pic~tulloc n~,~rwm nem ][/pi: afs~yorter n~]parembol/ n~te niremn~,/mi:
languages.english: Now it came to pass, in the morning watch, the Lord looked down upon the army of the Egyptians through the pillar of fire and cloud; and He troubled the army of the Egyptians.
languages.arabic: وكان في هزيع الصبح أن الرب إطلع علي عسكر المصريين من عمود النار والغمام وازعج عسكر المصريين.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afmour n~niauxwn n~nouharma afi~nimmwou e~qoun n~jonc: pejwou n~je niremn~,/mi je marenvwt qath/ m~PIcra/l: P[oic gar ] e~h~r/i e~jwou oube niremn~,/mi:
languages.english: He bound the axles of their chariot wheels and caused them to proceed with difficulty; and the Egyptians said, "Let us flee from the face of Israel, for the Lord fights for them against the Egyptians."
languages.arabic: وربط بكر مركباتهم وسقاهم قسراً فقال المصريون فلنهرب من أمام اسرائيل لأن الرب يقاتل عنهم ضد المصريين.

languages.coptic: Peje P[oic de m~Mwu~c/c: je couten tekjij e~bole~h~r/i e~jen v~iom: n~te pimwou i~ e~pefma n~tefhwbc n~niremn~,/mi: e~h~r/i e~jen niharma nem n/ettal/out e~h~r/i e~jwou.
languages.english: Then the Lord said to Moses, "Stretch out your hand over the sea so the waters may come back upon the Egyptians, on their chariots and the riders."
languages.arabic: فقال الرب لموسي: مد يدك علي البحر فيرجع الماء إلي مكانه, فيغطي المصريين. ومركباتهم وفرسانهم.

languages.coptic: Afcouten tef jij e~bol n~je Mwu~c/c e~h~r/i e~jen v~iom: apimwou i~ e~pefma p~kwt n~oue~hoou: niremn~,/mi de ausenwou qaratf m~pimwou:
languages.english: So Moses stretched out his hand over the sea; and when the morning appeared, the sea returned to its full depth, while the Egyptians were trying to flee.
languages.arabic: فمد موسي يده علي البحر فرجع الماء إلي مكانه عند إقبال النهار والمصريين هاربون تحت الماء,

languages.coptic: P[oic de afborber n~niremn~,/mi qen y~m/] m~viom:
languages.english: But the Lord shook off the Egyptians in the midst of the sea.
languages.arabic: وغرق الرب المصريين في وسط البحر

languages.coptic: Afkotf n~je pimwou afhwbc n~niharma nem n/ettal/out eh~r/ie~jwou: nem ]jom t/rc n~te Varaw~:
languages.english: Then the waters returned and covered the chariots, the horsemen, and all of Pharaoh's army that came into the sea after them.
languages.arabic: ورجع الماء وغطي المركبات والفرسان وكل قوات فرعون الداخلين وراءهم في البحر,

languages.coptic: nai e~tau[oji n~cwou e~q~r/i ev~iom: m~pefewjp n~je ouai e~bol n~q/tou:
languages.english: Not so much as one of them remained. But the children of Israel walked on dry ground in the midst of the sea.
languages.arabic: ولم يبق منهم أحد, وأما بنو اسرائيل فمشوا علي اليابسة في وسط البحر

languages.coptic: Nens/ri de m~PIcra/l naumosi hijen petwouw~ou qen y~m/] m~v~iom: pimwou de afswpi nwou n~cobt caoui~nam nem caja[/ m~mwou: P[oic afnohem m~PIcra/l qen pie~hoou e~tem~mau e~bolqen t~jij n~niremn~,/mi:
languages.english: The waters were a wall to them on their right hand and on their left. So the Lord saved Israel that day from the hand of the Egyptians,
languages.arabic: وصار الماء سوراً عن يمينهم وشمالهم فخلص الرب في ذلك اليوم اسرائيل من يد المصريين.

languages.coptic: Afnau n~je p~Icra/l eniremn~,/mi eaumou qaten pic~votou mviom:
languages.english: and Israel saw the Egyptians dead on the seashore.
languages.arabic: ونظر اسرائيل المصريين امواتاً علي شاطئ البحر

languages.coptic: Ouoh afnau e~]nis] n~jij e~tafaic n~je P[oic n~niremn~,/mi: aferho] n~je pilaoc qath/ m~P[oic: ouoh aunah] e~ Vnou] nem pefbwk Mwu~c/c.
languages.english: Thus Israel saw the Lord's mighty hand and the things He did to the Egyptians; therefore, the people feared the Lord and believed God and His servant Moses.
languages.arabic: وشاهد اليد القوية العظيمة التي صنعها الرب بالمصريين فخاف الشعب الرب وأمنوا بالله وبعبده موسي.

languages.coptic: Tote afhwc n~je Mwu~c/c nem nens/ri m~PIcra/l e~taihwd/ m~Vnou] e~afjoc eyroujoc je marenhwc e~P[oic je qen ouw~ou gar af[iw~ou.
languages.english: Now Moses and the children of Israel sang this song to God and spoke, saying: "Let us sing to the Lord, for He is greatly glorified.
languages.arabic: حينئذ سبح موسي وبنو اسرائيل بهذه التسبحة لله قائلاً: ليقولوا فلنسبح الرب لأنه بالمجد قد تمجد.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen I/cou n~te Cira, pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Wisdom of Joshua, son of Sirach, the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من يشوع بن سيراخ النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Cwtem pas/ri e~ouc~bw nterwi: ouoh v/eta~reh e~roc n~neftako: ouoh eue~jemc qen nefc~votou:
languages.english: My children, hear the teaching of my mouth, for he who keeps it will not be conquered.
languages.arabic: إسمع يا إبني تعليم فمي, من يحفظه لن يهلك, وسيوجد بشفتيه,

languages.coptic: Pirefernobi de nem pirefcahoui~ nem pi[a~cih/t naerc~kandalizin n~q/tou:
languages.english: A sinner will be overtaken by his lips, and a slanderer and arrogant man will be made to stumble by them.
languages.arabic: وأما الخاطئ والشتام والمتكبر فيشكون فيه,

languages.coptic: Mpertcabe rwk e~wrk: ouoh m~pert~cabok e~taoue~ v~ran m~v/eyouab.
languages.english: Do not accustom your mouth to vows, nor make a habit of using the name of the Holy One.
languages.arabic: لا تعود فمك الحلف, ولا تألف تسمية القدوس,

languages.coptic: Mv~r/] gar n~oubwk eusenf n~oum/s n~cop: n~nefere~bol e~as:
languages.english: For as a servant who is continually beaten will not lack bruises,
languages.arabic: فإنه كما أن العبد الذي يحاسب مراراً كثيرة لا يفلت من العقاب,

languages.coptic: vai pe m~v~r/] m~v/etwrk ettaouo m~piran n~oum/s n~cop: e~te n~nefs~toubo an e~nobi.
languages.english: So also he who makes a vow and continually names the Holy One will never be cleansed from sin.
languages.arabic: كذلك من يحلف ويذكر الإسم (القدوس) مرات عديدة فلا يمكن أن يتبرر من الخطية,

languages.coptic: Ourwmi n~refa~sai n~wrk: f~namoh n~anomia: ouoh n~neoumactiggoc ,a pef/i: afsanouwm n~h~y/f pefnobi n~h/t sau,w naf e~bol: ouoh afsanobsf a~pefnobi erc~nau:
languages.english: A man who swears many oaths will be filled with lawlessness, and that plague will not depart from his house. If he offends, his sin will be on him, and if he overlooks it, he has sinned doubly.
languages.arabic: الرجل الكثير الحلف يمتلئ إثماً ولا يبرح السوط بيته, فإذا ندم غفرت خطية قلبه وإن تغافل فخطيته مضاعفة

languages.coptic: ouoh e~swp afsanwrk e~v~l/ou n~nefymaio: pef/i gar namoh n~themko.
languages.english: If he swears in vain, he will not be declared righteous, for his house will be filled with trouble.
languages.arabic: وإن حلف باطلاً لا يتبرر وبيته يمتلئ نوائباً,

languages.coptic: Oucaji efjolh mvmou: n~noujemf qen ]k~l/ronomia n~Iakwb: nai gar t/rou nauei n~niremn~nou]: ouoh n~noujemou qen ninobi:
languages.english: There is a way of speaking comparable to death. May it not be found in the inheritance of Jacob; for all these things will be far from the godly, and they will not be involved in sins.
languages.arabic: كلام مشمول بالموت لا يوجد في ميراثك يا يعقوب أن هذه كلها تبتعد عن رجال الله, فلا يوجدون في الخطايا.

languages.coptic: Mpertcabe rwk e~c~bw echwou: je ouon caji n~nobi n~q/tou.
languages.english: Do not accustom your mouth to lewd expressions, for this is sinful speech.
languages.arabic: لا تعلم فاك سوء الأدب, لأن كلام الخطية يوجد فيه.

languages.coptic: Ari v~meui~ m~pekiwt nem tekmau: e~,naywou] gar e~qoun qen y~m/] n~hannis]: m/pote n~tekerp~wbs m~poum~yo e~bol: n~tekercoj n~tektapc:
languages.english: Remember your father and mother when you sit in council with great men, lest you forget yourself in their presence and by habit act foolishly.
languages.arabic: أذكر أباك وأمك, إذا اجتمعت بالعظماء لئلا تنساهما أمامهم وتصير جاهلاً,

languages.coptic: Ntek ere~piyumin e~ne m~pouj~vok: n~tek c~houer pie~hoou e~taumack.
languages.english: Then you will wish you had never been born, and you will curse the day of your birth.
languages.arabic: فتود لو لم تولد وتلعن يوم ولادتك.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: H/ppe ic nekjaji auws e~bol: ouoh n/eymoc] m~mok au[ici n~toua~ve:
languages.english: For behold, Your enemies made a noise, and those who hate You raised up their heads.
languages.arabic: هوذا أعداؤك قد صرخوا. وقد رفع مبغضوك رؤوسهم.

languages.coptic: Auco[ni eucop qen ouh/t n~ouwt: aucemni n~oudia~y/k/ qarok: all/louia.
languages.english: For they plotted together in unity; they established a covenant against You. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: تآمروا جميعاً بقلب واحد وتعاهدوا عليك عهداً. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: I/couc oun: ajen coou n~ehoou n~te pipac,a afi~ e~B/yania pima e~nare Lazaroc mmof v/e~tafmou v/eta I/c tounocf e~bolqen n/ymwout:
languages.english: Then, six days before the Passover, Jesus came to Bethany, where Lazarus was who had been dead, whom He had raised from the dead.
languages.arabic: وقبل الفصح بستة أيام أتى يسوع إلى بيت عنيا حيث كان لعازر الذي مات وأقامه من بين الأموات.

languages.coptic: Auer oudipnon oun e~rof mpima e~te mmau ouoh Marya nacsemsi pe: ouoh Lazaroc ne ouai pe e~bol qen n/eyrwteb nemaf:
languages.english: There they made Him a supper; and Martha served, but Lazarus was one of those who sat at the table with Him.
languages.arabic: فصنعوا له هناك عشاء فى ذلك المكان. وكانت مرثا تخدم وكان لعازر أحد المتكئين معه،

languages.coptic: Maria oun ac[i n~oulitra n~cojen n~te ounardoc m~pictik/ e~nasen~couenf: ouoh acywhc n~nen[alauj n~I/couc m~mof:
languages.english: Then Mary took a pound of very costly oil of spikenard, anointed the feet of Jesus, and wiped His feet with her hair.
languages.arabic: أما مريم فأخذت رطل طيب ناردين خالص كثير الثمن ودهنت به قدمى يسوع، ومسحتهما بشعر رأسها

languages.coptic: Ouoh acfotou m~pifwi n~te tecave: a~pi/i de moh e~bolqen pic~yoi m~picojen.
languages.english: And the house was filled with the fragrance of the oil.
languages.arabic: فإمتلأ البيت من رائحة الطيب،

languages.coptic: Peje ouai de e~bolqen nefmay/t/c e~te Ioudac pe Cimwn piickariw~t/c v/e~nafnat/if:
languages.english: But one of His disciples, Judas Iscariot, Simon’s son, who would betray Him, said,
languages.arabic: فقال أحد تلاميذه الذي هو يهوذا سمعان الإسخريوطى الذي كان مزمعاً أن يسلمه:

languages.coptic: Je eybeou paicojen m~pout/ife~bol qa somtse n~cayeri ouoh n~tout/itou n~nih/ki:
languages.english: “Why was this fragrant oil not sold for three hundred denarii and given to the poor?”
languages.arabic: لماذا لم يبع هذا الطيب بثلثمائة دينار ويعطى للمساكين؟

languages.coptic: Vai de afjof ou,oti je acermelin naf qa nih/ki: alla je ne ouref[ioui~ pe: ouoh e~re pig~locokomwn n~totf n/e~sauhitou e~rof ne saftwoun m~mou.
languages.english: This he said, not that he cared for the poor, but because he was a thief, and had the money box; and he used to take what was put in it.
languages.arabic: قال هذا ليس لأنه كان يهتم بالمساكين، بل لأنه كان سارقاً وكان الصندوق عنده وكان يحمل ما يلقى فيه.

languages.coptic: Peje I/c oun je ,ac pe hina n~tecareh e~rof e~pie~hoou m~pakwc: Nih/ki gar ce nemwten n~c/ou niben: a~nok de ]nemwten an n~c/ou niben.
languages.english: But Jesus said, “Let her alone; she has kept this for the day of My burial. For the poor you have with you always, but Me you do not have always.”
languages.arabic: فقال يسوع: "دعوها لأنها حفظته ليوم دفنى فإن المساكين معكم فى كل حين، وأما أنا فلست معكم فى كل حين."

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Sixth Hour of Wednesday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة السادسة، من يوم الأربعاء من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: Christ our Lord came to Bethany six days before Passover. They regaled him at the residence of Mary and Martha her sister.
languages.arabic: جاء المسيح إلهنا إلى بيت عنيا قبل الفصح بستة أيام، فصنعوا له وليمة فى بيت مريم ومرثا أختها،

languages.english: Among those present was Lazarus whom he resurrected from the dead.
languages.arabic: وكان هناك لعازر الذي أقامه من الأموات

languages.english: Martha his sister was serving them, and Lazarus her brother was sitting with him. Mary then brought one pound of an expensive nard and she anointed his feet and wiped them with her hair.
languages.arabic: وكانت مرثا أخت الميت واقفه تخدمهم، وكان إحدى المتكئين مع السيد يسوع لعازر أخوها، فأخذت مريم رطل طيب ناردين كثير الثمن ودهنت به رجلى يسوع ومسحتها بشعر رأسها.

languages.english: Judas Iscariot was filled with evil envy and asked cunningly; his heart full of bitterness, deceit and hypocrisy: "Would it not have been better if this oil would have been sold for 300 Denarii and given to the poor?"
languages.arabic: فامتلئ يهوذا الأسخريوطى المخالف من الحسد الشيطان وقال بمكر وقلب مملوء من كل مرارة وخبث ورياء، قال: لماذا لم يبع هذا الطيب بثلثمائة دينار ويدفع للمساكين؟

languages.english: It was not his love and concern for the poor that prompted him to say this, but because he was a thief and as he had the money box he used to take what was put into it.
languages.arabic: ولم يقل هذا بفكر صالح ومحبة فى المساكين، ولكنه كان سارقاً وكان يسرق ما يلقى فى الصندوق،

languages.english: The Savior responded saying: "Do not trouble the woman for she has done that for my burial. The poor you always have with you, but you do not always have me."
languages.arabic: فقال المخلص: لا تتعبوها لأنها قد حفظته ليوم دفنى، المساكين معكم كل حين وأما أنا فلست معكم كل حين

languages.english: Let us come close to the Lord, run our tears down his feet and ask him for his forgiveness according to his abundant mercy.
languages.arabic: فلنقترب من الرب ولنبك أمامه ونبل قدميه بدموعنا ونساله أن ينعم علينا بالغفران كعظيم رحمته.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pjom n~}genecic n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Genesis of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر التکوين لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Ouoh Abraam ne ouqello pe e~afaiai qen nefe~hoou: ouoh a~P[oic c~mou e~Abraam kata ca n~r/] niben:
languages.english: Now Abraham was old, well advanced in age; and the Lord had blessed Abraham in all things.
languages.arabic: وشاخ إبراهيم وتقدم في الايام وبارك الرب إبراهيم فى كل شئ،

languages.coptic: Ouoh peje Abraam m~pefa~lou pinis] n~te pef/i: p~ar,wn n~te neten~taf t/rou: je ,a tekjij qa paa~loj: n~tatarkok e~P[oic Vnou] n~te tve: nem Vnou] n~te p~kahi:
languages.english: So Abraham said to the oldest servant of his house, who ruled over all that he had, "Put your hand under my thigh, and I will make you swear by the Lord, the God of heaven and the God of the earth,
languages.arabic: فقال إبراهيم لعبده كبير بيته المولى على جميع ماله، ضع يدك تحت فخذى لأستحلفك بالرب إله السماء وإله الأرض،

languages.coptic: Hina n~teks~tem[i c~himi m~pas/ri I~caak e~bolqen niseri n~te ni,ananeoc: n/e~]sop n~q/tou a~nok.
languages.english: That you will not take a wife for my son Isaac from the daughters of the Canaanites, among whom I dwell;
languages.arabic: وﻻ تاخذ زوجه لإبني إسحق من بنات الكنعانيين اللذين أنا ساكن بينهم،

languages.coptic: Alla n~tekse~pakahi: pwa e~taiswpi n~q/tf nem e~qoun e~tavul/: eke~[i n~ouc~himi m~pas/ri I~caak e~bol m~mau:
languages.english: But you shall go to my land where I was born, and to my tribe, and take from there a wife for my son Isaac."
languages.arabic: بل أنطلق إلى ارضى والموضع الذي كنت فيه وإلى عشيرتى وتأخذ زوجة لإبنى اسحق من هناك،

languages.coptic: Peje pia~lou naf: je m/pote n~tecs~temouws n~je ]c~himi e~mosi nem/i hiv~ouei m~paikahi: ,~ouws n~tatacyo m~peks/ri e~pikahi e~taki~ e~bol n~q/tf:
languages.english: And the servant said to him, "Perhaps the woman will not be willing to follow me to this land. Must I then take your son back to the land you came from?"
languages.arabic: فقال العبد له: ربما لا تشاء المرأة أن تأتى معى الى الأرض، أتريد أن أرد إبنك إلى الأرض التى خرجت منها؟

languages.coptic: Peje Abraam naf je mah~y/k e~rok m~pertacyo m~pas/ri e~mau.
languages.english: But Abraham said to him, "Beware that you do not take my son back there.
languages.arabic: فقال له إبراهيم: أحذر من أن ترد إبنى إلى هناك

languages.coptic: P[oic Vnou] n~te t~ve ouoh Vnou] n~te p~kahi: v/e~tafent e~bolqen p~/i m~paiwt: nem e~bolqen p~kahi e~tauj~voi e~bol nq/tf:
languages.english: The Lord, the God of heaven and the God of the earth, who took me from my father's house and from the land where I was born,
languages.arabic: لأن الرب إله السماء وإله الأرض الذي أخذنى من بيت أبى ومن الأرض التى ولدت فيها

languages.coptic: v/e~tafcaji nem/i ouoh afwrk n/i efjw m~moc: je eie~] m~pai kahi nak nem pekjroj:
languages.english: and who spoke to me and swore to me, saying, 'To you and your seed I give this land,'
languages.arabic: الذي كلمنى أقسم لى قائلاً: أنى أعطيك هذه الأرض ولنسلك،

languages.coptic: Nyof efe~taouo m~pefaggeloc qajwk: eke~[i n~ouc~himi m~pas/ri I~caak e~bol m~mau:
languages.english: He will send His Angel before you, and you shall take a wife for my son from there.
languages.arabic: وهو يرسل ملاكه أمامك فتأخذ زوجة لإبنى اسحق من هناك،

languages.coptic: E~swp de n~tecs~temouws n~je ]c~himi e~i~ nemak e~paikahi eke~swpi ektoub/out e~bolha p aa~nas: monon rw n~ywf m~pertacyo m~pas/ri e~mau:
languages.english: And if the woman is not willing to follow you, then you will be released from this oath; only do not take my son back there."
languages.arabic: وإن لم تشاء المرأة أن تأتى معك إلى هذه الأرض فتكون أنت برئ من حلفى، فقط لا ترجع إبنى إلى هناك.

languages.coptic: Ouoh pia~lou af,w n~tefjij qap~aloj n~Abraam pef[oic: afwrk naf eybe pai caji.
languages.english: So the servant put his hand under the thigh of Abraham his lord, and swore to him concerning this matter.
languages.arabic: فوضع العبد يده تحت فخذ إبراهيم سيده وحلف له من أجل هذا الأمر.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Pjwm n~te pia~riymoc n~te Mwu~c/c pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Book of Numbers of Moses the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من سفر العدد لموسى النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Ouoh aui~ n~je nens/ri m~pIcra/l ]cunagwg/ t/rc e~h~r/i e~p~twou n~Cina qen pia~bot n~houit: ouoh afswpi n~je pilaoc qen Kad/c: ouoh acmou m~mau n~je Mariam:
languages.english: Now the children of Israel, the whole congregation, came into the Desert of Sin in the first month, and the people stayed in Kadesh; and Miriam died and was buried there.
languages.arabic: وجاء بنو اسرائيل الجماعة كلها إلى جبل سيناء فى الشهر الأول وأقام الشعب بقادش، وماتت مريم ثم دفنت هناك

languages.coptic: ouoh auyomc m~mau: ne m~mon mwou pe qen ]cunagwg/: ouoh auywou] e~jen Mwu~c/c nem Aa~rwn:
languages.english: But there was no water for the congregation; so they gathered together against Moses and Aaron.
languages.arabic: ولم يكن ماء للجماعة، فاجتمعوا على موسى وهرون

languages.coptic: Ouoh nare pilaoc hwous e~Mwu~c/c efjwm~moc: je a~moi e~neanmou pe qen p~tako n~nenc~n/ou m~pemyo m~P[oic.
languages.english: So the people scoffed at Moses and spoke, saying, "Would we had died in the destruction of our brethren before the Lord.
languages.arabic: وخاصم الشعب موسى قائلين: ليتنا متنا موت أخوتنا أمام الرب،

languages.coptic: Ouoh eybeou a~reten i~ni n~]cunagwg/ n~te P[oic e~paisafe: e~qoyben nem nentebnwoui~: eybeou eta~reten i~ e~bolqen pkahi n~,/mi e~paima ethwou:
languages.english: Why have you brought up the Lord's congregation into this desert to kill us and our cattle? Why did you also bring us up out of Egypt, to bring us to this evil place?—
languages.arabic: لماذا جئتما بجماعة الرب إلى هذه البرية لتقتلانا نحن ومواشينا؟ ولماذا أخرجتمانا من أرض مصر إلى هذا الموضع الرديء؟

languages.coptic: Pima e~te m~pauci] m~mof: oude m~mon kente n~q/tf: oude ke aloli: oude erman: oude m~mon mwou e~cw:
languages.english: A place where nothing is sown, neither figs nor vines nor pomegranates; nor is there any water to drink."
languages.arabic: موضع لازرع فيه و لا تين و لا عنب ولا رمان وليس فيه ماء للشرب.

languages.coptic: Ouoh afi~ n~je Mwu~c/c nem[oic Aa~rwn e~bolha p~ho n~]cunagwg/ hiren v~ro n~]c~kun/ n~te ]metmeyre: ouoh auhitou e~jen pouho: ouoh p~w~ou m~P[oic afouonhf e~h~r/i e~jwou.
languages.english: So Moses and Aaron went from the presence of the congregation to the door of the tabernacle of testimony and fell on their faces. Then the glory of the Lord appeared to them.
languages.arabic: فجاء موسى وهرون من أمام الجماعة إلى باب قبة الشهادة وسقطا على وجههما فتجلى لهما مجد الرب،

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~ P[oic caji nem Mwu~c/c nem A~a~rwn efjw m~moc: Je [i m~pis~bwt: ouoh ywou] n~]cunagwg/ t/rc n~yok nem A~a~rwn pekcon:
languages.english: The Lord then spoke to Moses, saying, "Take the rod; and you and your brother Aaron gather the congregation together.
languages.arabic: وكلم الرب موسى وهرون قائلاً: خذ العصا وإجمع الجماعة كلها أنت وهرون أخوك،

languages.coptic: Ouoh caji nem ]petra mpoum~yo: ouoh ece~] n~necmwou: ouoh e~retenen mwou nwou e~bolqen ]petra: ouoh e~retent~co n~]cunagwg/ nem noutebnwoui~:
languages.english: Speak to the rock before them, and it will give its waters; thus you shall bring them water out of the rock, and give drink to the congregation and their cattle."
languages.arabic: كلما الصخرة قدامهم فتعطى مياهها فتخرجا لهم ماء من الصخرة، وتسقيا الجماعة ومواشيهم

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~Mwu~c/c [i mpis~bwt v/et,/ mp~emyo m~P[oic kata v~r/] e~ta P[oic oucahni.
languages.english: So Moses took the rod from before the Lord as the Lord ordered him.
languages.arabic: فأخذ موسى العصا من أمام الرب كما أمره الرب

languages.coptic: Ouoh Mwu~c/c nem Aa~rwn auywou] n~]cunagwg/ m~pem~yo n~]petra pejafnwou: je cwtem e~roi niatcwtem: m/ti tennaini n~oumwou nwten e~bolqen taipetra:
languages.english: Then Moses and Aaron gathered the congregation together before the rock; and he said to them, "Hear me, you disobedient ones. Must we bring water for you out of this rock?"
languages.arabic: وجمع موسى وهرون الجماعة أمام الصخرة وقال لهم: أسمعوا أيها المتمردون، أنخرج لكم من هذه الصخرة ماء.

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~Mwu~c/c twoun n~tefjij e~p~swi: afmes ]petra qen pis~bwt n~copc~nau ouoh afi~ e~bol n~je ounis] m~mwou: ouoh accw n~je ]cunagwg/ nem noutebnwoui
languages.english: Moses then lifted his hand and struck the rock twice with his rod; and water came out abundantly, and the congregation and the cattle drank.
languages.arabic: ورفع موسى يده وضرب الصخرة بالعصا مرتين، فخرج ماء غزير فشرب منه الجماعة ومواشيهم ،

languages.coptic: Ouoh peje P[oic m~Mwu~c/c nem Aa~rwn: je eybeou m~petennah] e~touboi m~pem~yo n~nens/ri m~Pic~ra/l: eybe vai n~netenw~li n~tai cunagwg/ e~qoun e~pikahi v/e~ tai t/if nwou.
languages.english: But the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, "Because you did not believe Me, to sanctify Me before the children of Israel, therefore you shall not bring this congregation into the land I am giving them."
languages.arabic: فقال الرب لموسى وهرون: لأجل أنكما لم تؤمنا لتقدسانى أمام أعين بنى اسرائيل، لذلك لا تدخلان هذه الجماعة إلى الأرض التى أعطيتهم إياها،

languages.coptic: Vai pe pimwou n~te ]antilogia~: je auhwous n~je nens/ri m~Pic~ra/l m~pem~yo m~P[oic: aftoubo n~q~r/i n~q/tou.
languages.english: This was the Water of Contention, because the children of Israel scoffed before the Lord, and He was sanctified among them.
languages.arabic: هذا هو ماء الخصومة، حيث إختصم بنو اسرائيل أمام الرب فتقدس فيهم.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen niparoimia~ n~te Colomwn pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Proverbs of Solomon the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من أمثال سليمان النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Pas/ri m~peny~rou cormek n~je hanrwmi n~aceb/c: oude m~perraouw~ Eswp ausan]ho e~rok eujw m~moc:
languages.english: My son, do not let the ungodly lead you astray, and do not consent if they invite you, saying.
languages.arabic: يا إبنى لا يضلك الرجال المنافقون، ولا تجبهم إذا دعوك قائلين:

languages.coptic: je amou a~ris~v/r neman e~ouc~nof: ouoh n~ten,wp qen p~kahi n~ourwmi n~ym/i qen oumetoji:
languages.english: "Come with us; take part in bloodshed, and let us hide a righteous man in the earth unjustly;
languages.arabic: هلم شاركنا فى الدم لنختف فى الأرض، للرجل البار ظلماً،

languages.coptic: Maren omkf de efwnq m~v~r/] n~a~men]: ouoh n~tenw~li m~pefmeui~ e~bolhijen p~kahi.
languages.english: and let us swallow him, just as Hades does the living, and let us take away his remembrance from the earth;
languages.arabic: فلنبتلعه حيا كالجحيم ونبيد ذكره من الأرض

languages.coptic: Tefk~t/cic eynasen~couenc: marentahoc: marenmah nen/i de n~swl: Pw k~l/roc hitf n~q/ten: ouacoui~ de marenjvoc nan t/ren eucop: ouoh oua~coui~ nouwt marecswpi nan:
languages.english: Let us seize his valuable property, and let us fill our houses with spoils; cast your lot with us and let us acquire a common bag; let there be one purse for us."
languages.arabic: فنظفر بقنيته الثمينة، ونملأ بيوتنا غنيمة ونصيبه يقع لنا كيس فلنقتنيه لنا جميعاً كيس واحد، ليكن لنا.

languages.coptic: Mpermosi hiv~mwit nemwou: riki n~tek[a~loj e~bolha noumwit.
languages.english: Do not walk in the way with them; but turn away your foot from their paths.
languages.arabic: لا تمش فى الطريق معهم، امنع رجلك عن طريقهم.

languages.coptic: Auvwrs gar n~nous~n/ou e~jen nihala] qen oumetoji:
languages.english: For nets are not spread before birds for no reason,
languages.arabic: لأنهم نصبوا شباكهم للطيور بمكر

languages.coptic: N~ywou gar n/etoi n~s~v/r e~hanqwteb: cehioui~ nwou e~qoun e~hanpethwou: v~ouwjp de n~te nirwmi n~a~nomoc f~hwou:
languages.english: for those who participate in murder store up evils for themselves; and evil is the destruction of lawless men.
languages.arabic: وشاركوا القتلة فيدخرون لأنفسهم الشرور وسقوط الآثمة ردئ،

languages.coptic: Nai ne nimwit n~ouon niben etjwk n~nia~nomia~ e~bol n~q~r/i qen oumeta~ceb/c cenaw~li n~nou'u,/. }covia~de cehwc e~roc hi nimwit e~bol qen nip~latia~ c~sop qen ouparr/cia~:
languages.english: These are the ways of all who accomplish lawless things, for they take away their own soul in ungodliness. Wisdom sings in the streets; she moves boldly in the squares.
languages.arabic: هذه طرق كل من تناهى الإثم، بالنفاق تنزع نفوسهم. الحكمة تمدح فى الطرقات وفى الشوارع ظاهرة.

languages.coptic: N~q~r/i de qen nilakh n~te nicebyaiou cehiwis m~moc:
languages.english: She preaches on high city walls and sits at the gates of lords.
languages.arabic: وعلى زوايا الأسوار يبشر فيها،

languages.coptic: Ack/n de qen nipul/ n~te nijwri nem nipul/ n~te nibaki ecjw m~moc e~re pech/t jor n~c/ou niben.
languages.english: At the gates of a city she boldly says, "So long a time as the simple hold fast to righteousness, they shall not be ashamed.
languages.arabic: على أبواب الأقوياء وأبواب المدن. قد قالت بقلب قوى فى كل حين، ان عديمى الشر يتمسكون بالبر فلن يخزوا،

languages.coptic: E~re niatpethwou a~moni n~]meym/i n~nou[isipi: niath/tde euoi n~refere~piyumin e~p~sws: e~tauera~ceb/c aumecte pika]:
languages.english: But those without discernment, since they are desirous of arrogance,
languages.arabic: أيها الجهال المشتهون العار الذين نافقوا

languages.coptic: Ouoh auswpi eurab/out qen hancohi: h/ppe ]na,w qaten y/nou n~oucaji n~te panifi: ]nat~cabwten e~pacaji:
languages.english: And are become ungodly, they hate perception, and are become subject to reproofs.
languages.arabic: وأبغضوا الفهم وصاروا عرضة للتوبيخ،

languages.coptic: E~pid/ aimou] ouoh m~petencwtem: aivwrs n~najij e~bol nareten]hy/ten an pe alla nareteni~ri n~naco[ni:
languages.english: Behold, I shall bring forth upon you the utterance of my breath, and I shall teach you my word.
languages.arabic: هوذا أضع أمامكم كلاما من روحى وأعلمكم كلامى،

languages.coptic: hwc n~cetajr/out an: nacohi de nareten ]h~y/ten e~rwou an Eybe vai a~nok hw ]nacwbi e~h~r/i e~jen petena~gw: ]narasi de e~swp afsani~ e~jeny/nou n~je oufw] e~bol nem e~swp afsani~ e~jeny/nou n~je ous~yorter n~ouho] qen ouho]:
languages.english: Since I called, but you did not obey, and spoke at length, but you paid no attention, but made my counsels invalid, and were not persuaded by my reproofs; consequently, I will laugh at your annihilation, and will exult when ruin comes to you.
languages.arabic: قد دعوت فلم تسمعوا وبسطت يدي فلم تلتفتوا، بل جعلتم مشورتى كأنها ليست ثابتة وتوبيخى لم تصغوا إليه،

languages.coptic: Ouoh n~tefi~ n~je piouwjp m~v~r/] n~oucaray/ou: ouoh afsani~ e~jeny/nu n~je pfw] e~bol ouoh e~swp a~fsani~ e~jwten n~je ouhoj hej nem outako.
languages.english: And when confusion reaches you unawares and overthrow comes like a whirlwind, and when tribulation and anguish come to you, and when destruction comes to you.
languages.arabic: من أجل هذا أيضاً أضحك على هلاكهم وأفراح إذا لحقكم الفناء وفاجاًكم الذعر ويأتى الخراب كالعاصفة،

languages.coptic: Ece~swpi gar a~reten san]hoe~roi: a~nok de n~nacwtem e~rwten: eue~kw] n~cwi n~je han campethwou: ouoh n~noujemt.
languages.english: For it shall be, when you shall call upon me, I will not listen to you; evil men will seek me, but not find me,
languages.arabic: إذا جاء عليكم الاستئصال فى طلبى فلا يجدونني,

languages.coptic: Aumecte ]covia~ gar ouoh ]ho] n~te P[oic m~poucotpc nwou: oude nauouws an pe e~]h~y/ou e~naco[ni: euelk sai n~ca nacaji.
languages.english: For they hate wisdom, and choose not the fear of the Lord. Neither do they wish to follow my counsels, but despise my reproofs.
languages.arabic: بما أنهم أبغضوا الحكمة ولم يختاروا مخافة الرب ولم يريدوا أن يتأملوا مشورتى مستهزئين بكلامى،

languages.coptic: Eybe vai oun eue~ouwm n~nioutah n~te poumwit: ouoh eue~ci n~toumeta~ceb/c: e~v~ma gar je au[i n~nia~lwoui~ n~jonc: ouoh auqoybou:
languages.english: Therefore, they shall eat the fruits of their own way and be filled with their own ungodliness.
languages.arabic: فلذلك يأكلون من ثمر طرقهم ومن نفاقهم يشبعون

languages.coptic: Oujem s~ini efe~tako n~nia~ceb/c: v/eynacwtem n~cwi efe~swpi qen ouhelpic: ouoh efe~emton m~mof qen oumetatho] e~bolha pethwou niben.
languages.english: For since they wrong the simple, they shall be killed, and a close examination shall destroy the ungodly.
languages.arabic: حيث أنهم ظلموا الصبيان وقتلوهم، أفتقد المنافقين بالهلاك

languages.coptic: v/eynacwtem n~cwi efe~swpi qen ouhelpic: ouoh efe~emton m~mof qen oumetatho] e~bolha pethwou niben.
languages.english: But he who obeys me shall dwell in hope, and shall be at rest without fear from every evil."
languages.arabic: والذي يطيعنى يسكن على الرجاء ويستريح بلا خوف من كل شر.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Najaji aujw n~han pethwou n/i: auco[ni qaroi n~hanpethwou.
languages.english: My enemies speak evil things against me. Against me they devise evils for me.
languages.arabic: أعدائى تقاولوا على شراً وتشاوروا بالسوء.

languages.coptic: Nafn/ou e~qoun pe e~nau nafcaji n~oumet e~v~l/ou: ouoh pefh/t afywou] naf n~oua~nomia: all/louia.
languages.english: And if he comes to see us, he speaks in vain; his heart gathered lawlessness to itself. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: كان يدخل لينظر فكان يتكلم باطلاً وقلبه جمع له إثماً. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Matyeon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Matthew. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار متى البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Tote auywou] n~je niar,/e~reuc nem nip~recbuteroc n~te pilaoc e~qoun e~]aul/ n~te piar,/e~reuc v/e~saumou] e~rof je Kaiava
languages.english: Then the chief priests, the scribes, and the elders of the people assembled at the palace of the high priest, who was called Caiaphas,
languages.arabic: حينئذ اجتمع رؤساء الكهنة وشيوخ الشعب فى دار رئيس الكهنة الذي يدعى قيافا

languages.coptic: Ouoh auerouco[ni hina ncea~moni n~I/couc qen ou,rof ouoh nceqoybef:
languages.english: And plotted to take Jesus by trickery and kill Him.
languages.arabic: وتشاوروا لكى يمسكوا يسوع بمكر ويقتلوه.

languages.coptic: Naujwm~moc de pe je m~peny~renaic qen psai je n~ne ous~yorter swpi qen pilaoc. I/couc de ef,/ qen
languages.english: But they said, “Not during the feast, lest there be an uproar among the people.”
languages.arabic: وكانوا يقولون: لا نفعل هذا فى العيد لئلا يحدث شغب فى الشعب.

languages.coptic: B/ya~nia qen p~/i n~Cimwn pikakceht: Aci~ harof n~je ouc~himi e~re ouon oumoki n~cojen n~totc e~nasen~couenf ouoh acjosf e~h~r/i e~jen tefa~ve efrwteb:
languages.english: And when Jesus was in Bethany at the house of Simon the leper, a woman came to Him having an alabaster flask of very costly fragrant oil, and she poured it on His head as He sat at the table.
languages.arabic: وفيما كان يسوع فى بيت عنيا فى بيت سمعان الأبرص، جاءت إمرأة ومعها قارورة طيب كثير الثمن وسكبته على رأسه وهو متكئ.

languages.coptic: E~taunau de n~je nimay/t/c au,~remrem eujwm~moc je paitako ou pe.
languages.english: But when His disciples saw it, they were indignant, saying,
languages.arabic: فلما رأى التلاميذ ذلك تذمروا قائلين:

languages.coptic: Ne ouon s~jom gar pe e~] m~vai e~bol qa oum/s ouoh e~t/itou n~nih/ki:
languages.english: “Why this waste? For this fragrant oil might have been sold for much and given to the poor.”
languages.arabic: لماذا هذا الأتلاف، لأنه قد كان يمكن أن يباع هذا بكثير ويعطى للمساكين،

languages.coptic: E~tafe~mi de n~je I/couc pejaf nwou: je eybeou tetenouah qici e~]c~himi: ouhwb gar e~nanef petacaif e~roi:
languages.english: But when Jesus was aware of it, He said to them, “Why do you trouble the woman? For she has done a good work for Me.
languages.arabic: فعلم يسوع وقال لهم: لماذا تتعبون المرأة فإنها قد عملت بى عملاً حسناً،

languages.coptic: Nih/ki gar cenemwten n~c/ou niben a~nok de ]nemwten an n~c/ou niben.
languages.english: For you have the poor with you always, but Me you do not have always.
languages.arabic: لأن المساكين معكم كل حين و أما أنا فلست معكم كل حين،

languages.coptic: Achioui~ gar n~je yai m~pai cojen e~jen pacwma e~p~jinkoct:
languages.english: For in pouring this fragrant oil on My body, she did it for My burial.
languages.arabic: وهذه إنما سكبت هذا الطيب على جسدى لدفنى.

languages.coptic: Am/n ]jw m~moc nwten: je v~ma e~tounahiwis m~pai euaggelion m~mof qen pikocmoc t/rf eue~caji hwf m~v/e~ta tai c~himi aif eumeui~ nac:
languages.english: Assuredly, I say to you, wherever this gospel is preached in the whole world, what this woman has done will also be told as a memorial to her. ”
languages.arabic: الحق أقول لكم أنه حيثما يكرز بهذا الإنجيل فى كل العالم يخبر أيضاً بما عملته هذه المرأة تذكاراً لها.

languages.coptic: Tote afsenaf n~je ouai e~bolqen pim/t c~nau v/e~sau mou] e~rof je Ioudac piickariw~t/c ha niar,/ e~reuc.
languages.english: Then one of the twelve, called Judas Iscariot, went to the chief priests and said,
languages.arabic: حينئذ ذهب واحد من الأثنى عشر الذي يدعى يهوذا الإسخريوطى إلى رؤساء الكهنة، وقال لهم:

languages.coptic: Pejaf nwou je ou pe e~tetennat/if n/i ouoh a~nok hw n~ta t/if e~teny/nou n~ywoude aucemn/tc nemaf e~] naf m~map n~hat:
languages.english: “What are you willing to give me if I deliver Him to you?” And they counted out to him thirty pieces of silver.
languages.arabic: ماذا تعطونى وأنا أسلمه إليكم. أما هم فتعاهدوا معه أن يعطوه ثلاثين من الفضة،

languages.coptic: Ouoh icjen pic/ou e~te m~mau nafkw] pe n~ca oueukeria~ hina n~teft/if nwou.
languages.english: So from that time he sought opportunity to betray Him.
languages.arabic: ومن ذلك الوقت كان يطلب فرصة ليسلمه إليهم.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Ninth Hour of Wednesday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة التاسعة، من يوم الأربعاء من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: The mystery of your incarnation you have concealed in our body, O Christ our God. For Abraham the great patriarch the father of all nations fathomed in great faith that God the Word shall be incarnated from his seed. When he saw that his days on earth were decreasing and that God had blessed him, he summoned his honest and loyal head servant and said to him:
languages.arabic: سر تأنسك أخفيته مع جسدنا أيها المسيح إلهنا. من زرع إبراهيم الأب العظيم أب جميع الشعوب، الذي لما علم بإيمان أن الإله الكلمة لابد أن يتجسد من نسله، وبالأكثر عندما رأى أيامه نقصت وأن الله بارك فى أعماله، فدعى عبده الكبير فى بيته الوكيل الأمين وخاطبه قائلا:

languages.english: Put your hand under my thigh because I will ask you to swear by the Lord of heavens that you will not betroth for my Isaac a wife from this land which I dwell, But go to the land of my fathers and take for him a wife from there, from my tribe and from my fathers race. Take the matter very seriously.
languages.arabic: ضع يدك على صلبى لأحلفك بإله السماء أنك لا تأخذ إمراة لإبنى اسحق من هذه الأرض التى أنا أسكنها، بل أمضى إلى أرض آبائى وخذ له امرأة من ذلك المكان من قبيلتى من جنس أبائى خذ له العربون بغير تهاون.

languages.english: "The servant asked prudently: Master what if the woman refused to come with me to this land? Would you rather see me come back with your son Isaac and serve him until I can bring her back?
languages.arabic: فأجابه العبد بعقل هكذا قائلاً: أسمع يا سيدي أن أبت المرأة أن تأتى معى إلى هذه الأرض أفتريد أن أرد إبنك إسحق وآخذه معى إلى أن آتى به إلى ههنا؟

languages.english: Abraham said: Be careful not to do that. if she does not come with you then you are innocent. The servant put his hand (under his master's thigh) and swore to him to keep his promise.
languages.arabic: فقال له: أحذر أن ترد إبنى، فأن لم تجئ فأنت برئ. فوضع العبد يده وحلف له على ثبآتٍ هذا القول.

languages.english: At the fullness of time God fulfilled this covenant that he pledged to our father Abraham; and Christ by whom all nations are blessed came from his descendants.
languages.arabic: وفى آخر الزمان أكمل الله هذا الوعد الذي وعد به أبانا إبراهيم وظهر المسيح من صلبه الذي تتبارك به سائر الأمم.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen }covia~ n~te Colomon pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from the Wisdom of Solomon the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من حكمة سليمان النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: }covia~ gar c~kim e~qoun e~n/etkim t/rou: c~voh ouoh c~n/ou e~bolhiten pt/rf eybe pectoubo: ousah gar te n~te t~jom m~Vnou]:
languages.english: For wisdom moves from one place to another more easily than motion itself, And because of her purity, she penetrates all things.
languages.arabic: إن الحكمة تتحرك في كل متحرك فهي تبلغ وتأتي علي الكل من أجل طهارتها،

languages.coptic: Ouoh ouqa] e~bol qen piw~ou eyouab n~te pipantokratwr: eybe vai m~mon h~li ef[a~qem s~qwnt e~roc: ououwini gar te n~te piouwini n~e~neh: ouoh ouial e~couab te n~te nih~b/oui~ n~te Vnou]: ouoh t~hukwn n~tefmeta~gayoc te:
languages.english: So she is the exhalation of the power of God and emanation of the pure glory of the Almighty; Therefore nothing defiled enters her. For she is the radiance of eternal light, A spotless mirror of the power of God and the image of His goodness.
languages.arabic: فإنها لهب قوة الله, وفيض من المجد المقدس الذي لضابط الكل, فلذلك لا يقدر أن يقربها شئ دنس لأنها ضياء النور الأزلي, ومرآة أعمال الله النقية وصورة صلاحه

languages.coptic: Oui~ te ecjemjom e~hwb niben: ouoh c~,/ qariqaroc: eoi~ri m~p~t/rf m~beri: ouoh kata genea~ ecse e~qoun e~han.u,/ eyu eci~ri m~mwou n~s~v/r m~Vnou] ouoh m~p~rov/t/c:
languages.english: Though she is one, she can do all things; so while remaining in herself, she renews all things; and in every generation, she passes into holy souls and makes them friends of God and prophets.
languages.arabic: تقدر علي كل شئ وهي واحدة وتجدد كل شئ, وهي ثابتة في ذاتها وفي كل جيل تحل في النفوس الطاهرة وتجعلهم شركاء الله وتصيرهم أنبياء

languages.coptic: Vnou] gar mei n~hli an e~b/l e~v/etsop qen ]covia~:
languages.english: Thus God loves nothing as much as the one who lives with wisdom.
languages.arabic: لأن الله لا يحب أحداً إلا من يساكن الحكمة.

languages.coptic: Yai gar oucaie te e~hote pir/ nem ehote pcemni n~niciou t/rou:
languages.english: For wisdom is more beautiful than the sun and more than every constellation of stars.
languages.arabic: لأنها أبهي من الشمس، وأسمي من كل مركز النجوم،

languages.coptic: Ausantenywnc e~v~ouwini enaersorp e~rcf: vai men gar sare pie~jwrh i~e~pefma: ]covia~ de m~pare ,aki s~jemjom eroc.
languages.english: Compared with light she is found to be superior, for the light is followed by night, but evil cannot overcome wisdom.
languages.arabic: وإذا قيست بالنور تقدمت عليه، لأن النور يعقبه الليل، وأما الحكمة فلا يقوى عليها الظلام.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Nai n/i Vnou] ouoh nain/i: Je ac,ahy/c e~rok n~je ta'u,/:
languages.english: Have mercy on me, O God, have mercy on me, for my soul trusts in You;
languages.arabic: ارحمني يا الله ارحمني فانه عليك توكلت نفسي

languages.coptic: }naer helpic qa t~q/ibi n~tenektenh: sa teccini n~je ]a~nomia: all/louia.
languages.english: And in the shadow of Your wings I will hope, until lawlessness shall pass away. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: وبظل جناحيك أتكل الى ان يعبر الإثم. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Iwann/n a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint John. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار يوحنا البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Nafqent de pe n~je pipac,a n~te niIoudai: ouoh aui~ n~jeoum/s e~h~r/i e~Ieroucal/m e~bolqen ],wra qajen pipac,a hina n~toutoubwou:
languages.english: And the Passover of the Jews was near, and many went from the country up to Jerusalem before the Passover, to purify themselves.
languages.arabic: وكان قد اقترب فصح اليهود فصعد كثيرون من الكورة إلى أورشليم قبل الفصح ليتطهروا

languages.coptic: Naukw] oun pe n~ca I/couc n~je ni Ioudai eujw m~moc n~nouer/ou euohi eratou qen piervei: je ou petetenmeui~ e~rof je fnai an e~p~sai.
languages.english: Then they sought Jesus, and spoke among themselves as they stood in the temple, “What do you think—that He will not come to the feast?”
languages.arabic: وكان اليهود يطلبون يسوع ويقولون فيما بينهم وهم قائمون في الهيكل ماذا تظنون ألعله لا يأتي إلي العيد؟

languages.coptic: Ne au] entol/ de n~je niar,/e~reuc nem nivariceoc hina aresan ouai e~mi je afywn n~teftamwou e~rof hina n~cetahof.
languages.english: Now both the chief priests and the Pharisees had given a command, that if anyone knew where He was, he should report it, that they might seize Him.
languages.arabic: وكان رؤساء الكهنة والفريسيون قد اصدروا أمرا انه ان عرف أحد أين هو فليدل عليه ليمسكوه.

languages.coptic: Ouwst m~pieuaggelion eyouab.
languages.english: Bow down before the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: إسجدوا للإنجيل المقدس.

languages.english: The exposition of the Eleventh Hour of the eve of Wednesday of Holy Pascha. May its blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: طرح الساعة الحادية عشر، من ليلة الأربعاء من البصخة المقدسة بركته علينا. آمين.

languages.english: It was the tradition of the Jews, that as it became near the days of the Passover, the multitudes go up the mountain from the hamlets to Jerusalem to purge themselves.
languages.arabic: جرت العادة لسائر اليهود إنه إذا اقترب عيد الفصح تصعد جموع كثيرة من الكور الى أورشليم ليتطهروا

languages.english: When they ascended the mountain as usual they did not see Jesus go up. They said one to the other that maybe He will not come to the feast.
languages.arabic: فلما صعدوا كالعادة لم ينظروا يسوع يصعد فقالوا لبعضهم وهم في الهيكل: ألعله حقاً لا يأتي الى العيد؟

languages.english: The hypocrites were conniving their vicious plots because the high priests, the Pharisees, and the Elders had asked the people to lead them to His location, if it were known, in order to arrest Him.
languages.arabic: وكان المنافقون يفتكرون أفكارا مملوءة من الخبث والرياء لان رؤساء الكهنة والفريسيين والشيوخ كانوا قد أوصوا انه ان علم أحد أين هو فليدلهم عليه ليمسكوه

languages.english: O what foolishness and stupidity of these evil people who wanted to bait the Omnipotent, the source of all power. Because of their opposition, He will chain them and assign them to Hell, the place of suffering.
languages.arabic: يا لهذا الجهل وهذه البلادة وعدم المعرفة التى لهؤلاء الأنجاس فانهم وضعوا فخا لصاحب القوة الشديدة الكلى القدرة لانهم مخالفون فسيربطهم هو بسلاسل ويسوقهم الى الجحيم وموضع العذاب.

languages.coptic: Ebolqen Iezeki/l pip~rov/t/c: e~repefc~mou eyouab swpi neman a~m/n efjw m~moc:
languages.english: A reading from Ezekiel the prophet. May his holy blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: من حزقيال النبي بركته المقدسة تکون معنا. آمين.

languages.coptic: Ouoh a~oucaji n~te P[oic swpi haroi efjw m~moc:
languages.english: Again the word of the Lord came to me, saying,
languages.arabic: وكانت إلي كلمة الرب قائلاً:

languages.coptic: Je p~s/ri m~v~rwmi: h/ppe auswpi n/i n~je p~/i m~pI~c#l# eumoujt t/rou n~ouhomt nem ouy~ran nem oubenipi nem outath efmoujt nem ouhat:
languages.english: "Son of man, behold, the house of Israel is mixed before Me—they are altogether mixed—the house is mixed together in the midst of the silver, with bronze, iron, tin, and lead.
languages.arabic: يا إبن الإنسان هوذا قد صار لدي بيت اسرائيل جميعهم خليطاً نحاساً وقصديراً وحديداً ورصاصاً مخلوطاً مع الفضة

languages.coptic: Eybe vai a~joc je nai ne n/e~tefjw m~mwou n~je P[oic: je e~vma je a~reten swpi t/rou euywt n~ouwt: eybe vai a~nok ]nasepy/nou e~roi qen Ieroucal/m.
languages.english: Therefore thus says the Lord: 'Because all of you are one mixture, therefore, I will gather you into the midst of Jerusalem,
languages.arabic: لأجل ذلك قل هذا ما يقوله الرب: بما أنكم جميعاً قد صرتم إمتزاجاً واحداً فلاجل هذا ها أنا أخذكم في أورشليم

languages.coptic: Kata v~r/] e~taisep pihat nem pihomt nem pibenipi nem pitath nem piy~ran qen y~m/] nouh~rw: eyrefnifi n~ewou n~je ou,~rwm e~p~jin ouotheu e~bol: pair/] on ]nasepy/nou eroi qen pam~bon:
languages.english: As men gather silver, bronze, iron, tin, and lead into the midst of a furnace, to blow fire on it, to cast it like metal into a mold.
languages.arabic: كما أخذ الفضة والنحاس والحديد والرصاص والقصدير في وسط الآتون, لنفخ النار عليها لسبكها،

languages.coptic: Ouoh ]nayouet y/nou ouoh ]naoueth y/nou e~bol ouoh ]nanifi n~cay/nou qen ou,rwm n~te pajwnt. Ouoh ]naoueth y/nou e~bolqen tecm/].
languages.english: Thus I shall gather you in My wrath, and bring you together and cast you. I shall blow on you with the fire of My wrath and cast you in her midst.
languages.arabic: وهكذا أخذكم إلي برجزي وأجمعكم وأذيبكم وأنفخ عليكم بنار غضبي وأسبككم في وسطها،

languages.coptic: Mv~r/] e~wauouwth n~hat e~bolqen y~m/] n~ouh~rw: pair/] cenaouethy/nou e~bolqen tecm/]: ouoh tetennae~mi je a~nok pe P[oic ouoh aivwn m~pajwnt hijen y/nou.
languages.english: As silver is cast into a mold in the midst of a furnace, so shall you be cast in her midst. Then you shall know that I, the Lord, have poured out My anger upon you.'"
languages.arabic: كما تسبك الفضة في وسط الآتون كذلك تسبكون في وسطه فتعلمون أني هو الرب صببت غضبي عليكم.

languages.coptic: Ouw~ou n~]t~riac eyouab Pennou] sa e~neh nem sa e~neh n~te nie~neh t/rou: a~m/n.
languages.english: Glory be to the Holy Trinity, our God, forever and unto the ages of all ages. Amen.
languages.arabic: مجداً للثالوث القدوس إلهنا الى أبد الآبدين كلها آمين.

languages.coptic: "almoc tw Dauid.
languages.english: A Psalm of David.
languages.arabic: من مزامير داود النبي.

languages.coptic: Akswpi n/i n~ourefsopt e~rof: nem oumam~vwt qen p~e~hoou m~pahojhej.
languages.english: For You are my protector, and my refuge in the day of my affliction.
languages.arabic: صرت ناصري وملجأي في يوم شدتي.

languages.coptic: N~yok pe pabo/~yoc ainaer'alin e~rok panou]: je n~yok pe parefsopt e~rof panou] panai: all/louia.
languages.english: You are my helper; I will sing to You; for You, O God, are my protector; You are my mercy, O my God. Alleluia.
languages.arabic: أنت معيني، لك أرتل يا إلهي، لأنك أنت ناصري إلهي، ورحمتي. الليلويا.

languages.coptic: Ke u~pertou kata xiwy/ne /~mac: t/c akro a~cewc tou a~giou euaggeliou: kurion ke ton Yeon /~mwn: i~keteucwmen covia~ oryi a~koucwmen tou a~giou euaggeliou.
languages.english: We beseech our Lord and God, that we may be worthy to hear the Holy Gospel. In wisdom and uprightness let us attend to the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: من أجل أن نكون مستحقين لسماع الإنجيل المقدس. إلي ربنا وإلهنا نتوسل بحكمة مستقيمين انصتوا للانجيل المقدس.

languages.english: O God have mercy and compassion upon us, and make us worthy to hear the Holy Gospel.
languages.arabic: اللهم تراءف علينا وارحمنا و اجعلنا مستحقين لسماع انجيلك المقدس.

languages.coptic: Oua~nagnwcic e~bolqen pieuaggelion eyouab kata Matyeon a~giou.
languages.english: A reading according to Saint Matthew. May his blessings be with us. Amen.
languages.arabic: فصل من بشارة الإنجيل لمعلمنا مار متى البشير بركاته علينا آمين.

languages.coptic: Doxa ci Kurie.
languages.english: Glory be to God forever.
languages.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

languages.english: Note that the correct translation is "Glory to You O Lord"

languages.coptic: Ouoh afe~rouw nwou on n~je I/couc qen hanparabol/ efjw m~moc:
languages.english: And Jesus answered and spoke to them again by parables and said:
languages.arabic: ثم أجابهم يسوع بأمثال قائلاً:

languages.coptic: Je c~oni n~je ]metouro n~te niv/oui: n~ourwmi n~ouro e~afi~ri n~ouhop e~pefs/ri:
languages.english: “The kingdom of heaven is like a certain king who arranged a marriage for his son,
languages.arabic: يشبه ملكوت السموات إنساناً ملكاً صنع عرساً لإبنه

languages.coptic: Ouoh afouwrp n~nefe~biaik e~mou] e~n/etyahem e~qoun e~pihop ouoh m~pououws e~i~.
languages.english: And sent out his servants to call those who were invited to the wedding; and they were not willing to come.
languages.arabic: فأرسل عبيده ليدعوا المدعوين إلي العرس، فلم يريدون أن يأتوا،

languages.coptic: Palin on afouwrp n~hankee~biaik efjwm~moc: je a~joc n~n/etyahem je ic paa~ricton aicebtwtf: namaci nem n/etsaneus cesat ouoh cecebtwt t/rou: a~mwini e~qoun e~pihop:
languages.english: Again, he sent out other servants, saying, ‘Tell those who are invited, “See, I have prepared my dinner; my oxen and fatted cattle are killed, and all things are ready. Come to the wedding.’”
languages.arabic: فأرسل أيضاً عبيداً آخرين قائلاً: قولوا للمدعوين هأنذا قد أعددت وليمتي، وعجولي المعلوفة قد ذبحت وكل شئ معد، فتعالوا إلي العرس.

languages.coptic: N~ywou de e~tauera~mel/c: ausenwou ouai men e~pefiohi: keouai de etefiebswt Pcepi de e~taua~moni n~nefe~biaik ausosou ouoh auqoybou.
